Name: Dis-Chem
Description:
As South Africa’s go-to health authority, Dis-Chem is an integrated health and retail partner committed to making quality care more affordable, convenient and inclusive for all.

Guided by our purpose, Better Health Starts Here, we’re redefining healthcare by connecting people, products, and services across a growing ecosystem that supports every step of the health journey. From our nationwide network of pharmacies, clinics, and retail outlets to our expanding insurance and digital health offerings, we make it easier for South Africans to access care that’s simple, affordable, and connected.

Innovation powers our progress. Through X, bigly labs by Dis-Chem, our dedicated innovation hub, we’re building the future of connected healthcare using technology, data and design thinking to make care smarter and more personalised.

Our ecosystem extends beyond the pharmacy counter. Dis-Chem Health and Dis-Chem Life make private healthcare and life cover more accessible and inclusive by using smart, AI-driven underwriting and health insights to reward proactive health management.

With Better Rewards, our leading loyalty programme, customers enjoy instant savings on thousands of essentials offering real value that can be reinvested into better health every day.

We also recognise that health and sustainability are inseparable. Through the Dis-Chem Foundation, we’re improving access to healthcare and supporting healthier communities nationwide.

Together, we’re making healthcare more human, more connected and better for everyone.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Today, our award-winning products are trusted by millions across Asia.

For the latest in barrier science and innovation, follow #SKINTIFIC

Name: LA ROSÉE
Description:
Nous sommes deux pharmaciennes, Coline et Mahault, passionnées par la cosmétologie et la beauté naturelle.

Au comptoir de la pharmacie, nous avons rencontré des femmes et des hommes à la recherche d'une offre plus simple, plus vraie, plus responsable, sans superflu et sans promesses sophistiquées non tenues.

Nous avons eu alors envie de créer, pour eux comme pour nous, des produits jusqu’à 100 % d’origine naturelle, à l’efficacité cliniquement prouvée et aux packagins éco-conçus. Une marque engagée dans laquelle on peut avoir confiance les yeux fermés !

Rien n’a été facile dans cette quête de l’excellence : créer des formules hautement naturelles et biodégradables, réinventer la cosmétique solide, bannir les suremballages, trouver des alternatives au plastique issu de la pétrochimie, réduire notre impact environnemental au maximum, compenser notre empreinte carbone… tout en gardant des produits 100 % plaisir et à des prix justes.

Mais nous étions convaincues que tout était possible. Cet idéal, nous l’avons construit, jour après jour depuis 9 ans, en commençant par le plus important : vous !

Tous les produits sont élaborés et fabriqués en France.

 10 000 Pharmacies en France, une pharmacie sur deux

Name: Dermage
Description:
A Dermage é sinônimo de qualidade e cuidado. Cuidado ao cuidar da pele de verdade, com ativos de alta concentração. Cuidado ao pensar e desenvolver produtos para a pele brasileira, da qual nos orgulhamos de cuidar desde os anos 70, oferecendo produtos nas mais variadas texturas e para suas diversas necessidades.

Fundada pela farmacêutica bioquímica Lisabeth Braun, a Dermage começou com uma farmácia de manipulação, um negócio até então novo no Rio de Janeiro. Com seus produtos de excelência, construiu uma relação de confiança com a classe médica. A demanda era tanta que, em 1990, Lisa percebeu uma nova oportunidade: por que não industrializar suas fórmulas mais pedidas? Um novo começo, novos desafios.

Com criatividade, estudos e muitas pesquisas, a Dermage se tornou uma das marcas de dermocosméticos mais queridinhas das brasileiras. Seus produtos, desenvolvidos com ativos de alta eficácia e sem testes em animais, ganharam posição de destaque, com fórmulas premiadas e indicações de dermatologistas. 

De uma pequena sala em Copacabana e poucas fórmulas, para mais de 200 produtos no portfólio e 70 lojas no país, entre próprias e franquias, além da distribuição em farmácias e na gigante multimarcas Sephora. De Lisa para Ilana, sua filha e atual CEO da marca, a Dermage é mais do que um case de sucesso, é a demonstração do poder do empreendedorismo feminino.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience
Description:
On ne se donne pas à fond depuis plus de 70 ans sans une bonne raison. Chez Expanscience, nous sommes une société à mission, et notre raison d’être est d’aider chacun à façonner son bien-être, de l’enfance à la séniorité. C’est ce qui fait avancer, chercher et innover nos 1300 collaborateurs, tous les jours ! Indépendants dans l’âme, nous sommes une entreprise française, 100% familiale, avec des produits (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) présents dans plus de 90 pays. Pour nous c’est clair : le bien-être des femmes et des hommes est indissociable de la santé de la planète, et se trouve entre nos mains, à tous. Pour que les parents n’aient plus à choisir entre un soin de qualité pour leurs enfants et une solution bonne pour le monde où ils grandissent, nous leur apportons des produits naturels, performants et sains. Pour que chacun construise son bien-être avec l’âge, nous aidons les individus à préserver leur confort articulaire, leur agilité physique et mentale le plus tôt possible. Nous développons des actifs cosmétiques et ingrédients sensoriels d’origine 100% naturelle, qui contribuent au bien-être du corps et de l’esprit. Notre impact positif sur la société et l’environnement est reconnu par la certification B Corp et, à travers notre programme de RSE « impACT », nous nous engageons à devenir une entreprise à impact positif et à visée régénératrice. 

Notre mission vaut en premier lieu pour nos équipes. Au quotidien, cela se traduit par renforcer la QVT et l’égalité professionnelle, accompagner les vulnérabilités et favoriser l’inclusion des plus fragiles, proposer une stratégie talents et compétences ambitieuse et favoriser l’équilibre des temps de vie et l’efficacité collective. Cela passe par des mesures ambitieuses qui adressent les grands défis sociétaux des entreprises du XXIe siècle. Et cela porte ses fruits : nous sommes fiers d’être certifiés Great Place to Work dans 100% de nos filiales pour la 2e année consécutive !

Name: Apothékary
Description:
Apothékary started with our founder, Shizu Okusa, and her family’s traditional Japanese approach to healing — using nature as medicine instead of over-the-counter fixes. In many Eastern cultures, traditional medicine in the form of plants and herb has been used for centuries to address the root cause of common ailments.

That’s exactly what we strive to do here at Apothékary - we’re here to not just treat the symptom, but get to the root cause of your wellness woes.

The demands of our modern life disconnect us from our inherent state of being. At times, we can forget what it feels like to live in harmony with the natural world. Ancient healing traditions take cues from nature to holistically support our mind, body, and spirit. With daily practice, we’re reminded of what harmony feels like and we wonder how we ever lived without it.

Apothékary is on a mission to give ancient, plant-based healing traditions new life—so that you can live a more balanced one. All of our Signature Formulas are thoughtfully formulated by our in-house Clinical Herbalists, pulling from traditional medicine modalities like Japanese Kampo, Traditional Chinese Medicine, Ayurveda, and American herbalism. The result is simple yet effective herbal remedies with tradition and modern science in mind.

Each formula contains herbs from local and global farmers with ingredients that are non-GMO, gluten-free, and contain no added sugar, fillers, or additives. In essence, they’re nature’s best remedies—plain and simple. And the best part is, they actually work to address the root cause instead of masking the symptoms.

Come with us and reembark on your journey back to balance with Apothékary.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Restez vous. Même.

Name: Baidyanath
Description:
Rooted in the year 1917, Baidyanath has shaped the course of Ayurvedic healthcare in India and beyond for over a century. Founded by the visionary  Pt. Ram Dayal Joshi, Baidyanath has now evolved into one of India’s most trusted and respected names in Ayurvedic healthcare.

Today, Baidyanath formulates and manufactures over 1000 time-tested Ayurvedic products across 14 GMP-certified manufacturing plants nationwide. Our operations are rooted in tradition, yet powered by scientific precision, ensuring consistent quality and safety in every product.

Baidyanath’s reach extends far beyond India. With exports to 35+ countries worldwide, we are proud to represent the global voice of authentic Ayurveda. Our commitment to excellence has been recognized with the ‘Best Quality Ayurvedic Medicine’ Award by the President of India, a testament to the trust we’ve earned over generations.

Baidyanath is deeply committed to the future of Ayurveda. Through scholarship programs and collaborations with educational initiatives, we support the journey of Ayurvedic students who will become the healers of tomorrow—ensuring this ancient science thrives for generations to come.

Beyond our products, Baidyanath is deeply involved in community wellness. We conduct monthly CSR initiatives offering free doctor consultations and medicines, helping us stay connected with real healthcare needs across communities. These efforts not only bring Ayurveda closer to people—but also help us grow better and go farther.

To meet the evolving needs of modern consumers, Goodcare Pharma—our contemporary wellness division—offers authentic, modern wellness effective products for everyday health concerns, crafted with the same Ayurvedic integrity.

For over 107 years, Baidyanath has stood for purity, tradition, and care. As we continue to grow, our mission remains the same: to bring natural, holistic wellness to every home—through the enduring power of Ayurveda.

Name: Doveriye
Description:
How is our work culture different? 
* We are open to hiring people of any age (16 to 70), sexualities and physical disabilities (our office is wheelchair friendly and free from unnecessary sympathy) as long as they have a growth mindset. Everyone is treated equally, irrespective of position and hierarchy. 
* The leadership positions are taken on a rotational basis daily within each team, so everyone gets to be on both sides of the table. We are only willing to hire people with similar attitudes who teach and learn together regardless of age and other qualifications and are open to criticism and improvement. 
* We have one day a week for learning and growth, where we exchange information, sit together, debate, discuss, and grow our knowledge. We focus on the overall development of everyone working with us rather than just getting our work done. 
* We organise classes on personal development, mental health management, free gym access, personal finance management, investment classes, and so much more. Employees can access learning portals like udemy and masterclass for their learning endeavours and interests. 

What do we do? 
We are a Personal Care brand that aims to make self-care products for people struggling with special skin conditions. We currently make skin, hair and body care products for men and women struggling with skin conditions.

Name: Alliance Pharmaceuticals Limited
Description:
At Alliance Pharma, we are a growing consumer healthcare company. Our purpose is to empower people to make a positive difference to their health and wellbeing by making our trusted and proven brands available around the world.

We deliver organic growth through investing in our priority brands and channels, in related innovation, and through selective geographic expansion to increase the reach of our brands. We have previously enhanced our organic growth through selective, complementary acquisitions.
Headquartered in Chippenham, UK, we employ around 290 people based in locations across Europe, North America, and the Asia Pacific region. By outsourcing our manufacturing and logistics we remain asset-light and focused on maximising the value we can bring, both to our stakeholders and to our brands. 

Over the last year, Alliance has sharpened its purpose, vision and strategy to align with the stated move towards a predominantly consumer healthcare company, to better position the company for the future, and in response to changing underlying market dynamics. In line with this new strategy, Alliance will focus on the global priority categories of helping damaged skin and supporting healthy aging.  

Our vision is to be a high performing consumer healthcare company, built on a portfolio of leading, trusted and proven brands. Consumer health products currently deliver 75% of our revenue sales and this continues to be an area of focus going forward.

For more information, please visit our website:  www.alliancepharmaceuticals.com  


Adverse Event Reporting
Adverse events should be reported. Reporting forms and information can be found at www.mhra.gov.uk/yellowcard.
Adverse events should also be reported to Pharmacovigilance at Alliance Pharmaceuticals (tel: 01249 466966, email: pharmacovigilance@alliancepharma.co.uk)

Menssäkerhet är framtiden
Det handlar inte om trender, menssäkerhet är en ny standard. Med Menssäkrad tar ni en aktiv roll i att skapa en arbetsplats där alla känner sig välkomna, inkluderade och trygga.

Vi vill göra det enkelt
Därför har vi en smidig webbshop. Lägg bara till det du vill ha i varukorgen så är dina produkter hos dig inom några dagar. Inget krångel med att borra hål heller; välj vårt smarta klisterkit och menssäkra er arbetsplats på bara några minuter.

Ta steget idag! Shoppa loss eller be om en offert via menssakrad.se.

For people with busy working schedules, those who live rurally and do not have easy access to a GP, for university students who are registered to their home GP simply the long wait times for an appointment. UK Meds makes private healthcare accessible for everyone within our easy to navigate, healthcare portal. You simply choose your treatment from our growing range of medication, PPE and more. Seasons Love Your Skin es una empresa 100% mexicana, dedicada a cuidar y realzar la belleza real y natural de la piel latina. Inspirada en el medio ambiente y sus beneficios. Elaborando tratamientos especializados con ingredientes naturales y libres de tóxicos.

Nuestras investigaciones se basan en la piel y sus efectos cambiantes de cada temporada, para ofrecer tratamientos adecuados al clima en que habitamos. En México, aproximadamente el 80% de las personas tienen tipo de piel mixta a grasa, por lo que en Seasons nos hemos dedicado a formular texturas ligeras y libres de sensación grasosa!

Toda nuestra línea de productos para el cuidado facial, corporal, maquillaje y color son vendidos en toda la República Mexicana directamente por www.seasonsmexico.com y en nuestras 2 tiendas en Guadalajara, Jalisco, donde también ofrecemos servicios de faciales con cosmetólogas profesionales. Además tenemos presencia en 13 tiendas departamentales y en marketplaces como Amazon.com, walmart.com y mercadolibre.com.

Seasons es el SKINCARE latino, natural, fuerte, sexy y real.

Name: Pharmaserve
Description:
Founded in April 1984 by Dionysios Filiotis, a distinguished pharmacist, Pharmaserve has been guided by unwavering principles of integrity and excellence from its inception. Our commitment to delivering high-quality healthcare solutions to the Greek populace has been our motivating force.
Initially established as the exclusive distributor for the pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly in Greece, Pharmaserve transitioned into a joint venture with Eli Lilly in 1994. This alliance, known as Pharmaserve-Lilly, solidifies our position as Eli Lilly’s strategic partner in the Greek market to this day.
Over the years, our dedication to excellence, ethical conduct, integrity, and diligence has elevated Pharmaserve into a trusted collaborator within Greece’s healthcare community. We are widely recognized as one of the country’s most impactful healthcare companies. Our robust portfolio of high-quality healthcare products is developed through strategic partnerships with healthcare companies, both in Greece and globally, in order to best serve the healthcare needs of the Greek populace. We are steadily strengthening our presence in consumer products, in medical technology products, and in innovative and well-established pharmaceutical products of the highest quality that offer options to patients to treat a number of illnesses and to improve quality of life.
We prioritize transparency in our operations. We rigorously adhere to procedures for transparent disclosure of benefits to healthcare professionals, in compliance with the guidelines set forth by the National Organization for Medicines.
We emphasize transparency. We apply procedures for transparency and disclosure of benefits to third-party Health Professionals, in accordance with the provisions of the National Organization for Medicines.
Pharmaserve boasts an unparalleled legacy in clinical research, commercialization and distribution of healthcare products throughout Greece.

Name: NIRA
Description:
Our mission is to help people everywhere look and feel their best by providing the same laser technology as dermatologists in the comfort of their homes and at a fraction of the cost.

NIRA's revolutionary at-home laser technology has helped thousands look and feel more beautiful. Our patented, non-fractional laser devices are clinically shown to tighten skin and reduce the look of wrinkles, providing a smoother and more vibrant complexion.

NIRA was founded by serial entrepreneur and laser industry expert, David Bean. His pioneer company, Seminex, has provided laser diodes for in-office professional dermatology laser treatment systems for over two decades. Since most of these treatments are expensive, painful, and cause significant downtime, Bean invented the NIRA technology - an easy and painless alternative that can be used in the comfort of home.

NIRA is an omni-channel business with its products distributed across retail, home shopping, direct-to-consumer, eCommerce and international channels – approved sellers of NIRA include CurrentBody US & UK, Amazon USA, QVC USA, 40 Boxes, & FabFitFun.

With our patented technology, deep rooted knowledge in laser skincare, and clinically proven results, NIRA is loved among beauty influencers and over 25,000 loyal customers, in addition to winning CurrentBody's Customer Choice Awards in 2021 to celebrate their customers' best loved devices.

Name: Nutrasynthia
Description:
Nutrasynthia provides you with high quality, difficult to make advanced nutritional ingredients. 

A specialised area is cutting-edge liposomal technology, where Nutrasynthia offers under its Trademark lipoNIQ a variety of raw material and semi-finished products such as powder, granules, liquids, chewable tablets, beadlets, on-the-go sticks with water-dispersable powder or drinkable liquids and special range of gummies, suitable for kids or in other segments such as sports nutrition where high bioavailability of ingredients is extremely important . 

lipoNIQ is an advanced liposomal technology which is capable to develop dry liposomes with stability beyond their liquid alternatives. The superior quality of lipoNIQ is proven by various tests and certificates. 

In specific we monitor the following important parameters:

1. Particle Size: we ensure that the particle size is in the range between 80-400nm, depending on the relevant ingredient for best efficacy.

2. Zeta Potential: we conduct analyses for Zeta Potential to ensure lipoNIQ superior stability. The value of Zeta Potential lies between 20-40 mV. 

3. Gastric Stability: lipoNIQ is tested in different PH environments, since only Liposomes that reach the small intestine are suitable for lymphatic uptake and thus can provide superior bioavailability.

lipoNIQ products are supported with scientific background. Nutrasynthia provides you with scientific rationale behind the superior benefit for Liposomal dietary supplements and helps you to develop the scientific Marketing Strategy.

Nutrasynthia also offers custom-made solutions for you to make the difference in your market and be ahead of competition. Our products are manufactured in EU GMP certified facilities.

Pourquoi l’inclusion, la clean beauty ou encore l’IA façonnent-elles aujourd’hui les tendances du secteur cosmétique ? Comment ces mouvements sont-ils nés ? Quels enjeux sociaux ou technologiques les ont propulsés au cœur de la beauté ? 

Dans chaque épisode, on analyse et on croise les données, pour comprendre non seulement ce qui se passe, mais pourquoi ça se passe… et ce que ça dit de demain.

On ne parle pas que de beauté. On parle de culture, de consommation, de société, d'économie. 

Une plongée analytique dans une industrie en (r)évolution permanente.

#cosmétique #beauté #podcast #tendances #insights

~ Dr. Matthew Walker (Somnee Co-Founder, UC Berkeley Prof. of Neuroscience, author of bestseller, "Why We Sleep")
 
𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗥𝗲𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁𝘆 𝗼𝗳 𝗦𝗹𝗲𝗲𝗽 𝗶𝗻 𝟮𝟬𝟮𝟱
1 in 3 adults gets poor quality sleep. 51% are frustrated with their sleep quality. The implications are far-reaching, affecting focus, mood, performance, health, and your ability to be the parent, leader, athlete, artist, and person you want to be.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗠𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻
Somnee’s on a mission to make peak performance sleep the new normal, to fundamentally transform the human experience, cognitive health, and longevity. 

Somnee's 5x award-winning Smart Sleep Headband combines decades of clinically validated neuroscience and cutting-edge AI technology with a first-of-its-kind approach to dynamic closed-loop neurostimulation. 

The result: a personalized AI sleep coach that tracks your sleep with lab-grade accuracy, while actively improving your rest.

𝗧𝗲𝗮𝗺 + 𝗥𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗵
Somnee was developed over 7 years by world-renowned UC Berkeley neuroscientists including Dr. Matthew Walker, Dr. Robert Knight, Dr. Rich Ivry, and Dr. Ram Gurumoorthy. Our approach is clinically validated & published in the peer-reviewed journal Frontiers in Human Neuroscience. Our team includes proven leaders from Fitbit, Google, Apple, and Samsung.

𝗔𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗱𝘀 + 𝗥𝗲𝗰𝗼𝗴𝗻𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

Evde bakım alanında edindiği saha tecrübesini diyabet teknolojileri alanına taşıyabilme kabiliyeti, kullanıcıların en iyi hizmeti alabilmesi temelini sağlamlaştırdı. 2013 yılının başından itibaren sektörün önde gelen Avrupa ve Amerikan menşeili ürünlerin ulusal distribütörlüğünü sürdürmektedir.
MedSalus, rekabetçi bir ortamda, takım çalışmasına ve çalışanların memnuniyetine önem vererek birçok ilde hizmet sağlama olanağına sahiptir. Ulusal ekonomiye katkı sağlama ve milli kaynakların verimli kullanılması temeli üzerine inşa edilen şirketimizin öncelikli hedefi en kaliteli hizmetin, isteyen her bireye ve kuruma ulaştırılabilmesini sağlamaktır.

Name: Fresh Test, LLC
Description:
The Fresh Test is an Organic, Non-GMO diagnostic glucose beverage available in 50g, 75g, and 100g formulations for use in oral glucose tolerance testing (OGTT).

Indicated for the screening and diagnosis of Diabetes Mellitus and Gestational Diabetes Mellitus, The Fresh Test is designed for use in alignment with your existing clinical protocols. Clear Instructions for Use are printed on each product. 

Unlike traditional brands, The Fresh Test is void of artificial dyes, flavors, preservatives, GMOs, and BPA. It validated and audited as a Class II Medical Device (MRV diagnostic glucose beverage), manufactured in FDA-certified, ISO-compliant facilities according to American Diabetes Association (ADA) standards.

Every production lot includes Medical Device Manufacturing Certificates of Analysis (COAs) and Third-Party ISO 17025 Laboratory Reports.  These are provided for full transparency and traceability.

Designed with both clinical excellence and patient experience in mind, The Fresh Test patented diagnostic line improves compliance by offering a cleaner, better-tasting option—without compromising diagnostic accuracy.

We proudly serve OB/GYN clinics, hospitals, laboratories, and health systems nationwide seeking a modern, organic solution for diagnostic glucose testing.

To learn more or request samples, visit www.thefreshtest.com or email info@thefreshtest.com.

Description:
In 2016 when we had our first child, Leon, it felt like it was a metaphorical rebirth for us. The raw intensity of parenthood – both the joys and the challenges – made us realize the indescribable power of a parent’s love. The experience was (and still is) so profound that it inspired us to pursue a tangible way to give hope and to help others who struggle to start their own family.

Our nearest and dearest cause is to support women with infertility and hormonal imbalances, particularly PCOS (Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome).

We want to empower them to experience the same joys of parenthood while taking back control of their bodies.

“Change the world through nourishing families” is our mantra and mission because we believe a nourished mother is the first step for a wholesome family. Almost 5 years and 450,000 happy customers later, hearing your success stories continue to fuel our passion. We want to keep being a part of that story. And to grow with that story.

Description:
Our story began centuries ago when a mother taught her daughter how to treat skin and started to create our traditional recipe book. Since then this tradition and later on the family business has been passed through generations of female members of the family, who all were skincare experts or dermatologists. The family’s secret book of formulas still exists and contains unique, effective, nature-inspired skincare formulas of cremes, ointments, tonics, masks and tinctures, which have been applied for over a hundred years and withstood the test of time.

In old times the one and only way to treat skin was that a professional examined the skin and the patient, prescribed and created special formulas based on the condition of the patient. The products were hand-prepared specially for the patients by pharmacologists. That meant that each and every ingredient in the formula was there for a reason and there was nothing that the skin did not need and had to fight against. That was the respect for the patient and his skin.

Unfortunately today the approach is different. It is more about mass market and money. There is no way that off-the-shelf products can be suitable for everyone. To make them safe for each consumer only a tiny amount of active ingredients is possible in the formulas, not considering substances that the skin has to eliminate to survive.

We are bringing back the old tradition of care, cherish and respect to every customer. The tradition of paying attention to every detail, of our holistic approach: perception the body as a whole. Our aim is to offer this revolutionary skincare approach to the general public.

Rather than chasing symptoms, Detox Nation focuses on systems-based healing. Our work integrates bioregulatory medicine principles, environmental illness education, detoxification physiology, mitochondrial health, and nervous system regulation to help people rebuild capacity, resilience, and energy.

Core focus areas include:
• Root cause health education
• Chronic illness and unexplained symptoms
• Gut health and digestive issues
• Mold and mycotoxin exposure
• Parasites and microbial imbalance
• Histamine intolerance and MCAS patterns
• Liver, bile, and detox pathway dysfunction
• Nervous system dysregulation 
• Mitochondrial dysfunction and low cellular energy
• Environmental exposures and toxic load

Detox Nation offers structured online programs, memberships, and practitioner-level trainings for both individuals and health professionals.

Under Sinclair Kennally’s leadership, Detox Nation exists to simplify complex biology, validate lived experience, and provide a clear, practical roadma

Name: Farmácias de Moçambique, S.A.
Description:
A Farmácias de Moçambique, S.A. constitui uma referência histórica e institucional no sector farmacêutico nacional, com quarenta e oito anos de serviço público dedicado à promoção do acesso equitativo a medicamentos e produtos de saúde. Integralmente detida pelo Estado Moçambicano, através do Instituto de Gestão das Participações do Estado, a  Farmácias de Moçambique materializa, desde 1977, o compromisso soberano com a protecção da saúde e o bem estar das comunidades.

Criada num período determinante da história nacional, então como Empresa Estatal de Farmácias, a Farmácias de Moçambique assumiu desde a sua génese a missão de edificar e expandir uma rede pública de farmácias capaz de garantir a disponibilidade de medicamentos essenciais em todo o território nacional. Ao longo das décadas, soube adaptar se às dinâmicas sociais, económicas e institucionais do País, consolidando se como um actor estratégico da saúde pública e um parceiro incontornável do Sistema Nacional de Saúde.

No âmbito da Reforma do Sector Empresarial do Estado, consagrada pela Lei n.º 3 de 2018, a Farmácias de Moçambique foi transformada em sociedade anónima, inaugurando uma nova etapa orientada para a modernização da gestão, o reforço da governação corporativa, a sustentabilidade financeira e a inovação operacional, sem nunca perder de vista a sua vocação pública e social.

Actualmente, a Farmácias de Moçambique ultrapassa o conceito tradicional de rede de farmácias. Com 32 unidades distribuídas de forma estratégica a nível nacional, com uma equipa de 144 profissionais qualificados, conjuga ciência, integridade e dedicação ao serviço público, promovendo confiança, proximidade e credibilidade junto dos cidadãos. 

Hoje, a Farmácias de Moçambique posiciona-se como muito mais do que uma farmácia. É um instrumento estratégico do Estado, um pilar da saúde pública e um elo de confiança ao serviço de todos os moçambicanos.

Hoje somos + do que uma Farmácia.

NorthShore exists to eliminate the two fears people with incontinence face:
the fear of leaks and the fear of stigma.

As the pioneer of Heavy Bladder Leakage (HBL) protection and the maker off NorthShore - the world's best brand of adult diapers for people with heavy control problems - our mission is to empower people with the freedom and dignity they deserve. Our consumers aren’t looking for euphemisms. They want honesty, reliability, and the knowledge that they are not alone — and that real help exists.

NorthShore is redefining what incontinence support means by breaking stigma, elevating the truth, and helping people get the protection and medical attention they need earlier.

We have helped over 2.5 million individuals managing incontinence, their loved ones and caregivers.

NorthShore is the only brand of adult diapers and incontinence supplies designed specifically for heavy bladder leakage (HBL) as well as bowel leaks - eliminating nighttime changes and worry about leaks.

NorthShore stays dry 3X longer than leading brands featuring our own proprietary MVP Multi-Void Protection technology.

•	Millions of people live with Heavy Bladder Leakage (HBL).
•	Unfortunately, most adult diapers are designed for lighter leaks, which means people with HBL have to change them every few hours.
•	But HBL doesn’t have to disrupt normal life if protection can be trusted to last.
•	NorthShore stays dry through the night — even for HBL — so sleep is uninterrupted and daily routines can feel normal again.

Unbelievably dry adult diapers that end nighttime changes and allow people to reclaim their day.

Protection ⟶ Confidence ⟶ Dignity

Our flagship adult diapers include MegaMax Diaper Style Briefs with Tabs and GoSupreme Pull Up Underwear which are both #1 for HBL.

We are an experienced team of farmers, scientists and health industry leaders working hard to bring plant-based products to consumers around the world.

Our secret ingredient is algae, which is packed with nutrients like Omega-3s and protein, and uses resources that otherwise would not be utilized – like non-fertile land and salt water – to grow. Most people don’t realize algae is the original source of Omega-3s (fish, krill and humans can't make Omega-3s), the essential fatty acids critical for human health and wellbeing. Our algae requires no fresh water to grow, and is about 300 times more productive than peas in terms of production of essential amino acids. 

Our Omega-3 supplements are available nationwide at Amazon, Whole Foods, Sprouts, Vitamin Shoppe and other fine retailers and are always available at iwilife.com. They are vegan, non-GMO and sustainable. (Clinical studies show humans can absorb 1.7X more Omega-3s from iwi life's patented AlmegaPL than from fish or krill oil.) 
We are also developing new plant-based protein products, such as functional foods, snacks and supplements. Visit our site for more details.

At iwi, we are committed to the rural communities around our Texas and New Mexico farms, creating jobs both directly and indirectly, and leading a movement that we call Social Sustainability. Join the tribe!

Om Ellen vars operativa verksamhet sålts till Addeira Pharmacuticals i augusti 2025;

Ellen AB grundades år 2000 och är ett svenskt bioteknikföretag med mångårig forskning kring mikrobiologi och kvinnohälsa i ryggen. År 2003 blev Ellen först i världen med att erbjuda kvinnor en probiotisk tampong innehållande samma aktiva mjölksyrabakterier som naturligt finns i en frisk kvinnas underliv och som hjälper till att bibehålla pH-balansen. Under åren har Ellen lanserat en rad andra innovativa och skonsamma produkter som bidrar till ett pH-balanserat underliv. 

Ellen brinner för kvinnlig intimhälsa och vill uppmuntra kvinnor och flickor att lära känna sitt underliv och lära sig mer. Därför startades Ellens intimvårdsskola. En plattform där Ellen tillsammans med professionen och återförsäljare jobbar aktivt för att öka kunskapen inom intimhälsa.

Description:
You don’t give your all for over seventy years without a good reason… At Expanscience, we are a mission-driven company, and our purpose is to help individuals shape their well-being, from the youngest to the oldest. It’s what inspires our 1,300 employees to move forward, carry out research and innovate, every single day! Independence is our lifeblood. We’re a French company that is 100% family-owned, with products in over 90 countries. Our positive impact on society and the environment has been recognized by the B Corp label, and we commit to being a company that’s better for the world. Better for our employees, too, through the promise we make to develop the potential of each and every one of them! 

Our mission applies first and foremost to our teams. On a day-to-day basis, this means strengthening quality of life at work and professional equality, supporting those in vulnerable situations and promoting the inclusion of the most fragile members of society, proposing an ambitious talent and skills strategy and promoting work-life balance and collective efficacy. This requires ambitious measures that address the major societal challenges facing 21st-century companies. And it is bearing fruit: we are proud to have been certified as a Great Place to Work in 100% of our subsidiaries for the second consecutive year!

Find out more: www.expanscience.com/en-us

Name: Pharmacie Familia
Description:
L’efficacité et le professionnalisme au service du patient, c’est notre vision du pharmacien de proximité.
Prévention, prise en charge d’une plainte (sous prescription ou en automédication), nos équipes sont de véritables interlocuteurs de confiance.
Soucieux de la santé et du bien-être de nos patients, nous les accompagnons de manière globale et intégrée en associant délivrance de traitement et conseil professionnel avisé.
Notre large offre de soins inclut également des gammes de produits non-soumis à prescription : nutrithérapie, phytothérapie, médecine naturelle, dermo-cosmétique...

Cette démarche étendue à nos 100 pharmacies a des implications fortes :
■ traçabilité des médicaments, respect de la chaine du froid,
■ bons conseils de posologie et d’observance, mais aussi
■ prévention de toute forme de surconsommation.
Nous proposons au sein de notre réseau une offre claire et détaillée, classée par préoccupation de santé.
Pour nos patients, cela se traduit par :
• Un accent sur la proximité et la qualité des services et conseils prodigués.
• L’assurance d’un prix juste sur une large offre de produits
• Une politique d’offre complète et universelle, sans aucune discrimination

Nous sommes également leader wallon dans la délivrance aux institutions. Elles sont déjà plus de 100 à nous faire confiance. Pour chacune, un pharmacien Familia sert de contact de première ligne, de relais privilégié entre les différents intervenants. Toute commande de médicament se fait par lui de manière manuelle ou via une préparation médicale individualisée (PMI). Nous disposons de notre centre équipé des robots les plus fiables d’Europe. Un réel gage de qualité et d’efficacité.
Le groupe dispose également de son propre dépôt médicaments duquel nos
pharmacies sont livrées quotidiennement. C’est plus de 13 000 références négociées et stockées selon les règles strictes de l’AFMPS.

Where Dignity Blooms

Today, Flawsome is a beacon, illuminating a path towards a future where menstrual wellness is celebrated, where every menstruator feels seen, heard, and empowered to bloom.

Our products are designed to let each ingredient shine, from our hero Bean Essence to our ultra-calming Centella line. Backed by simplicity, efficacy, and transparency, Mixsoon empowers all skin types to achieve balance and health - naturally.

Let’s connect.
We partner with retailers, distributors, and beauty professionals who believe in meaningful skincare.

Name: RUE DU COLIBRI
Description:
RUE DU COLIBRI est une marque française initialement créée autour du cancer suite à une expérience personnelle.

Elle propose des gammes de vêtements et d’accessoires qui apportent praticité, confort et dignité aux patients (femmes, enfants, hommes) dans plusieurs situations de vie.
•	Lorsqu’ils sont équipés de dispositifs dans le thorax ou le bras, pour recevoir des perfusions répétées (de chimiothérapie, d’antibiothérapie, de nutrition parentérale…)
•	Lorsqu’ils souffrent d’une mobilité réduite du haut du corps, à la suite d’une opération (épaule, sein…), de blessures, d’arthrose.
•	Lorsqu’ils ont besoin d’aide pour l’habillage ou la toilette.

Chaque article est conçu avec des patients, des professionnels et en collaboration avec des stylistes pour associer style, sécurité et confort. 
Nous accordons une attention particulière à la production et avons choisi un partenaire au Portugal pour son savoir-faire, la qualité de ses tissus Oeko-Tex et ses valeurs.

RUE DU COLIBRI s’inscrit dans le cadre de la loi relative à l’Economie sociale et solidaire de 2014.

Description:
Suspire makes better living easier, through wellness-first, thoughtfully curated choices you can trust. For you, and for businesses. Choose Well. Live Well.

We are building an ecosystem for conscious living in India, where sustainability isn’t a luxury, but the default. Today, Suspire connects:

• 400+ sustainable homegrown brands

• A 500,000+ strong conscious community

• 100,000+ eco-friendly gifts delivered across India

What we do:
1. Marketplace for Sustainable Brands: A technology-first platform where ethical, eco-friendly brands can showcase and scale. We help purpose-led founders grow through discovery, tools and data, while staying true to their values.

2. Curated Store for Conscious Consumers: A hand-picked marketplace for people who want to live well and consume mindfully. Every product is vetted for wellness, quality and impact, so choosing better becomes simpler, from daily essentials to thoughtful gifts.

3. Suspire for Business (Corporate & Bulk Gifting): A dedicated vertical for organisations that want their gifting to reflect their values. We design and deliver curated, sustainable gifting experiences for teams, clients and communities, at scale, with end-to-end support.

Why this matters:
The “better living economy” is rising. People are choosing fewer, better products and expecting transparency, wellness and sustainability as standard. Suspire exists to make that shift easier for everyone, brands, consumers and organisations alike.

Work with us, grow with us. If you’re:

• A professional who wants to build in a fast-paced, high-ownership team at the intersection of wellness, sustainability and tech

• A conscious consumer looking to discover better choices, more easily

• A business leader exploring meaningful, sustainable gifting or partnerships

…we’d love to connect.

Follow Suspire, explore our marketplace, or write to us to partner via any of our channels. 

Let’s build a better living ecosystem, together.

Vous sentez comme un "clou" au niveau du talon ?
Vous sentez une forte douleur, le matin au réveil, qui vous empêche de marcher ?
Vous souffrez sans doute d'une EPINE CALCANÉENNE (ou épine de Lenoir).

RheelaxX est LA SOLUTION.

En effet, RheelaxX est la SEULE semelle qui permet par un effet mécanique de réduire la pression de contact au talon, mais également par un effet musculaire, de détendre la tension de l' aponevrose plantaire qui elle cause l'inflammation.

RheelaxX a un effet immédiat, la douleur disparaît instantanément.

RheelaxX est de faible épaisseur, elle se glisse dans toutes les chaussures (chaussures à talons, bottes, bottines, chaussures de sport), même de chaussures ouvertes.

L-Nutra also introduced Fast Bar - the first and only bar designed for intermittent fasting. Clinically tested as part of Fasting Mimicking Diet, Fast Bar is a nutritious snack high in healthy fats and plant protein.

Name: Grupo Modena e Silva
Description:
Fundada em novembro de 2014 pelos visionários empresários Natanael Modena e Flavio da Silva, a empresa iniciou sua jornada com a inauguração da primeira unidade em Cacoal, Rondônia. Com muito esforço e dedicação, a empresa expandiu-se rapidamente, adquirindo uma segunda farmácia em Vilhena e inaugurando uma terceira unidade em Ji-Paraná.

Reconhecendo o potencial de crescimento no estado, em outubro de 2016, a empresa inaugurou sua primeira unidade em Porto Velho. Até 2018, com diversas unidades já em operação em Rondônia, a empresa investiu na construção do seu primeiro Centro de Distribuição (CD), um passo crucial para otimizar a logística. Esta expansão direta na logística permitiu a redução de rupturas no estoque e facilitou a compra de produtos das maiores indústrias farmacêuticas do país.

Atualmente, a empresa conta com dois CDs em Rondônia, totalizando mais de 10 mil metros quadrados de espaço de armazenamento. Com 61 unidades distribuídas nas principais cidades do estado, a empresa continua firme em seu plano de expansão, sempre com o compromisso de oferecer excelência em seus serviços e produtos. Além disso, a empresa possui 13 lojas no Amazonas e 29 no Pará, ampliando sua presença na região Norte do Brasil.

O Grupo Modena & Silva é integrante da Farmarcas, a maior associação de farmácias do Brasil, que conta com mais de 1.500 lojas ativas. Este vínculo fortalece ainda mais a presença e o impacto da empresa no mercado farmacêutico nacional.

Missão:
Satisfazer as necessidades dos clientes com excelência e agilidade no atendimento, oferecendo produtos de qualidade a preços justos.

Visão:
Ser a maior rede de farmácias do Norte do Brasil até 2030, por meio de uma gestão profissional e inovadora, com foco na saúde, beleza e bem-estar das pessoas, e tornando-se referência em atendimento.

Valores:
Conduzir o negócio de forma ética, visando a lucratividade e estabelecendo com a equipe uma relação justa e mutuamente comprometida.

Ce nom, chargé d'émotions et d'authenticité, exprime notre volonté de restituer à travers tous nos soins les fabuleux bienfaits des plantes aromatiques.

Depuis 40 ans, nous continuons d’être attaché à l’authenticité du terroir, la naturalité des formules et le savoir-faire artisanal qui définissent ce laboratoire "made in Provence".

Name: Sanjeewanie Ayurveda
Description:
About Sanjeewanie Ayurveda (Pvt) Ltd
Welcome to Sanjeewanie Ayurveda (Pvt) Ltd, a sanctuary of holistic wellness in Sri Lanka. With a legacy spanning over two centuries, we blend ancient Ayurvedic wisdom with modern innovations to nurture body, mind, and spirit.
Our Heritage
Derived from the Sanskrit epic Ramayana, Sanjeewanie symbolizes rejuvenation. Our roots trace back to Helaudakanda, where a revered healer's knowledge, passed through generations, continues to restore balance and vitality.
Our Journey
Founded in 1960 and registered in 1992, Sanjeewanie Ayurveda thrives under H.M.D.S. Sandakelum, the fourth generation of our lineage. We are ISO 9001:2015 and GMP certified, ensuring the highest standards of excellence.
Our Products
We offer a range of Ayurvedic products, including rejuvenative and aphrodisiac medicines, organic hair oils, and essential hair oils. Our formulations harness nature's power to enhance vitality, beauty, and health, blending Sri Lankan Ayurvedic heritage with contemporary quality standards.
Our Process
In Sri Lanka's lush landscapes, our herbalists gather the finest ingredients, hand-picked from forests and farmlands. These are meticulously measured and harmonized in traditional brass vessels, creating elixirs of wellness through a sacred process.
Our Vision
Under Sandakelum's leadership, we aim to bridge ancient practices with modern health needs, educating and inspiring a global audience about Ayurveda's benefits. Our commitment to quality and sustainability drives us to maintain the highest standards.
Achievements
We have earned numerous accolades, including the Pinnacle Sri Lanka 2023 award for Best Rejuvenative & Aphrodisiac Medicines and the Business World Excellence Awards 2023 for Best Ceylonese Indigenous Medicine Manufacturer.
Join Us
Experience authentic Ayurvedic remedies with Sanjeewanie Ayurveda. Visit our head office in Colombo or explore our products online. Connect with us on social media or visit www.sanjeewanieayurveda

Name: SunLED Life Science
Description:
SunLED Life Science is an Amsterdam-based research team developing (digital) health technologies that harness the power of near-infrared light. Today, most of us spend 90% of our waking hours indoors, missing out on the vital benefits of natural sunlight. Our team is dedicated to addressing this gap. 

Our main technology, SunLED uses near-infrared light - a crucial component of sunlight - improving health and well-being. The benefits include enhanced physical health, improved mood, reduced drowsiness, and a better immune system. And this is just the beginning. Our ongoing research explores how near-infrared light benefits the human body through photobiomodulation therapy (PBM), unlocking even more potential for our technology. 

SunLED can be seamlessly integrated into various applications, from screens and lighting fixtures to car dashboards (DMS systems) and more. 

Our device that clips to any screen and provides effortless health benefits is coming soon!

Let’s bring the sun inside together!

Les solutions que nous développons vont agir en priorité sur les troubles gastro-intestinaux, l’immunité et certains troubles infectieux, pour améliorer et pérenniser le bien être de nos consommateurs :
-	Des probiotiques, acteurs clés de la santé, du bien être digestif et de l’immunité ;
-	Des extraits de plantes alpines et produits de phytothérapie particulièrement efficaces en traitement préventif et dans des pathologies infectieuses récidivantes (gamme en développement).
Nos recherches et nos produits s’appuient sur des preuves scientifiques d’efficacité et de tolérance, et nos partenaires industriels ont été sélectionnés avec soin. Notre ambition est d’apporter à nos produits la qualité et le sérieux qui font, partout dans le monde, la réputation des entreprises suisses.

Mutualiser les moyens, croiser les énergies, donner de la force à celles et ceux qui réinventent la beauté française.

Description:
Hep iyi hissetmeniz için varız!

“Hep İyi Hisset” sloganı ile tüketicilerin sağlıklı gıda takviyesi ihtiyacına yönelik olarak, güvenilir ve yenilikçi ürünleri erişilebilir şekilde sunmak için yola çıktık. Bu alanda dünyayı izleyerek, gelişen ihtiyaçlara çözüm üretirken; insan, çevre ve toplum sağlığını odağa koyan, sürdürülebilir bir anlayış benimsedik.

Vitago Kids markamızla çocuklara yönelik doğal balık yağları ve multivitamin şuruplar başta olmak üzere çeşitli gıda takviyeleri ile onların gelişimine katkı sağlamayı amaçlıyoruz. Çocukların vitaminleri daha eğlenceli ve kolay tüketmesini sağlayan çiğnenebilir formlarda özel ürünler üretiyoruz. Bunları yine çocuklarımızın çok sevdiği karakterlerden olan TRT Çocuk Rafadan Tayfa ve Pırıl karakterlerinin arkadaşlığı ile sunuyoruz. TRT Çocuk kanalının gıda takviyesi alanındaki tek lisanslı üreticisiyiz. 

Efervesan ürün gruplarında koruyucu, şeker, gluten ve laktoz içermeyen ürünleri tüketiciyle buluşturmaktayız. Titanyum dioksit içermeyen tablet ve kapsül formlarıyla minimize gıda katkı içerikleriyle kendine özgün yeni konseptler sunuyoruz. Öte yandan liken bitkisinden elde edilen dünyadaki ilk onaylı D3 vitaminiyle Türkiye’de tamamen bitkisel ve koruyucu içermeden üretilmiş D3+K2 vitamin ürününe sahibiz. Türkiye'de üretilen ilk organik çocuk D vitaminine ve yetişkinler için çeşitli vegan sertifikalı ürünlere sahibiz. 

Sağlık Bilimleri Üniversitesi ile yaptığımız iş birliği çerçevesinde uzman akademisyenlerle birlikte yeni ürünler geliştiriyoruz. GMP İyi Üretim Uygulamaları Sertifikası, Organik Üretim Müteşebbis Sertifikası, ISO 9001:2015 Kalite Yönetim Sistemi Sertifikası, HACCP 22000:2005 Gıda Güvenliği Sistemi Sertifikası, Helal Üretim Sertifikası, Etik Uygunluk Sertifikası ve FDA Amerikan Gıda Komisyonu Uygunluk Sertifikası ve VEGAN sertifikasına sahibiz. 

Ürünlerimize anlaşmalı Eczaneler, Migros, GetirBüyük, File, Gratis, İstegelsin, Eveshop, E-bebek ve Trendyol’daki resmi mağazamızdan ulaşabilirsiniz.

Name: LXMI
Description:
LXMI, pronounced /luxe-me/, is committed to three distinct brand tenets:

• Rare ingredients from unique terroir
• Going beyond charity to #givework to women
• Potent organic botanicals with rare #PlantPower

Named after the Hindu goddess of beauty, Lakshmi, whose four hands represent prosperity, liberation, morality and love – our seal shows two hands giving, and two hands receiving.

Leila Janah founded LXMI after a chance discovery of Nilotica, LXMI’s signature ingredient, at a market in Uganda. She was astounded by the rare butter’s ability to transform her moisture-deprived, overly traveled skin from lackluster to luminous. Once she learned that she could help marginalized East African women find dignified work through the wild harvesting, production and exportation of Nilotica, she knew she had to change her life to share her new skincare secret with the world.

But she didn’t stop there. She went the extra mile(s) to source Nilotica Reserve, now LXMI’s exclusive form of the butter, from the highest grade nuts in the most pristine areas of the Nile River Valley. Nilotica Reserve’s characteristics are skyhigh essential fatty acids (+25% that of traditional Shea Butter), natural vitamin crystals that dissolve on skin, and impact sourcing techniques to ensure that LXMI producers are always paid living wages for their efforts.

Our primary ingredient harvests enable our producers to earn at least 3x local wages. We’ve built our supply chain carefully via non-profit collectives. We believe that fair wage, dignified work elevates our end product, creating a higher level of luxury for discerning consumers. 

In fact, we promise that for each of our primary ingredient harvests, our producers earn at least 3x the local average wage. These living wages will help chip away at some of the world’s most serious problems, from childhood malnutrition to human trafficking. Let’s transform our skin, our planet, and people for the better.

Name: New Penta Official
Description:
Qualcuno crede che per recuperare la forma fisica sia sufficiente dimagrire: sbagliato. Bisogna perdere il grasso in eccesso mantenendo però intatti il tono muscolare e la massa magra.
Il metodo SAIP si basa essenzialmente sul principio che una riduzione dei glucidi e dei lipidi, associata al consumo quasi esclusivo di proteine di alto

valore biologico, con un apporto di aminoacidi essenziali perfettamente equilibrati, permette di ridurre la massa del tessuto adiposo grazie al nuovo bilanciamento Insulina – Glucagone che si viene ad instaurare nell’organismo.

Grazie al metodo SAIP (Sistema Alimentare Integrato Penta), che riprende l’idea sviluppata su quanto proposto già nel 1973 negli Stati Uniti dal Prof. Blackburn G.L., professore alla scuola di medicina dell’Università di Harvard e ricercatore al M.I.T., si può perdere peso facilmente, salvaguardando la massa muscolare.
Questa metodica, già ampiamente diffusa in Francia dalla metà degli anni ’80 e consigliata da migliaia di medici, è stata usata quasi esclusivamente per il trattamento dell’obesità, ma oggi i campi di applicazione sono molteplici: può essere usata per l’adiposità localizzata come la cellulite, per il trattamento di dislipidemie e della sindrome metabolica, ha un’utile applicazione nel ritorno al peso forma post gravidanza e nel pre e post intervento di chirurgia bariatrica.

La letteratura scientifica internazionale ha prodotto studi che dimostrano la sicurezza ed efficacia di questo trattamento trovando un largo riscontro e diffusione presso la Comunità Scientifica. New Penta si pone come riferimento primo per prescrittori e pazienti, con un protocollo dietoterapico sicuro ed efficace sotto guida del referente sanitario ed esclusivamente con prescrizione medica.

Selçuk Ecza Deposu'nun vizyonu, insan sağlığının esas olduğu bir sektörde faaliyet gösteren bir kuruluş olarak; ulusal ve uluslararası alanda yerli, yabancı müşterilerine, dünya standartlarında, çağın gereklilikleri doğrultusunda hizmet vermek, hizmet kalitesini çeşitlendirmek, geliştirmek ve insan sağlığı odaklı bir sektörün tüm dinamiklerini değerlendirerek yine insan sağlığı için üzerine düşenden de fazlasını yerine getirmektir.

Misyonumuz
Selçuk Ecza Deposu'nun misyonu, bulunduğu sektörün dinamiklerini en iyi şekilde analiz ederek sektördeki öncü konumunu korumak, ilaca erişim açısından eczaneler ile ilaç tedarikçileri arasında yer alan, kaliteli hizmet veren, güvenilir kurum kimliğini korumak, müşterilerinin ihtiyaç, talep ve beklentilerini en fazla ürün çeşidi, en son teknoloji imkanları ile "İyi Dağıtım Metodu" ilkeleri doğrultusunda, en uygun ticari koşullar altında karşılamaktır.

Safe and remove the earwax made in the outer ear canal

- Reusable and Washable

Dangers of Using Cotton Swabs
 
When people use cotton swabs they frequently clean out some of the wax, but also push some of it back deeper.

Water can also be trapped behind these self-created wax dams and you may hear the water moving around in the ear.

The eardrum is very delicate, so you can puncture it with a cotton swab.
So, if you tap on the eardrum, you’re sending shock waves into the inner ear and can cause problems with your hearing and balance.

Le nostre Farmacie sono concepite per accogliere al meglio i nostri Clienti e aiutarli a sentirsi bene grazie ad un ampio assortimento di prodotti per la salute e la cura della persona. Proponiamo un ampio panel di servizi sia di prima istanza che specializzati di telemedicina e servizi infermieristici.
Il nostro obiettivo è quello di ampliare sempre più la nostra offerta, ascoltando le esigenze dei nostri Clienti, per garantire un'assistenza di qualità e contribuire ad una corretta attività di prevenzione, soprattutto grazie alla dedizione e alla professionalità dei nostri Farmacisti.

Name: Lifeaz
Description:
Depuis 10 ans, notre mission chez Lifeaz est de permettre à tous les citoyens et à toutes les entreprises d’être capables de sauver une vie. Pour cela, nous avons développé Clark, le défibrillateur français pensé pour tous (dispositif médical disposant du marquage CE) 

Notre solution est basée sur 3 piliers pour que vous n’ayez à vous soucier de rien : Clark, un défibrillateur ultra simple à utiliser ; un suivi et une maintenance simplifiés grâce à la connectivité de l'appareil ; la sensibilisation aux gestes qui sauvent accessible à tous.

Chaque année en France, 50 000 personnes meurent d'un arrêt cardiaque et nous sommes tous concerné(e)s. Le taux de survie est de 5% car il faut agir dans les 4 premières minutes alors que les secours mettent 15 minutes pour venir. Il faut agir avant leur arrivée... 80% des arrêts cardiaques ont lieu à domicile ou sur le lieu de travail, et dans 70% des cas, un témoin est présent et peut changer les choses avec un défibrillateur et des gestes simples 

À ce jour, plus de 20 000 familles et entreprises sont équipées de notre défibrillateur et plus de 90 vies ont pu être sauvées, d’une petite fille de 3 ans à une femme de 96 ans. Ce n'est que le tout début... Ensemble, sauvons des milliers de vies 

Pour plus d’informations, abonnez-vous à notre page Lifeaz !

Et si vous souhaitez rejoindre l'équipe, rendez-vous sur : https://www.welcometothejungle.com/fr/companies/lifeaz

Like a doting grandma, CITTA products are designed to nurture your little ones with love and pass on the wisdom of time-tested traditions backed by science.

We also know that parenting is anything but easy! That’s why our products are also designed to offer parents maximum convenience when it comes to their child’s skincare.  

Derived from the Sanskrit word “Chitta,” meaning consciousness, our name CITTA embodies our core philosophy of doing everything consciously — we care for people and the planet. 

Made with ethically sourced and manufactured natural ingredients of the highest quality, our products are cruelty-free and dermatologically tested and approved. We work with doctors to keep out harsh chemicals — all our products have skin-friendly pH and are free of parabens, sulphates, silicones, mineral oils, allergens, and toxins. We believe in transparency — all our ingredients are listed on the product labels so that people can make a conscious choice.

Join us on our mission of creating the safest and most effective natural skincare that offers the best of both worlds — Indian traditions and science. Explore job openings on our page to become a #cittazen today

Laboratoires engagés et responsables, les Laboratoires Sicobel sont spécialisés depuis plus de 60 ans dans la fabrication et la distribution de produits bio et naturels.

Nos marques beauté fabriquées en France
•Placentor Végétal : créée en 1959, Placentor Végétal est la 1ère marque de phytodermalogie appliquée. 
•BcomBio : 1ère marque de dermo-cosmétique certifiée BIO depuis 2003. Des soins-beauté performants et accessibles à tous les consommateurs. 
•BcomBio homme : des cosmétiques pensés pour les Hommes et formulés pour garantir une efficacité et une tolérance optimale.
•Osmaé l’atelier des sens : une marque 100% plaisir aux parfums raffinés, composée de produits naturels ou BIO pour les besoins simples du quotidien.
•Green Tribu : une marque de soins BIO engagée aux compositions ultra clean, conçus pour minimiser leur impact sur l'environnement. 
•Recettes d’antan : des savons authentiques, conçus selon des savoir-faire ancestraux apportant tous leurs bienfaits pour la peau.
•Thalac : Des cosmétiques issus de la thalassothérapie pour les professionnels en Instituts. Un concentré de soins marins !

Mais aussi
•Dolpic : Des soins techniques et innovants pour accompagner tous les sportifs à chaque étape de leur pratique. 
•Solens : Des confiseries gourmandes, saines et authentiques issues du savoir-faire de nos régions françaises. 
 
Les laboratoires Sicobel distribuent également en pharmacies et parapharmacies les marques : Möller’s, Douce Nuit, Gerimax, Nuviline, Aloesol, Papier d’Arménie, Uberti, Bio Since, Acorelle, Marcus Rohrer et Douce nature.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Brasil
Description:
Não nos entregamos a fundo há mais de 70 anos sem uma boa razão... Na Expanscience, somos uma empresa com uma missão social e o nosso fundamento é ajudar cada um a alcançar o seu bem-estar, da infância à terceira idade. É isto que faz avançar, pesquisar e inovar os nossos 1300 colaboradores, todos os dias! Com espírito livre, somos uma empresa francesa 100% familiar, com produtos (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) presentes em mais de 90 países. Para nós é muito claro: O bem-estar das mulheres e dos homens é indissociável da saúde do planeta e está nas mãos de todos nós. Para que os pais não tenham mais que escolher entre um cuidado de qualidade para os seus filhos e uma solução boa para o ambiente que os rodeia e os vê crescer, damos-lhes produtos naturais, eficazes e saudáveis. Para permitir a cada um construir o seu bem-estar com o evoluir dos anos, ajudamo-los a preservar o seu conforto articular, e a sua agilidade física e mental o mais cedo possível.  Desenvolvemos ativos cosméticos e ingredientes sensoriais de origem 100% natural, que contribuem para o bem-estar do corpo e da alma. O nosso impacto positivo na sociedade e no ambiente é reconhecido pela certificação B Corp e, através do nosso programa de RSE « impACT », estamos determinados em tornar-nos uma empresa com impacto positivo e uma visão regeneradora.
A nossa visão destina-se essencialmente às nossas equipas. No dia a dia, isso traduz-se no reforço da QVT e da igualdade profissional, no apoio às vulnerabilidades e na promoção da inclusão dos mais fragéis, na proposição de uma estratégia ambiciosa de talentos e competências, assim como na promoção do equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional e da eficiência coletiva. Isto requer medidas ambiciosas que abordem os principais desafios sociais enfrentados pelas empresas do século XXI. E traz os seus frutos: orgulhamo-nos de ter a certificação « Great Place to Work » em 100% das nossas filiais pelo segundo ano consecutivo!

In Nederland opereren wij onder het merk Beter Horen, met 200 verkoop- en servicelocaties en 700 toegewijde professionals. Wij bieden onze klanten een unieke winkelervaring en begeleiden hen op hun weg naar zelfbeschikking. Name: OPDSure
Description:
OPDSure is a comprehensive healthcare plan that focuses on outpatient department (OPD) expenses, covering doctor fees, pharmacy costs, diagnostic tests, and full-body check-ups ¹.

This plan is designed to help individuals and families manage their OPD expenses, which can account for up to 75% of their lifetime medical costs ¹.

*Key Features:*

- *Age Limit*: The plan is available for adults up to 59 years and children up to 25 years ². Senior Citizen 60+
- *Doctor Consultation*: The plan covers in-clinic doctor consultations with a limit of ₹500 to ₹2,000 per visit.
- *Specialist Coverage*: OPDSure offers coverage for specialist consultations anytime anywhere, 24/7 access to any clinic & hospitals, including allopathy, homeopathy, ayurveda, and unani.
- *Online Specialist Coverage*: The plan provides FREE unlimited online specialist consultations with over 30 specialist doctors.
- *Pharmacy Bills*: OPDSure covers 50%* of prescribed pharmacy bills, from ₹250 to ₹1,000/- per doctor visit.
- *Diagnostic Tests*: The plan covers 50% of prescribed diagnostic tests, from ₹250 to ₹1,000/- per doctor visits.
- *Preventive Health Checkups*: OPDSure offers complimentary preventive health checkups for all members including vitamin checks in our top subscriptions plan. 

*Benefits:*

- Affordable outpatient healthcare coverage for employees and families.
- Focus on preventive care to reduce medical costs in the long run.
- Convenient scheduling and access to premium doctor consultations.

Overall, OPDSure seems to be a comprehensive and convenient healthcare plan that prioritizes outpatient care and preventive measures.

Vegetable oils are real treasures in their natural and pure form. They possess incredible active ingredients and are natural and powerful alternatives to chemicals. It's best to take care of yourself, your beauty and your health with oils extracted from oleaginous seeds rather than petrochemicals. Why spread oil on your face when nature has so much to offer?

Dr Madusha Peiris and Dr Ruby Aktar have validated and developed the technology with the aim of helping people live healthier lives by giving them back control of their appetite.

Dr Peiris has over 15 years of research experience and is a world-leading scientist in the field of gut-brain connection. She has authored scientific articles, speaks at international conferences and now leads Elcella as CEO.

Siamo orgogliosi di fornire non solo prodotti di alta qualità, ma anche di promuovere l’autostima e la bellezza di ognuno, indipendentemente dal genere, dall’età o dall’etnia.La nostra missione è rendere la bellezza accessibile a tutti, celebrando la diversità e l’unicità di ogni individuo. Con la nostra linea di cosmetici, vogliamo ispirare la creatività e la fiducia in sé stessi di ogni persona, aiutandola a esprimere la propria personalità attraverso il trucco in modo autentico e senza limiti.Siamo qui per accompagnarti in un viaggio di scoperta e di esplorazione della tua bellezza interiore ed esteriore.

Name: Solutions Group srls
Description:
Mi chiamo Kessy Alberico, ho 21 anni, e vengo da Ostia in provincia di Roma.

Era il primo Agosto 2016, avevo 18 anni appena compiuti, tornavo a casa dalla sala in cui insegnavo danza, quando mi arrivò una proposta di lavoro per un call-center, ovviamente mi precipitai a fare un colloquio perchè ne avevo bisogno, quindi senza nemmeno informarmi di chi fossero mi presentai il giorno dopo della richiesta. Li ho conosciuto Simone De Gasperis, colui che doveva essere il mio capo. Colloquio andato a buon fine, non persi tempo ed il giorno dopo iniziai subito a lavorare, andava bene, quando dopo una settimana Simone mi propose questo business, ero ignorante nel campo imprenditoriale, mi misi in gioco. Iniziai come tutti da consulente, non avevo un proprio mezzo di trasporto perchè non potevo permettermelo, quindi lavoravo tutti i giorni, mezza giornata qui e l’altra ad insegnare danza, con i mezzi pubblici a Roma, era stressante, stancante, ma continuai, volevo dare una svolta alla mia vita!

Ero così talmente determinata che dopo circa un mese e mezzo arrivai al primo obiettivo dell’azienda, diventare concessionaria, ed avere così la possibilità di crearmi una propria realtà. Mi sentivo felice, soddisfatta e finalmente riuscivo a dare un aiuto economico ai miei genitori. Così un giorno Simone mi propose di andare ad aprire un ufficio con lui a Torino, una regione vergine per la nostra azienda, sposai subito il suo progetto. Avevo paura, emozione, tante domande, ma mi fidai, quindi il 23 Gennaio del 2017 aprimmo finalmente l’ufficio, dopo solo un mese riuscimmo a far entrare nell’opportunità 40 persone, si stava avverando il nostro sogno, iniziò così la scalata di tanti obiettivi raggiunti.

A distanza di un anno e mezzo decisi di aprire la mia realtà scegliendo la città di Novara. Dopo solo 5 mesi dall’apertura io e la mia classe manageriale creammo un fantastico team di 30 persone.

Name: Three Pears Ltd
Description:
Established in 1973 by Ted Dunn, Three Pears Ltd has remained a stalwart in the industry, specialising in the distribution of toiletries, household goods, and fragrances. Ted Dunn’s keen business acumen and commitment to quality laid the foundation for what would become a thriving enterprise.

In 1992, the reins of the company were handed over to his son, Ed Dunn, who brought fresh energy and innovative ideas to the table. Ed’s leadership not only steered the company through evolving market landscapes but also infused it with a renewed sense of purpose and direction.

Beyond his business acumen, Ed Dunn is renowned for his passion for rugby, having been a former player himself. This passion transcended personal interests as Three Pears Wholesalers proudly sponsored the Worcester Warriors in 2005, cementing their commitment to community engagement and support.
Building on their solid foundation and rich legacy, Three Pears Wholesalers has soared to new heights, expanding their reach to international customers. The company’s recent relocation of its headquarters to a larger office in Halesowen at the beginning of 2024 underscores its commitment to growth and innovation.

Furthermore, Three Pears Wholesalers has augmented their operations by increasing the size of their warehouse, ensuring efficiency and reliability in meeting the demands of their expanding clientele. This strategic move not only enhances their capacity but also underscores their dedication to providing unparalleled service and satisfaction.

With a blend of tradition, innovation, and a relentless pursuit of excellence, Three Pears continues to carve a formidable presence in the FMCG retail industry, setting the standard for quality and reliability. As they embrace new horizons and opportunities, their unwavering commitment to their customers remains steadfast, ensuring a future as promising as their storied past.

A história da RVD Saúde começou em 2020, com a venda de materiais essenciais para o setor da saúde durante o combate à pandemia da Covid-19. Em pouco tempo, a empresa expandiu sua atuação para atender, de forma mais completa, redes hospitalares, laboratoriais e farmacêuticas.

Em 2021, a empresa abraçou também outro setor importante da saúde, a Odontologia, e montou equipe especializada e experiente, para atender às necessidades desses clientes com eficiência e agilidade.

Hoje, a empresa possui portifólio com mais de 11 mil produtos odontológicos das melhores marcas, e atende de forma personalizada as redes hospitalares, farmacêuticas e laboratoriais.

De mãos dadas com o seu sucesso
A trajetória da RVD Saúde está sendo construída de mãos dadas com profissionais e fornecedores que trazem experiências e valores compatíveis com a nossa visão do negócio.
Isso é essencial para oferecer ao cliente e aos parceiros uma experiência única em suas compras, fundamentada em uma relação de confiança.

Nossos pilares de sustentação:
- Propósito de conectar produtos e pessoas, com dinamismo e responsabilidade;
- Força para sair do lugar comum, com autenticidade;
- Coragem que impulsiona o presente, na vibração de um futuro brilhante.

Os colaboradores, parceiros, fornecedores e clientes são a inspiração para a empresa crescer todos os dias, e fazem parte dessa história, para sempre.

We call our “secret sauce” CUTANACAE(TM)- a cutaneous panacea.

This blend of whole plant phytochemicals (terpenes, flavonoids and cannabinoids) will compliment our two product labels: EMERALD WC our OTC grade, non-Canna SKU and EMERALD WC+ a Canna-based CBG-CBD-CBC, pharma grade SKU.

We are selling the benefits of medicinal hemp derived ENTOURAGE effect while reducing skin risk across several customer segments where friction, moisture and fungal elements collide.

Our portfolio of topical IP and products consist of a moisture barrier cream, acute skin injury spray and skin recovery serum, dermal ulcer matrix, after-sun serum, vaginal suppositories, sexual lubricants. We are attempting to reformulate a petroleum based elastomer garment used for leg swelling.  

All products will be prosecuted by the US Patent & Trademark Office and several will be submitted for prosecution with the FDA linking to the following medical claims: anti-inflammation, anti-sepsis and analgesia (i.e. pain).

Name: Redepharma
Description:
Somos a Redepharma. Uma rede de farmácias que acredita no potencial do nosso povo.

Vivemos a era da tecnologia e da interação. Tudo é rápido, prático e dinâmico. Continuar vivo no mercado significa trazer toda essa inovação para o centro do negócio. É claro que a maior rede de farmácias da Paraíba, já entendeu o quão importante é manter-se atualizada e com foco no que há de novo. Mas, na Redepharma, há uma pitada diferente nessa receita. Um detalhe que se ouve muito em congressos de negócios e fóruns de tecnologia, mas que a empresa traz em sua essência desde sempre: a humanização. Esse é o grande desafio dos novos tempos: ser digital, mas sem perder a essência. Estar atento ao que se fala nas redes sociais, mas não esquecer o olho no olho, o sorriso que conforta e a atenção que faz a diferença para quem nos procura. Basta visitar as lojas da rede para perceber essa relação. Lojas com conceito diferenciado, que oferecem muito mais do que um amplo mix de produtos. São ambientes que proporcionam uma experiência única. Do atendimento no balcão ao drive-thru, dos serviços oferecidos pelas unidades do programa de atenção farmacêutica – Pharmaclínica à interação nas redes sociais, do serviço de entregas à ponta de gôndola digital. Experiências que giram sempre em torno do bem-estar dos nossos clientes. Mais de 5 milhões de paraibanos que encontram na Redepharma um espaço com a sua cara. São 50 lojas espalhadas do litoral ao sertão da Paraíba.
Nós temos compromissos que vão muito além das metas e dos números que movimentam o mercado. Nosso foco é na nossa gente. O que nós queremos é que, cada uma dessas pessoas que procura nossas lojas, tenha sempre a melhor experiência. É justamente esse compromisso que coloca a Redepharma em destaque no segmento.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Türkiye
Description:
İyi bir nedenimiz olmasa 70 yılı aşkın süredir her şeyimizi vermezdik... Expanscience'da, misyon sahibi bir şirketiz ve varoluş amacımız, çocukluktan ileri yaşa kadar herkesin sağlığını şekillendirmesine yardımcı oluyoruz. 1.300 çalışanımızın her gün araştırma ve yenilik yapmasını, ilerlemesini sağlayan şey budur! Özünde bağımsız, ürünleri (Mustela, Piasclédine 300, vb.) 90’dan fazla ülkede bulunan %100 Fransız aile şirketiyiz. Bizce şu çok açık: kadın, erkek, herkesin sağlığı gezegenin sağlığından ayrılamaz ve bu bizim, hepimizin sorumluluğundadır. Ebeveynlerin çocukları için kaliteli bakım ile çocuklarının içinde büyüdüğü dünya için iyi olan bir çözüm arasında seçim yapmak zorunda kalmamaları için onlara doğal, etkili ve sağlıklı ürünler sunuyoruz. İnsanların yaş aldıkça iyi hissedebilmeleri için, eklem konforlarını ve fiziksel ile zihinsel çevikliklerini mümkün olan en erken dönemde korumalarına yardımcı oluyoruz. Vücudun ve zihnin sağlığına katkıda bulunan %100 doğal kökenli kozmetik aktif maddeler ve duyumsal bileşenler geliştiriyoruz.
Toplum ve çevre üzerindeki olumlu etkimiz B Corp sertifikası ile belgelendirilmiştir, şirket olarak “impACT” RSE programımızla olumlu ve yenileyici bir etki için çalışacağımızı taahhüt ediyoruz. 

Misyonumuz her şeyden önce kendi ekiplerimiz için geçerlidir. Günlük yaşamda bu, Çalışanların Yaşam Kalitesini (QVT) ve mesleki eşitliği güçlendirmeyi, hassasiyetleri desteklemeyi ve en savunmasız grupların dahil edilmesini teşvik etmeyi, iddialı bir yetenek ve beceri stratejisi sunmayı ve iş-yaşam dengesi ile toplu verimliliği desteklemeyi içermektedir. Bu, 21. yüzyıl şirketlerinin karşılaştığı büyük toplumsal zorluklara yönelik cesur adımlarla gerçekleşmektedir. Bu çabalar da karşılığını vermektedir: 2. yıl art arda, tüm bağlı kuruluşlarımızda “Great Place to Work” (Çalışmak İçin Harika Bir Yer) sertifikasına sahip olmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz!

Há quatro décadas, nossos produtos atuam em consultórios, clínicas e hospitais, sempre comprometidos em proporcionar experiências humanas que conectam médicos, pacientes e todos os envolvidos nesse ecossistema – incluindo pets e veterinários.

Inovar, para nós, é aprender com acertos e erros, apertos de mão e novas ideias, unindo o clássico e o digital para aproximar as pessoas com soluções que diminuem distâncias, promovem o cuidado e conectam vidas.

Name: Ouate
Description:
« Enfant déjà, ma mère m’initiait aux secrets des soins pour une peau saine, nettoyée, nourrie et protégée. Devenue maman à mon tour, je me suis demandée comment protéger la peau des enfants aujourd’hui, dans un environnement devenu agressif et pollué ? Plusieurs dermatologues et pharmaciens m’ont appris que, entre 4 et 11 ans, la peau est particulièrement vulnérable car elle est encore en développement. Confrontée au refus de mes enfants de continuer à utiliser des produits pour bébés qui ne leur correspondaient plus, j’hésitais à leur appliquer les formules pour adolescents, ou pire encore, celles pour adultes, trop concentrées.
Pour me convaincre, les produits que je recherchais devaient avoir des formules naturelles, hypoallergéniques et testées dermatologiquement, en un mot, rassurantes. Ils devaient surtout plaire à mes enfants, toujours en recherche d’expériences ludiques, et avoir une ergonomie d’usage adaptée à leurs différents âges. Enfin, ils devaient obtenir la caution du corps médical. Bizarrement, aucun produit sur le marché ne semblait correspondre à mes attentes. J’ai finalement décidé de réunir autour de moi une équipe de spécialistes pour mettre au point ce que je considère comme la seule gamme de produits de soins spécifiquement conçue pour les enfants de 4 à 11 ans.
C’est ainsi qu’est née OUATE. »


Astrid Mauduit, Fondatrice de OUATE

ETHOS

We equally value the ingredients, maker and you. Each Purearth creation you buy makes you a co creator, supporting fair trade, income generation for grassroots producers and marginalized women, and reducing gender bias. Born from a desire to reconnect with the Earth, we seek to foster a culture of conscious consumption,  working with micro credit women self-help groups in the soaring altitudes of the pristine Himalayas, reducing societal inequities and gender inequality. 

Established as a Section 8A tax exempt charitable company in Pune, India, the Pure Purpose Foundation is an affiliate of Purearth that works on social impact initiatives. Our environmental initiatives support biodynamic and organic farming methods, carbon offsets through reforestation projects, sanitation, eco toilets and women’s health and wellness programs by partnering with NGOs, CBOs, women micro-credit and self-help groups in the remotest villages of the Himalayas.

ORIGINS & CURATION

Hand harvested from Himalayan glacier-fed terrains and mineral rich uncontaminated forest soil, the artisanal element is intentional and powerful. We travel far to forage, gathering only the purest nutrient rich botanicals and flower essences. Natural rhythm and ritual inform how we create our line. Organic, vedic, bio dynamic farming; respecting seasonality and the sacred ceremony of harvesting in cadence with nature’s rhythms.

BOTTLING CARE & CRAFT

We believe in micro-batches, hand blended and filled at our studio so that a little bit of love spills into every apothecary jar. Our French violetglass is refined to only allow the violet rays that preserve the bio-active energy of our precious ingredients.
