Name: Cowboy Colostrum
Description:
In a world where health is the highest form of currency, investing in your well-being is non-negotiable. Meet Cowboy Colostrum: your ultimate source of grass-fed, pasture-raised bovine colostrum. Experience the extraordinary benefits of this golden elixir, meticulously crafted to honor our ancestral roots and guide you towards a life lived in harmony with nature.

Colostrum, the dairy superfood produced by all mammals within the first 48-72 hours after giving birth, has gained a reputation as nature's precious gift. Often called "liquid gold," it holds immense value due to its unparalleled health benefits. This remarkable substance serves as the initial nourishment for infants, providing them with a powerhouse of essential nutrients crucial for their growth and overall well-being. For millions of years, colostrum has played a vital role in safeguarding and strengthening the delicate mucosal barriers of newborns until their own defense systems mature.

Name: Reliable Respiratory
Description:
Who We Are 

Competency and compassion are our priorities. Not only do we offer top-of-the-line airway management devices and replacement parts, our highly trained and competent staff connects with our customers through professional, attentive service. And, we make it our business to reach out to the health care professionals who care for them, too, ensuring that communication about patient needs and education about our products provide a total package of relief for our customers. This commitment truly sets us apart.

What We Do

At Reliable Respiratory we offer several types of breathing supplies.

Many of our customers have sleep apnea. We help ensure they receive the best and most appropriate breathing devices for safe sleep through the night. But we know it’s also important to learn how to correctly use the CPAP device. That’s why we teach each sleep apnea patient how to use his or hers by sending trained medical staff directly to the patient’s home. Replacement products like masks are very important so that patients can receive full benefit from the machines. We make sure our customers get the right fit for the most relief their CPAP device can offer. 

There are a number of excellent devices on the market now that really help people with respiratory conditions to breathe better. We carry the best and most current options in these airway management products.

Millions search for symptoms every day. We turn that intent into action: instant guidance in-app, then clinical triage, e-prescribing, and reimbursed Remote Patient Monitoring when indicated—typically within 24 hours.

Why it matters
The status quo is slow, expensive, and disconnected. By meeting people at the moment of intent and guiding them into compliant clinical workflows, we expand access while reducing friction for patients, clinicians, and partners.

What we do
• AI triage & guidance: clear next steps within seconds.
• Same-day care: licensed clinicians for evaluation and eRx.
• Ongoing monitoring: RPM/CCM/RTM programs with proactive outreach.
• Care orchestration: HIPAA-compliant infrastructure, BAAs, and integrations.

Built for trust
HIPAA-compliant on Azure, eRx support, payer-aligned programs, and human-in-the-loop quality assurance.

Who we work with
• Consumers looking for fast, affordable answers and treatment.
• Clinics & health systems extending virtual capacity and monitoring.
• Employers seeking scalable, measurable care benefits.
• Creators & affiliates educating audiences and routing them to care.

Vision
From the first question to lasting outcomes—DirectCareAI connects people to treatment and monitoring with speed, safety, and empathy.

Specialties: Virtual Care, Remote Patient Monitoring, AI Triage, eRx, Patient Engagement, Care Coordination, Health Data Integrations

Name: P.Happi

P.Happi is a UK-based women’s health startup redefining intimate care through microbiome science. Our daily serum features B.Y.M. 1405 Bdellovibrio — a breakthrough natural bacterium proven to target and break down >99% of harmful gram-negative bacteria (such as E. coli) while preserving beneficial lactobacilli of the female intimate flora.

Unlike probiotics, Bdellovibrio works topically to help the intimate area stay balanced, moisturised, and protected — especially during common trigger moments such as hormonal changes, antibiotics, sex, and high stress.

Since launching in 2024, P.Happi has supported thousands of women across the UK, and is trusted by clinicians across multiple specialties — including menopause specialists, vulval dermatologists, pelvic health physiotherapists, urologists, urogynecologists, gynaecologists, sexual health clinicians, and OB-GYNs.

We exist to improve the standard of care for women — through innovation, education, and science that puts women's everyday wellbeing first.

Available at p.happi.com, Boots, Amazon and selected clinical partners. Get in touch if you want to find out more.

Name: VILASA World
Description:
We are proud to be the largest spa network in India with over 80+ spas across the country. Our Tattva Spa’s have been nourishing lives since we first opened a quaint Spa in the rolling Himalayan hills of Manali in 2013. Since then, we have made it our mission for wellbeing to be considered a priority rather than a treat.

We bring to you VILASA, mindfully & lovingly crafted skin care, personal care and hair care products for men & women. VILASA champions a long-awaited and much needed reconnection to self; an antidote to the fast-paced world of the beauty industry.

It all started when we realized that we were not the only ones disappointed with the promise of miracles and quick fixes from our skincare products. Products that never seemed to last beyond the initial 5-minute chemical based dewy skin after application. We seemed always to be chasing our next spa day to feel a true sense of stress-free wellbeing. Chasing an inherent slow-paced improvement in our skin because we were unable to achieve that glow from within at home.

Thus, we started emulating that feeling with just a few simple ingredients and a vision for a brand that focused on “long-term beauty” and an elevated experience. From there, we grew from moisturizers to candles, from oils to roll-ons therapies, from face cleaners to experiental bathing scrubs, and a growing range of beauty, self care & wellness products. We have now created a steadily growing community of individuals that connect on more than just this way of life. A community that connects on the belief of the perfection of imperfections, and cherishes the beauty that stems from deep within.

Vilasa is not simply a spa skin care brand.

Vilasa is a lifestyle choice.

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Italia
Description:
Non diamo il massimo da oltre 70 anni senza un buon motivo. Noi di Expanscience siamo una “Société à mission” e la nostra ragion d’essere è di aiutare ogni persona a plasmare il proprio benessere, dall’infanzia alla terza età. È questo che fa avanzare, ricercare e innovare i nostri 1.000 collaboratori, ogni giorno! Indipendenti nell’animo, siamo un’azienda francese, al 100% familiare, con prodotti (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) presenti in oltre 90 paesi. Per noi è chiaro: il benessere delle donne e degli uomini è indissociabile dalla salute del pianeta ed è nelle nostre mani, nelle mani di tutti noi. Perché i genitori non debbano più dover scegliere per i loro bambini tra un trattamento di qualità e una soluzione buona per il mondo nel quale crescono, offriamo loro prodotti naturali, efficaci e sani. Per permettere a tutti di invecchiare bene, aiutiamo le persone a preservare il prima possibile il loro comfort articolare, la loro agilità fisica e mentale. Mettiamo a punto principi attivi cosmetici e ingredienti sensoriali al 100% di origine naturale che contribuiscono al benessere del corpo e della mente. Il nostro impatto positivo sulla società e sull'ambiente è riconosciuto dalla certificazione B Corp e, attraverso il nostro programma RSI "impACT", ci impegniamo a diventare un'azienda a impatto positivo e rigenerativa. 
La nostra missione vale in primo luogo per i nostri team. Ciò si traduce nel rafforzare la qualità della vita nel posto di lavoro e l’eguaglianza professionale, accompagnare le vulnerabilità e favorire l’inclusione dei più fragili, proporre una strategia talenti e competenze ambiziosa e favorire l’equilibrio tra vita personale ed efficacia collettiva. Ciò passa per misure ambiziose che affrontano le grandi sfide sociali delle aziende del XXI secolo. E ciò porta dei frutti: siamo orgogliosi di essere certificati "Great Place to Work" nel 100% delle nostre filiali per il 2° anno consecutivo!

Name: Grupo Petra
Description:
O Grupo Petra surgiu em 1980, iniciando sua trajetória na cidade de São Paulo através de uma promissora e longeva parceria com a marca O Boticário.

Hoje essa parceria se estende não só à Capital, mas também à cidade de Guarulhos e cresceu ainda mais com a expansão do Grupo Boticário, nos permitindo a atuação em outras marcas como Quem Disse, Berenice?, Eudora e O.U.i e Au.migos.  Atualmente, somos um grupo de franquias que opera estas marcas nos canais de lojas e venda direta com: 35 lojas O Boticário, 2 lojas Quem disse, Berenice? e 5 centrais multimarcas de venda direta. 

O Grupo Petra acredita que as pessoas são o centro de tudo. É na proximidade e na transparência que encontramos o poder de fortalecer relacionamentos que perduram e criam a cultura que buscamos com pessoas íntegras, comprometidas, fazendo o certo, da maneira certa.

Nos atualizamos e buscamos estar sempre entre os melhores. Para isso promovemos o compartilhamento de experiências e valorizamos a diversidade de pensamentos. Desta forma que perseguimos os nossos objetivos com foco, planejamos e executamos nossos planos e desenvolvemos nossas pessoas e nossa empresa.

Assim, o Grupo Petra não é apenas um nome; é a promessa de uma marca, onde respeito, responsabilidade, resultados crescentes e atualização constante são os comportamentos 
interdependentes e que nos sustentam. Isso não é apenas o que fazemos; é quem somos, e o que está escrito pedra fundamental da nossa empresa.

No Grupo Petra, construímos relações fortes e duradouras para que todos prosperem.

GEUT BY DR. T dilahirkan sebagai hasil dari idealisme dan profesionalisme dari dr. Teuku Adifitrian Sp.BP-RE (Tompi) yang telah berkecimpung selama 10 tahun sebagai dokter spesialis bedah rekonstruksi dan estetik, bersama sang istri yang merupakan seorang dokter spesialis gizi terkemuka dr. Arti Indira M.Gizi, Sp.GK, FINEM.

Terinspirasi dari gabungan bahasa Aceh ‘Get’ dan bahasa Inggris ‘Good’, nama GEUT (baca: gyut) merefleksikan harapan dari kedua penggagasnya untuk senantiasa mempersembahkan manfaat yang baik atau bagus sesuai dengan definisinya.

Memulai debutnya dengan meluncurkan serial produk perdana “Antioksidan Series”, GEUT BY DR. T memperkenalkan 5 jenis produk andalan yang dipercaya dapat menjadi jawaban untuk kebutuhan masyarakat Indonesia akan sebuah produk perawatan kulit yang dapat dipercaya, kaya manfaat, terjamin keamanan pemakaiannya dan tentu saja dengan harga yang dapat dijangkau oleh kebanyakan masyarakat Indonesia.
Seperti yang dikatakan oleh dr. Teuku Adifitrian Sp.SB-RE (Tompi), “Bertemu dengan begitu banyak pasien yang telah dianggap sebagai teman, sahabat dan saudara selama beberapa tahun belakangan ini, menyadarkan saya bahwa kebutuhan akan produk perawatan kulit yang mudah dijangkau oleh masyarakat dan dapat dipercaya mutu, keamanan serta kenyamanan penggunaannya sangat penting. Hal ini menguatkan saya dan istri untuk dapat menyalurkan amanat kami melalui beragam rangkaian produk yang telah dan akan diluncurkan oleh GEUT BY DR. T. Diharapkan kehadiran produk ini akan ikut menyemarakkan ramainya produk perawatan kulit yang telah hadir di Indonesia selama ini dan dapat memberikan kesan dan nilai tersendiri di hati masyarakat.”
Hal tersebut diperkuat dengan pernyataan dari dr. Arti Indira M.Gizi, Sp.GK, FINEM, “Kulit sehat merupakan perpaduan dari perawatan yang mumpuni dan konsumsi nutrisi yang seimbang. produk yang layak untuk dipersembahkan ke masyarakat dan menjadi jawaban dari kebutuhan akan kulit yang indah, sehat dan seimbang

Description:
Flora & Curl is a plant-powered haircare range with a mission to simplify the textured haircare routine.

We believe that taking care of textured haircare should be simple, effective and enjoyable.

Compared to the norm, our products are free from synthetic fragrances. We take a wellness approach to haircare, with formulations that are scented purely by plants.

How it started: Flora & Curl was launched in 2017 by Rose Ovensehi, after her experience with extremely brittle and dry hair. 
After a long break from using chemical relaxers to straighten her hair, she began mixing in her kitchen using pure and raw botanical ingredients, from oils to butters and botanical waters with the goal of keeping her routine quick and simple. 

While developing the formulae, she realised that she didn’t want to create a range that would that would require too many steps to achieve her desired results. 
The functionality of our core collections, ‘Style Me’, ‘Hydrate Me’, 'Strengthen Me', ‘Soothe Me’ and ‘Protect Me’ makes it easier for customers to understand the function and purpose of each product within their routine. Our line of products are ideal for those looking to start their natural hair routine, or those who are experienced and looking to streamline their current hair routine.

Through a minimalist approach, Flora & Curl’s line of products turns haircare into selfcare, by making taking care of textured hair (curls, coils and wave) simpler.

Name: CBDfx
Description:
CBDfx is a U.S. based company founded on providing high-quality cannabidiol (CBD) wellness products, made with the highest quality hemp, to customers in a wide variety of formats; from tinctures and topicals to gummies and capsules. Founded in 2014 with a mission to push quality to the forefront of the CBD industry, CBDfx provides some of the finest, purest, and most trusted CBD products in the world. CBDfx products are sold in more than 25,000 points of distribution in 21 countries, and online at CBDfx.com.

Mission:

CBDfx's mission is to deliver the finest, purest, and most effective CBD products on the planet. They aim to cater to both new and experienced users, providing them with a truly exceptional CBD experience.

Product Safety:

CBDfx prioritizes safety with every product they sell. These products are exclusively produced in Current Good Manufacturing Practice (CGMP) facilities under the strictest clinical-grade standards and supervision in the industry. In the spirit of transparency, CBDfx provides in-depth lab reports from independent, third-party laboratories. This Certificate of Analysis allows customers to shop with peace of mind, knowing that they are purchasing the highest-quality CBD products anywhere. Just look for the traceable QR code found on every CBDfx product, which allows every customer to see where, when, and how their products were produced before putting it on or into their bodies.

Extraction Process:

CBDfx uses a supercritical carbon dioxide (CO2) extraction process to extract CBD from hemp. This method is considered cleaner compared to solvent-based extraction, as it doesn't leave any chemical residue behind. However, it may result in a product with fewer aromatic terpenes, which are a natural component of hemp.

Reputation:

Since 2014, over 450,000 customers have trusted their wellness to CBDfx. They have gained a reputation for providing high-quality CBD products, with over 20,000 5-star reviews.

Skin Virtue stands as a guiding light in this domain, committed to creating premium multi-tasking formulations that not only provide relief for sensitive skin but also adeptly target the challenges posed by ageing skin, formulated to restore and rejuvenate.

We manufacture cosmeceutical, anti-allergen, problem-prone, and anti-ageing skincare products that focus on clinical results and safety for both the consumer and the environment.

Supporting the skin's basic functionality and providing essential building blocks for healthy skin with a proprietary blend of skin-identical active biotechnological ingredients, plant-derived molecules, marine enzymes, stem cells, vitamins, and gentle skin-identical emulsifiers. Leveraging multifunctional active ingredients and formulating smarter ingredient synergies to provide perfect skin affinity for optimal skin restoration and protection.

Our powerful formulations are designed to work in synergy with the skin to trigger intercellular matrix molecules which activate skin regeneration and repair.

By utilising active liposome and ionosome delivery systems, composed of naturally derived phospholipids, which are the same material as a cell membrane, we are able to enhance the efficacy and administration of active ingredients.

Formulated to be gentle, non-comedogenic, and anti-irritating without nasties because we care.

This professional range is available to skincare clinicians with some selected products available for pre and post-treatment home care use.

Our technology platform can be extensively utilised for oral delivery of herbal, nutraceutical actives and food supplements.

Name: Capello Point
Description:
Capello Point è la prima catena italiana di prodotti professionali per capelli ed estetica. 
 
Oggi Capello Point conta più di 70 punti vendita Diretti e in Franchising situati nei più importanti centri commerciali e nelle principali città italiane. I negozi Capello Point sono il punto di riferimento per chi cerca prodotti e servizi di alta qualità, grazie ad un assortimento sempre in linea con le ultime tendenze di mercato in grado di soddisfare le richieste più specifiche.
  
Capello Point nasce a Milano, più di 20 anni fa, con una Mission ben chiara: offrire al consumatore finale e ai professionisti del settore strumenti e trattamenti professionali grazie ai quali ottenere direttamente a casa gli stessi risultati ottenuti in salone o nel centro estetico.
 
Capello Point è anche E-Commerce con uno store perfettamente integrato con il gestionale in Store. Tramite Amazon i prodotti Capello Point sono distribuiti anche in Francia, UK, Spagna e Germania.
 
Nel 2021 Capello Point lancia il suo Network di Incaricati alla vendita con un set di prodotti unici in questo specifico canale di vendita. 
La vendita tramite Network sfrutta la piattaforma e-commerce, dando la possibilità di gestire le vendite nel modo più tradizionale dei “Party” face to face o tramite Referral Link.
 
I Consulenti di Bellezza Capello Point, sia Network che in Store,   offrono alla clientela un rapporto unico e personalizzato, fatto di dialogo e ascolto, consiglio e spiegazione per capire e scegliere i prodotti giusti che donino i risultati attesi.
La selezione di professionisti e professioniste attente e appassionate è la base del successo di questa filosofia, assieme alla formazione continua tramite e-learning o sessioni di training.
 
Presenza sul territorio Omnicanale, consulenza, velocità, innovazione e tecnologia sono alla base del successo di Capello Point e il punto di partenza imprescindibile per la crescita ed espansione futura.

 Recognitions We’re Proud Of:
	•	Forbes India DGEMS 2024: Selected as a Select 200 Company for global business potential.
	•	BW Retail Reboot Awards 2024: Honored as D2C Company of the Year and Mom and Child Care Brand of the Year.
	•	e4m D2C Awards 3.0: Awarded Best D2C Gamechanger Brand in Childcare - Silver.
	•	Cosmetics Ingredients Expo: Winner of the Innovation Award in the Finished Products Segment - Silver.

 Our Mission:
To redefine personal care for kids and teens by creating safe, effective, and sustainable solutions that nurture their health and celebrate their individuality. Trusted by thousands of parents across India, we’re committed to transparency, trust, and ethical practices for a healthier tomorrow.

Join us as we redefine eyewear, making it a part of your style, your confidence, and your everyday life. Eyeiz is where fashion meets function – because the way you see matters, and how you’re seen matters even more.

See the world through Eyeiz

Name: Quix Labs
Description:
Quix Labs was founded to rethink how adult smokers approach change. For many, patches, gums, and lozenges don’t address the full experience of smoking—and that’s where we come in.

Our flagship product, Quixotic, is a reusable smoking alternative designed for adult users who want a structured, familiar, and flexible option. Unlike traditional products, Quixotic maintains the hand-to-mouth ritual many smokers rely on, while offering a tapered nicotine pod system with four clearly labeled strengths—including zero.

Pharmacists across the UK are increasingly turning to Quixotic as a preferred recommendation when standard products haven’t worked. With no buttons, no refilling, and no complex setup, it’s simple to use and easy to understand—making it ideal for those seeking a more manageable switch.

Available exclusively through pharmacies and the Quix Labs website, Quixotic is designed to support a shift in habits, not replace them with new ones. And with Quitters Club, our partnered digital community platform, users can access helpful resources and peer support along the way.

Now available throughout the UK and launching soon in Ireland and the EU, Quix Labs is proud to offer a structured, responsible alternative built for real-world use—wherever you are in your journey.

Name: Myrea Low Fodmap
Description:
Linea di Alimenti fermentati (tecnologia brevettata) clean label ed officinali low Fodmap.
La sindrome dell'intestino irritabile (IBS, Irritable Bowel syndrome) è tra i più comuni disordini gastrointestinali ed è caratterizzata da una combinazione di sintomi cronici o ricorrenti non spiegabili con cause organiche.
La prevalenza nel mondo va dal 5% sino al 30% della popolazione. 
In Italia la sindrome colpisce circa il 10% della popolazione.
I prodotti della linea Myrea sono alimenti tipici della gastronomia italiana con gusto e profilo nutrizionale in linea con i prodotti tradizionali, realizzati con una formulazione proprietaria che mira ad ottenere prodotti definiti “clean label”. Sono state impiegate tecnologie alimentari che prevedono l’utilizzo di un fermento appositamente brevettato.
PUNTI DI FORZA : 
- Basso contenuto di FODMAP (Low FODMAP)
- Fonte di fibre
- Senza lattosio (quindi utilizzabili anche da chi ne è intollerante)
- Ad alta digeribilità (quindi utilizzabili anche da chi non soffre di IBS)
- A ridotto contenuto di Nichel (poco tollerato da chi soffre di IBS) 
- Basati su un fermento appositamente brevettato (ingrediente distintivo)
- ottimi dal punto di vista sensoraile
- privi di additivi
- con ingredienti da agricoltura biologica non convenzionali

La Linea Myrea si divide in due famiglie di prodotti:

Linea Low FODMAP Food: prodotti da forno dolci e salati, pasta con glutine, snack e conserve vegetali.

Linea Supplement Low FODMAP erbs: integratori alimentari, tè e tisane.

I prodotti Myrea sono frutto di studi approfonditi sulle materie prime, sulle formulazioni e sulle modalità di produzione.
Tutti i prodotti sono stati testati in laboratorio in collaborazione con il Dipartimento di Chimica dell'Università degli Studi di Parma.

Name: Genericart Medicine
Description:
At Genericart Medicine Pvt. Ltd., our mission is simple yet powerful: to make high-quality healthcare affordable and accessible for everyone. Established in 2014, we have rapidly grown to become India’s leading generic medicine franchise network, with over 1,800 franchises across 14 states. Our journey began with a single medical shop and a bold vision to revolutionise the pharmaceutical industry by providing cost-effective alternatives to expensive branded medicines.

We are proud to serve over 8.5 million satisfied customers every month, offering them high-quality generic medicines at an incredible 70% discount. Over the past nine years, we have collectively saved our customers more than ₹750 crore, making a significant impact on their lives and well-being.

Our commitment to quality is unwavering. We are the only organisation in our sector that provides a quality control certificate for every product and batch, ensuring that every medicine we offer meets the highest standards of safety and efficacy. With a portfolio of over 27,000 products, we cater to a wide range of healthcare needs, from chronic conditions to everyday health.

Innovation is at the heart of what we do. From developing proprietary software systems to streamline our operations to expanding our reach through both online and offline platforms, we continuously strive to enhance our services and deliver value to our customers. Our business model has not only made healthcare more accessible but also created over 10,000 jobs across the country, contributing to economic growth and community development.

Looking ahead, we are on a mission to expand our footprint even further, with plans to open more than 25,000 franchises across India. As we grow, our focus remains on maintaining the highest standards of quality, driving innovation, and staying true to our core mission of making healthcare affordable for all.

Name: Farmacia S.Agata
Description:
La Farmacia S.Agata nasce a Bulgarograsso (CO) nel 1991, quando la Dott.ssa Lucina Misenta diventa titolare della sede farmaceutica. 
Guidata da un'immensa passione per il suo lavoro e grazie all'insostituibile aiuto dei suoi collaboratori, inizia così un percorso di crescita continua volta alla ricerca di un servizio sempre migliore da offrire ai propri clienti-pazienti. 
A partire dal 2017, amplia la sua presenza sul territorio con la seconda sede di Olgiate Comasco; nel 2020, si espande ulteriormente con una terza sede, Casnate con Bernate, e nel 2021 con una quarta, Carugo. A Settembre 2022, la famiglia S.Agata si allarga con una quinta sede a Ponte Chiasso.

La Farmacia S.Agata, nelle sue 5 sedi, cerca di rappresentare al meglio il concetto di una nuova farmacia dei servizi dove modernità, semplicità e ordine si uniscono ad un'elevata competenza e continua formazione dei suoi professionisti.
Le nostre farmacie cercano di soddisfare al meglio ogni richiesta, grazie ai nostri professionisti della salute, all'ampia e aggiornata offerta di prodotti ed ai molteplici reparti in cui personale specializzato potrà offrirti il consiglio più adatto alle tue esigenze.
Per soddisfare ogni tua richiesta, ti offriamo ampi reparti di omeopatia, nutrizione e integrazione, dermocosmetica, ortopedia e alimenti senza glutine ed a fini medici speciali. 
Le Farmacie S.Agata sono al servizio della tua salute e del tuo benessere a 360°, offrendoti la possibilità di partecipare a corsi di approfondimento ed a giornate di consulenza gratuite. Inoltre, avrai a disposizione anche un laboratorio galenico ed un laboratorio di autoanalisi, potrai usufruire dei servizi di telemedicina, di un nutrizionista, di una podologa e di due estetiste al servizio del tuo benessere presso le nostre tre cabine estetiche. 

Farmacie S. Agata, un mondo di benessere.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Dona Coelha
Description:
A Dona Coelha iniciou sua operação em 2011, com o objetivo de transformar o mercado de bem-estar sexual no Brasil. Fundada por Natali e Renan, a empresa nasceu de um blog que discutia sexo, relacionamentos e produtos eróticos, com foco na desmistificação do prazer e na educação sexual.

Com um propósito claro de oferecer educação e diversão no campo da sexualidade, a Dona Coelha rapidamente se tornou uma referência no setor. A abordagem da empresa é centrada na normalização da conversa sobre sexo, substituindo o desconforto tradicional por uma experiência mais acolhedora e informativa.

O rápido crescimento da Dona Coelha desde sua fundação a posicionou como uma das principais empresas de bem-estar sexual no país. Esse sucesso é atribuído à sua dedicação em fornecer produtos que são cuidadosamente selecionados e avaliados por Nat, que, além de CEO, é uma sexóloga certificada.

O compromisso da empresa com a qualidade e a segurança em seus produtos é uma parte essencial de sua reputação. A Dona Coelha não apenas vende produtos eróticos, mas também promove experiências que visam enriquecer a vida sexual de seus clientes.

Olhando para o futuro, a empresa busca continuar sua expansão, mantendo o foco na educação e no empoderamento sexual. A Dona Coelha se esforça para ser um espaço onde a sexualidade é tratada com respeito e abertura, encorajando a descoberta pessoal e a satisfação.

Em suma, a Dona Coelha é mais do que uma loja de produtos eróticos; é um movimento em direção a uma compreensão mais profunda e inclusiva da sexualidade humana.

Name: Novëm
Description:
Novëm est la première marque de cosmétiques naturels à base de noix de Grenoble AOP. Par l’utilisation des bienfaits antioxydants et régénérants de la noix, Novëm propose une gamme de soins efficaces, aux formules expertes et ultra sensorielles. Le tout dans des packagings éco-conçus avec évidemment une fabrication 100% française en circuit court dans la région grenobloise. La noix est l’un des fruits à coque les plus riches en polyphénols, omégas et vitamines, ainsi nos soins correspondent aux peaux les plus exigeantes!

L’histoire de Novëm commence en 2019, lorsqu’un ami nuciculteur nous raconte que son grand-père utilisait l’huile de noix brute pour soigner son eczema. C’est là que nos recherches ont commencé sur cet ingrédient encore méconnu dans la cosmétique.

Avec Novëm, nous souhaitons valoriser notre terroir en mettant en avant le savoir-faire des nuciculteurs de notre région à travers une utilisation novatrice de la noix de Grenoble. Connue dans nos assiettes, la noix de Grenoble a toute sa place dans notre salle de bain grâce à ses bienfaits incroyables pour la peau. Nous avons l’ambition d’utiliser toutes les parties de la Noix et du noyer: actuellement nous travaillons sa coquille en poudre et son huile noble. Mais nous sommes entrain d’étudier un ingrédient upcyclé pour ses bienfaits anti-âge: le brou de noix (un déchet obtenu après l’extraction de l’huile de noix). Le champs des possibles est ouvert pour lancer de la cosmétique et nutri-cosmétique qui utilisent les pouvoirs de la noix.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Description:
For over 40 years, we have combined traditional botanical expertise with scientific innovation to create exceptional skincare products rooted in luxury and authenticity.

Founded in Saint-Barthélemy, our family-owned company draws inspiration from the island’s Caribbean's rich biodiversity. We craft each product with natural ingredients such as avocado, aloe vera, coconut, and papaya, selected for their proven benefits and sensorial qualities. PHILOSOPHIE
Wir möchten Ihr Leben hörbar verbessern

Unser Hörvermögen ist unsere unmittelbare Verbindung zur Umwelt. Es ist immer aktiv – rund um die Uhr.

Bereits kleinste Störungen dieses sensiblen Systems können diese Punkte nachhaltig beeinträchtigen. Dank modernster Technik, haben wir die Möglichkeit, Hörschwächen nahezu vollständig auszugleichen.

Die Kunst unserer Arbeit liegt darin, Menschen wieder ein möglichst perfektes Gehör zu schenken, verloren geglaubte Klänge und Sprache wieder erlebbar zu machen und ihnen ein großes Stück Lebensqualität zurück zu geben. Denn schon Immanuel Kant wusste: „Nicht sehen trennt von den Dingen, nicht hören trennt von den Menschen."

Mein Team und ich freuen uns auf Ihren Besuch

Herzlichst

Ihr Ulrich Aumann

Name: Nailberry
Description:
Nailberry is a high-end and award-winning brand of toxin-free nail lacquers and nail care products, which are made in France and developed using a patented oxygenation technology. The brand is recognised for its healthy and breathable polishes whose film is permeable to air and water, without making any compromise on color vivacity, shine and longevity. The spirit of Nailberry has a sensitivity to health & wellness, and a respect to the environment & nature. These values are at the core of all of the brand’s activities. The product formulas are certified 12-free, vegan, halal, cruelty free and gluten free.

Our story so far - Nailberry was founded in 2012 by Sonia Hully. The brand started as a luxury Nail Bar in Chelsea London, and swiftly transitioned into a range of multi-award winning premium polishes. When Sonia noted her high profile clientele were continuing to experience dry and damaged nails - whether it was the result of lifestyle, pollution, or from the semi-permanent gel manicures - she developed a range of polishes that would help combat their concerns. The result was the award winning L’Oxygéné range. Using the latest in patented technology, L’Oxygéné delivers colour in a healthier manicure. It has since been complemented with an extensive range of Nail Treatments, exclusively designed to further treat and repair damaged nails.

Nailberry today - The brand now finds itself housed in some the world’s most exclusive beauty environments, including John Lewis and Space NK in the UK, Violet Grey in the US, and Sephora in Scandinavia. Its strong focus on health and wellbeing have made it an attractive brand for Nail Salons, Day Spas and Hotel Spas, such as Harrods, the Fairmont Hotel Windsor Park in the UK, and Rocco Forte House in Rome.

Name: Exponent Beauty
Description:
Exponent Beauty is a clinically driven skincare company focused on one overlooked variable in beauty: active ingredient potency over time.

Most skincare products are tested for safety and stability—but not for how much of an active ingredient is actually delivered to skin weeks after opening. Exponent was built to change that.

Using a fresh-activated formulation system, Exponent separates sensitive actives from their base until the moment of use, helping preserve potency throughout a product’s useful life. Our work centers on the real-world stability and efficacy of skincare actives such as vitamin C, retinol, and coenzyme Q10.

Exponent conducts independent analytical testing with third-party laboratories and publishes research examining how formulation strategy, packaging, and time affect delivered active concentration—not just label claims. All formulas are clinically tested using measured instrumentation and designed to deliver results without unnecessary irritation.

Exponent Beauty is redefining what efficacy means in modern skincare: measurable, preserved, and proven.

Description:
We’re all looking for safe and sustainable products for our families and homes, but knowing where to start is confusing. How do I know these products are actually safe and sustainable? How do I know they work? Why should I trust this company? 

Not only that, but how do I know I actually need this product? Every day, we’re constantly being pushed to mindlessly overconsume, and it has created huge problems – for the Earth, for our wallets, and for our happiness. 

Being a thoughtful, ethical consumer is difficult, and these endless questions can feel exhausting. 

So, we set out to do something about that. We figured, what better way to address our wasteful consumption patterns than with the products that shape our habits every day?

At The Earthling Co., we create thoughtfully designed products that nurture earth-friendly habits and routines.

We’re a passionate team whose mission is to simplify eco-conscious living, and to create a positive impact on our routines and the future of our planet. 

We believe that creating safe, sustainable routines shouldn’t be confusing, nor should they add to the growing waste problem the world already has.

We’d love to show you how we’re Intentional by Nature.

Name: TTK HEALTHCARE LIMITED
Description:
As a truly modern and diversified conglomerate, we have a wide range of products in FMCG, Animal Welfare , Ortho & Food Industries.
We at TTK Healthcare have significantly contributed to the advancement of the healthcare system in India over the last six decades through the development and commercialization of innovative products.
India’s first indigenous heart value prosthesis – the tilting disc, TTK Chitra Heart Valve, manufactured by TTK Healthcare, the only Indian company and amongst a few in the world with this capability.
Consumer Products Division markets and distributes products that transcend categories; baby care (Woodward’s Gripe Water), personal care (Eva), home care (Good Home) and sexual wellness (Skore).
TTK group has been in the condom business since 1950 and went on to establish the first condom manufacturing factory in the country. Our businesses are built on trust, transparency, knowledge, and relationships, which has won us some of our esteemed clients across the globe.
Our Animal Welfare Division caters to the health and well-being of wide range of animals such as cows and buffaloes, sheep and goats, poultry, dogs and cats, fish and shrimp. This division is dedicated to providing our customers with innovative solutions and improving health and productivity of their animals.
With 30 years of rich experience, TTK’s Food Division is India’s first and largest manufacturer of extruded products (papad), under the brand name Fryums. We pride ourselves on our ability to develop customized products based on our customers’ needs.
The Ortho Division is engaged in the manufacturing of quality orthopedic implants and instruments, in partnership with world-renowned Orthopaedic surgeon Frederick F. Buechel and a renowned expert in advance design, late Michael J. Pappas. The core focus is on bringing a high level of precision into the orthopedic manufacturing process and thus contribute significantly to the advancement of India’s orthopedics implant segment.

Name: PharmaBest, réseau pharmacies
Description:
PharmaBest est l’un des premiers réseaux de pharmacies organisées en France, et une enseigne de distribution de référence, classée 59ᵉ au Top 100 LSA.
Au 1ᵉʳ avril 2025, le groupement rassemble 135 pharmacies d’envergure (surface moyenne de 800 m²), réparties sur l’ensemble du territoire national, en Corse, en Outre-mer… et désormais en Espagne .

Avec un chiffre d’affaires de 1,4 milliard d’euros en 2024 et 3 600 collaborateurs, dont 900 pharmaciens inscrits à l’Ordre, PharmaBest s’impose comme un acteur majeur de la santé de proximité.
Notre ambition : transformer la pharmacie traditionnelle en un véritable pôle de santé, de beauté et de bien-être.

Notre modèle repose sur trois piliers :
• Une offre très large en libre accès, accompagnée de conseils personnalisés
• Des services de santé intégrés : vaccination, dépistage, bilans thérapeutiques, orthopédie…
• Une stratégie de marques propres (PharmaScience, PharmaBaby, Pureté), avec 200 références, majoritairement éco-conçues et fabriquées en France

Depuis 2022, nous investissons également dans la formation continue avec le programme PharmaBest Academy, conçu pour accompagner la montée en compétences des équipes de nos officines.

 En avril 2025, PharmaBest a franchi une nouvelle étape dans le déploiement de son modèle, avec son implantation en Espagne.
La pharmacie Aluche 24h à Madrid a rejoint le groupement, devenant la première vitrine internationale de notre vision : un espace de 500 m² ouvert 24h/24, conçu comme un pôle de santé moderne, digitalisé et performant.

Fidèle à notre singularité, PharmaBest Espagne est un réseau détenu par des pharmaciens entrepreneurs.

 PharmaBest a pour Président le Dr David Abenhaim, pharmacien associé de la pharmacie PharmaBest Prado-Mermoz à Marseille, et pour Directeur Général, Alain Styl.

Since its establishment 30 years ago, Lush Cosmetics has been driven by innovation and its ethics. 
Creators of pioneering beauty products such as the bath bomb, shower jellies and solid shampoo bars, Lush places emphasis on fresh ingredients like organic fruits and vegetables. 
Lush operates a strict policy against animal testing and supports fair trade and community trade initiatives. Lush leads the cosmetics industry in combating over-packaging by running public awareness campaigns and developing products that can be sold ‘naked’ to the consumer without any packaging. There are 923 Lush shops in 52 countries worldwide. 
In Australia, we employ over 500 people from manufacturing staff, sales staff in store and online who serve our customers to the teams hand-making our products in the Sydney-based factory. In 2015, Lush received the Australian Retailer of the Year award.

Our Core Beliefs:

We believe in making effective products from fresh, organic fruit and vegetables, the finest essential oils and safe synthetics. 

We invent our own products and fragrances. We make them fresh by hand using little or no preservative or packaging, using only vegetarian ingredients, and tell you when they were made. 

We believe in buying ingredients only from companies that do not commission tests on animals and in testing our products on humans. 

We believe in happy people making happy soap, putting our faces on our products and making our mums proud. 

We believe in long candlelit baths, sharing showers, massage, filling the world with perfume and in the right to make mistakes, lose everything and start again. 

We believe our products are good value, that we should make a profit and that the customer is always right.

Grâce à une recherche constante d’innovation et à des formules rigoureusement développées, LUXEOL répond avec précision aux besoins de tous les types de cheveux : chute, pousse, brillance, densité, volume, nutrition, cheveux bouclés…

Sa gamme complète de compléments alimentaires, shampoings, sérums et soins ciblés est conçue en partenariat avec des laboratoires experts, dans le respect des normes de qualité les plus strictes. Chaque produit est fabriqué en France et testé (cliniquement, tests consommateurs), garantissant efficacité, tolérance et traçabilité. LUXEOL s’adresse à celles et ceux qui recherchent des solutions fiables, visibles et respectueuses pour la beauté des cheveux et de la peau.

Reconnue pour son engagement, sa transparence et ses résultats, LUXEOL est aujourd’hui la 2ᵉ marque capillaire la plus vendue en pharmacies et parapharmacies en France. Présente sur le marché national, elle séduit des millions de consommateurs à la recherche d’une beauté authentique, accessible et performante.

LUXEOL, c’est la rencontre entre innovation, expertise française et excellence au service de la beauté.

Name: Thérapi
Description:
Fundada em 2016, a Thérapi iniciou suas atividades com a produção dos legítimos Florais de Bach, estabelecendo-se rapidamente como a maior indústria desse segmento na América Latina e líder em vendas e distribuição no Brasil.

Com um parque fabril de 6.600 m² em Arroio do Meio – RS, operamos com os mesmos padrões de qualidade exigidos pelo mercado farmacêutico com a tecnologia mais avançada em purificação de água, garantindo a excelência dos nossos produtos.

Ao longo dos anos, expandimos nossa atuação para muito além dos Florais de Bach, oferecendo uma linha completa de produtos voltados para terapias integrativas, bem-estar e qualidade de vida. A expansão de nosso portfólio inclui óleos essenciais, medicamentos homeopáticos, cosméticos e suplementos alimentares, sempre com foco nas Práticas Integrativas e Complementares (PICS) do SUS.

Nosso propósito é claro: proporcionar saúde integrativa para toda a família.

Temos o olhar atento às mudanças no comportamento e hábitos de consumo, sempre em busca de inovação, evoluindo em tecnologias que nos coloquem à frente em saúde integrativa, com soluções que proporcionem bem-estar para o corpo e mente.

Para reforçar nossa presença no país e consolidar um atendimento eficaz, contamos com dois centros de distribuição estrategicamente localizados no Espírito Santo e no Rio Grande do Sul.

Atuamos com uma diversidade de clientes, no canal farma, verde, pet, e-commerce, loja própria e grandes redes, ampliando nossa presença em múltiplos setores e fortalecendo nossa atuação nacional.

Nossa Visão é Ser referência nacional em saúde integrativa, com soluções que proporcionem bem-estar para o corpo e mente.

Nossos Valores são:
- Fazer o certo sempre.
- Respeito e cuidado com as pessoas e o meio ambiente.
- Compromisso com a qualidade e agilidade no que fazemos.
- Inovação e melhoria contínua.
- Paixão em ser Thérapi.

Vem construir uma história de sucesso junto com a gente?

Setu is a new age brand of nutrition supplements to address challenges and solve problems, which are a consequence of our modern lifestyle. 
Setu’s advanced solutions are crafted to strengthen body functions to solve and check conditions induced by present-day lifestyles. With four decades of global experience in manufacturing the most optimal natural ingredients, we make nature more efficacious through modern technology and nutritional science. Setu is bringing together its strengths in ingredient technology and years of consumer understanding to the digital industry with an intention to democratise choices for consumers by building the most imperative tool - knowledge.

OmniActive, our parent company, is an ingredient supplier of trust and choice to innovators across the dietary supplement and functional food sphere globally. Our lineage began with Bombay Oil Industries Limited, an agro-commodities trading house that has spawned successful agro-based businesses including Marico, Kancor Ingredients, OmniActive Health Technologies, Keya Foods and Eternis Fine Chemicals.

Name: PHARMAZON
Description:

Pharmazon a été créé par Audrey Lecoq avec une idée simple qui a révolutionné le circuit de distribution des pharmacies : gérer les approvisionnements des officines via un site Internet réservé à ses membres pharmaciens.
L’entrée à son capital en 2019 de Cegedim, acteur majeur dans le domaine de la santé, permet à Pharmazon de poursuivre sa croissance en accompagnant ses adhérents dans le développement de la vente en ligne en ouvrant sa plateforme au grand public via le site pharmazon.fr. Un site 100% solidaire et engagé où 100% des ventes sont au bénéfice des pharmaciens.
Enfin, pour améliorer le pouvoir d’achat des Français et leur accès aux soins, Pharmazon est en train de passer des accords avec les Comités sociaux et économiques (ex-CE) d’entreprises. www.pharmazon.fr

Name: SoPharma
Description:
SoPharma is a Moroccan pharmaceutical laboratory founded in 2022 by two entrepreneurs, whose mission is to make the most innovative healthcare solutions available to as many people as possible.

The experience, values and network of its founders have enabled SoPharma to forge various types of partnerships with leading international companies for import, manufacturing and distribution of healthcare solutions.

Since its creation, SoPharma has focused on 2 Business Units in the Africa/MENA region: 
- "Health and Comfort" dedicated to food supplements; 
- Skincare By SoPharma", dedicated to cosmetics and dermocosmetics. 

The group's current strategy is to distribute exclusively under license products from international laboratories, as well as its own ranges.

In addition, SoPharma has undertaken the construction of a drug manufacturing plant in the Casablanca region. In Phase 1, this unit will be dedicated to the following 3 therapeutic areas: Central Nervous System, Oncology and Cardiometabolism. 

The Group's ambition is to become a major player in healthcare innovation from Morocco to Africa, the Middle East and Europe.

Name: Hygie31
Description:
With a combined turnover of €3.3 billion and over 1,400 pharmacies represented, Hygie31 is a major player in the healthcare sector, with expertise centred around three key areas:
- Management of the French brands Pharmacie Lafayette (316 pharmacies), Parapharmacie Lafayette, Optique Lafayette (57 stores) and Médical Lafayette (52 stores), as well as the Spanish brand Ecoceutics (134 pharmacies).
- Support for regional groups of traditional pharmacies: Pharmacorp (580 pharmacies), Pharmacyal (155 pharmacies in the Hauts-de-France region), Magdaléon (106 pharmacies in the Grand Est region) and Quartz (115 pharmacies).
- E-commerce, encompassing its B2C sites cocooncenter.com, parapharmacielafayette.com, and Pascal Coste Shopping, as well as its B2B platform Distrimed, one of France’s leading online distributors of medical devices for healthcare professionals.
Hygie31 aims to make healthcare accessible to as many people as possible, and to strengthen the role of pharmacies as the primary point of contact for healthcare in Europe. 
The strength and consistency of its networks, along with its strong online presence, make it the leading player in pharmacy and wellness in France.
With the backing of its financial shareholders, Latour Capital and BPI France, Hygie31 aims to pursue external growth operations in France and internationally, with the goal of developing a truly European healthcare ecosystem.

Name: Cowbelle Skincare - tallow skincare for eczema, dry & sensitive skin
Description:
Let’s get real.

Acne, Eczema, Psoriasis, Rosacea & other forms of dermatitis are not the natural/ normal state of your skin. There is something that is irritating your skin, damaging your skin barrier & triggering these inflammatory allergic responses in the form of rashes, redness, breakouts & flares.

That something is harsh chemicals. 

With all these different active ingredients and 10+ product skin care routines, we are at war with our skin’s barrier by constantly applying these harsh chemicals every day and multiple times a day.

After years of having what people deem “perfect skin”, our founder suddenly developed severe eczema all over her face and body. After trying numerous medical-grade and chemical-filled products, all claiming to “heal” her skin, one by one they all failed.

It wasn’t until she discovered 100% natural tallow skincare that did not contain any of these harsh chemicals that her skin finally healed.

Now, we’re helping people who suffer from inflammatory skin conditions (such as acne, eczema, psoriasis, rosacea) ditch these harsh chemicals and finally allow their skin to heal.

Cowbelle Skincare is a tallow skincare line with only 7 pure & powerful natural ingredients that have been healing our skin for centuries. All of our skincare products are 100% natural and do not contain harsh chemicals.

Real ingredients for real results. It's that simple.

Name: SÚPER SOYA
Description:
UNA HISTORIA QUE INICIO EN 1982…

En Súper Soya somos una empresa con más de 35 años de experiencia en brindar al público mexicano una gran variedad de productos naturistas, con la ideología de ofrecer sólo productos de calidad, pero que sean accesibles a todos los bolsillos.

Se conoce como naturismo al uso y manejo de productos naturales para la vida cotidiana y en especial para la medicina, el naturismo a diferencia de la herbolaria que es la medicina a base de plantas se enfoca al manejo de productos diversos en tanto y cuanto sean naturales. Con esta idea en mente es que nace el concepto de Súper Soya, que inicia operaciones en el año de 1982; con el objetivo de crear el primen centro de nutrición en México con una variedad de productos especializados, siempre considerando el origen natural de dichos productos.

 

Este concepto para su época fue algo novedoso y de gran atracción para quienes buscaban una forma de vida, en donde las leyes se basarán en vivir de la mano con la naturaleza, tratando de utilizar productos en todo aspecto de la vida que sean 100% de la naturaleza, con la finalidad de poder surtir a las tiendas productos a bajo costo y de procedencia extranjera.

El crecimiento que habíamos tenido para el año de 1992 hace posible que se apertura en ese año el modelo de Franquicias Súper Soya, que es el modelo que hasta estos últimos días seguimos conservando y que es el que podrán encontrar en cada una de nuestras tiendas.

Không chỉ mang đến cho khách hàng những sản phẩm đảm bảo chất lượng và nguồn gốc rõ ràng, chúng tôi còn nắm bắt những thị hiếu của người tiêu dùng trẻ với để mang đến các sản phẩm hấp dẫn với nhiều công dụng vượt trội.
Với tiêu chí đầu tư vào con người, thành công của Công ty cổ phần mỹ phẩm quốc tế Thùy Dung chính là bởi đội ngũ nhân viên có kiến thức chuyên môn sâu, giàu kinh nghiệm và một tinh thần đam mê nhiệt huyết với ngành mỹ phẩm.
Chúng tôi tin việc tập trung vào nền tảng phát triển con người chắc chắn sẽ tạo bước tiến lớn trong thành công của khách hàng, các đối tác và thế giới mỹ phẩm mà chúng tôi phục vụ trong nhiều năm nay.

Chúng tôi - Nhà phân phối bán lẻ mỹ phẩm Hàn Quốc – Châu Á số 1 tại Việt Nam với 10 thương hiệu độc quyền những cột mốc quan trọng trong nhiều năm qua

Ashtel Studios Inc. was initially formed as a web development service for faculty members at my university during my years as a student. After graduating, I transitioned to working with small businesses to grow their online presence.

Our other B2C brands were developed along the way, with expansions into the health and personal care industries. Smart Care is best known for its soaps, hand sanitizers, bandages, and baby care. Advances in the oral care space have been made with Soniclean, where the focus has been providing a professional-grade line of powered toothbrushes at an affordable price.

The goal of EVO is to transform daily routine with curated products that feature innovative design and function. Name: Mintdrops | Natural Oral Care
Description:
Oral health neglect is a silent epidemic in India, often treated as a secondary concern until it becomes a crisis.

 * It is estimated that 95% of adults in India suffer from gum disease, and 83% of children suffer from dental cavities.

 * Scientific Research confirms a direct "Oral-Systemic Link": People with gum disease have a 28% higher risk of heart attacks and a 22% higher risk of diabetes.

 * Recent studies also link oral bacteria (P. gingivalis) to the onset of Alzheimer's and other cognitive decline issues.

 * Most commercial toothpastes contain SLS, Parabens, and Triclosan — chemicals linked to endocrine disruption. 

*  Children swallow up to 40% of toothpaste while brushing, ingesting these chemicals and micro-beads daily during their critical development years.

In line with our vision that "Oral care is the gateway for your holistic health," we recognize that oral hygiene is the body’s first line of defense. Ignoring it doesn't just damage teeth; it compromises the heart, brain, and metabolic health.

Mintdrops Innovations is focused on modernizing Ayurveda for the new generation. We are democratizing access to safe, chemical-free oral care by transforming traditional herbal efficacy into innovative, easy-to-use formats.

Through our clinically tested and Ayush-approved proprietary formulations, we offer natural solutions that eliminate the need for harsh abrasives, fluoride, and synthetics. By procuring ingredients from verified suppliers, we ensure 100% purity and efficacy, helping customers protect their long-term holistic health while enjoying a modern, sustainable user experience.

Headquartered in Hyderabad, we are excited to build a strong product and operations team passionate about blending ancient wisdom with modern innovation to ensure our customers experience the future of safe, holistic oral care.

Currently, EMLIFE develops two main product lines:
– GUT, focused on digestive health and gastrointestinal well-being.
– GO, designed to support the immune system.

Research, process control, and industrial quality are fundamental pillars of our work. We approach probiotic development from an applied science perspective, where fermentation, traceability, and product stability are integrated into the design itself, together with a clear commitment to organic and responsible production.

EMLIFE participates in European innovation and industrial digitalization projects, with the aim of continuing to advance the rigorous and responsible production of solutions based on live microorganisms.

UNA SOLUZIONE PER OGNI NECESSITÀ

Udisens è una realtà nazionale nata dall'unione di specialisti dell'udito, che grazie alla lunga esperienza e alle più recenti tecnologie sono in grado di trovare rimedio ai più frequenti problemi di perdita uditiva. 

Riteniamo fondamentale offrire - oltre alle ultimissime tecnologie - la capacità e la competenza di chi sa applicarle rimanendo costantemente al fianco dei nostri pazienti per qualsiasi necessità: le tecnologie a disposizione ormai infatti si equivalgono, ma l'applicazione e l'assistenza di un'équipe competente fanno oggi la totale ed imprescindibile differenza. 
 
AL VOSTRO FIANCO DA OLTRE 35 ANNI

Obiettivo principale di Udisens è la ricerca di soluzioni acustiche innovative che aumentino la soddisfazione e l'accettazione dell'utilizzatore: Udisens è sempre più la scelta naturale per i pazienti, che grazie a prodotti di alta tecnologia e attrezzature di ultima generazione sono in grado di trovare la giusta soluzione al proprio problema di udito. Il traguardo che Udisens si prefigge è quello di essere presente con i propri centri su tutto il territorio nazionale: il Gruppo mette infatti a disposizione il suo know-how allo scopo di creare imprenditori audioprotesisti che possano svolgere la propria attività in piena autonomia, usufruendo dei vantaggi che un grande team può offrire.

La fase di start-up prevede l'affiancamento da parte di Udisens e dei suoi partner per far acquisire al centro la completa autonomia operativa e gestionale nel più breve tempo possibile: il fine è creare nuove strutture di eccellenza dotate di professionisti affermati e di comprovato talento. 

PERSONALE ALTAMENTE QUALIFICATO

Lo staff di specialisti selezionati permette a Udisens di offrire un servizio professionale di qualità, rimanendo costantemente al fianco dei pazienti nelle molteplici necessità.

Name: Wizermed
Description:
Migraines can significantly impact a person's quality of life, causing pain, fatigue, and other debilitating symptoms that can last for hours or even days.
The unpredictable nature of migraines can make it difficult to plan ahead or make commitments, leading to feelings of frustration and isolation.
The lack of control over when a migraine attack occurs can have negative impacts on a person's career, social life, and relationships with loved ones.

Migraine Predict is our mobile application which is designed to help migraine sufferers gain greater control over their condition and improve their quality of life. By monitoring signals from a smartwatch, our app forecasts with high accuracy whether the next day will be migraine-free or if a migraine attack is likely. This AI-based forecasting allows users to plan ahead, adjust their schedule, and take proactive steps to manage their condition.

Nossa missão é oferecer aos clientes medicamentos e dermocosméticos

Acreditamos em um mundo sem especismo, onde seres humanos e animais possam conviver em harmonia, tenham o direito à vida e sejam igualmente respeitados.
Como primeira farmácia de manipulação vegana do Brasil, a Vegan Pharma utiliza tecnologia de ponta para desenvolver medicamentos e cosméticos sem qualquer componente de origem animal e sem realizar testes em animais, reforçando o seu compromisso em respeitar todos os seres vivos.
A empresa deseja ser consagrada nacionalmente por seus produtos farmacêuticos veganos, expandindo seus negócios por meio de franquias em todo o país.

In 1975, Late Dr Salim Ahmed (1946 – 2018) opened the doors to Dr Salim Ahmed & Co. At the beginning of 2018, the company completed its 3rd generation change with the arrival of Najmus Saqib, the company experienced a dynamic growth by expanding the business via our e-commerce channel.

Najmus Saqib, an experienced professional, a qualified Homeopath Doctor from Pakistan, coupled with an undergraduate and postgraduate qualifications from England in Business and Political Science.

KERA BOND offers highly specialized formulations designed to target specific hair concerns arising from lifestyle stressors. Our newly launched range includes:
 Swim Care: Shields hair from chlorine and saltwater damage.
 Bond Repair: Strengthens hair bonds weakened by heat and chemical treatments.
 New Mom’s Care: Supports hair health through postpartum changes.

We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Our science-driven, dermatologist-recommended formulations work at a deeper level, restoring and fortifying hair integrity, rather than masking damage. With KERA BOND, you get the precision of clinical hair care, tailored to your lifestyle.

Name: Floss Beauty
Description:
A soft glow-up can change your whole mood. Having your nails done just hits different, right? It makes you feel like you’ve got your life together, even if you really don’t. That’s the idea behind Floss Beauty. We’re here to make beauty easy, fun, and something you actually look forward to.

At Floss Beauty, we know you’re already gorgeous. Our products are here to give you that little extra lift. Think of them as your wake-up pretty essentials: press-on nails, magnetic lashes, and peel-off lip stains that slip into your routine and make you feel polished with minimal effort. Perfect for the no-makeup makeup vibe with just enough glam to feel special.

We started with press-on nails because, honestly, who has the time or patience for weekly salon appointments. Each set comes with 28–30 nails in different sizes, plus glue and stick tabs, so you can choose quick-change or long-wear depending on your mood. The packaging even doubles as storage, so your nails look cute both on your hands and on your vanity.

Then came lashes. If you’ve ever fought with lash glue, you’ll understand why we made magnetic lashes a thing. They click into place around your natural lashes, no glue, no mess, no panic. Lightweight, reusable, and perfect whether you want a soft everyday look or a little extra glam.

And because lipstick touch-ups are a hard pass, we created peel-off lip stains that last all day. Swipe, peel, and you’re left with a natural tint that stays put through coffee, lunch, and late-night plans. Easy, comfy, and effortless.

Glow-ups don’t need to be dramatic. At Floss Beauty, it’s about the little touches that make you feel confident and ready for anything.

Floss Beauty was founded by Delisha, who discovered press-on nails at 18 and instantly felt a boost of confidence that she wanted to share with others. From that moment, the mission has been clear: create premium, easy-to-use beauty products that help people feel like their best selves.

Desde a inauguração da primeira farmácia, em 1973, seguimos fiéis ao nosso propósito: oferecer saúde, bem-estar e um cuidado diferenciado a cada cliente.

Nossa história começou com o sonho de Ildefonso Henrique Knup, que, desde a infância, desejava ajudar pessoas e suas famílias. Hoje, mais de meio século depois, esse sonho se transformou em uma realidade sólida, com unidades em Ribeirão Preto, Matão, Pirassununga e Jardinópolis.

Na Drogaria São Carlos, nossa missão vai além de fornecer produtos e serviços. Estamos comprometidos em cuidar com carinho e atenção de cada cliente, promovendo saúde e qualidade de vida. Esse compromisso nos torna uma das redes de varejo farmacêutico mais respeitadas e consolidadas do interior do estado de São Paulo.

Conecte-se conosco e descubra como podemos ajudar você e sua família a viver melhor!

Name: Laboratoires Expanscience Portugal
Description:
Não nos entregamos a fundo há mais de 70 anos sem uma boa razão... Na Expanscience, somos uma empresa com uma missão social e o nosso fundamento é ajudar cada um a alcançar o seu bem-estar, da infância à terceira idade. É isto que faz avançar, pesquisar e inovar os nossos 1300 colaboradores, todos os dias! Com espírito livre, somos uma empresa francesa 100% familiar, com produtos (Mustela, Piasclédine 300…) presentes em mais de 90 países. Para nós é muito claro: O bem-estar das mulheres e dos homens é indissociável da saúde do planeta e está nas mãos de todos nós. Para que os pais não tenham mais que escolher entre um cuidado de qualidade para os seus filhos e uma solução boa para o ambiente que os rodeia e os vê crescer, damos-lhes produtos naturais, eficazes e saudáveis. Para permitir a cada um construir o seu bem-estar com o evoluir dos anos, ajudamo-los a preservar o seu conforto articular, e a sua agilidade física e mental o mais cedo possível.  Desenvolvemos ativos cosméticos e ingredientes sensoriais de origem 100% natural, que contribuem para o bem-estar do corpo e da alma. O nosso impacto positivo na sociedade e no ambiente é reconhecido pela certificação B Corp e, através do nosso programa de RSE « impACT », estamos determinados em tornar-nos uma empresa com impacto positivo e uma visão regeneradora.
A nossa visão destina-se essencialmente às nossas equipas. No dia a dia, isso traduz-se no reforço da QVT e da igualdade profissional, no apoio às vulnerabilidades e na promoção da inclusão dos mais fragéis, na proposição de uma estratégia ambiciosa de talentos e competências, assim como na promoção do equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional e da eficiência coletiva. Isto requer medidas ambiciosas que abordem os principais desafios sociais enfrentados pelas empresas do século XXI. E traz os seus frutos: orgulhamo-nos de ter a certificação « Great Place to Work » em 100% das nossas filiais pelo segundo ano consecutivo!

Le rôle des spécialistes Audition Conseil est également d’informer le grand public sur les solutions qui existent aujourd’hui pour améliorer l’audition. Enfin, ils sont à vos côtés pour vous conseiller utilement à toutes les étapes de votre correction auditive.

Otolab3D propose une garantie de fabrication de 3 mois en cas d'inadaptation de l'embout. Otolab3D relancera alors immédiatement la fabrication d'un nouvel embout sans avoir besoin de renvoyer l'ancien.

 Impression 3D pour une haute précision
La fabrication d'embouts sur mesure en 3D utilise la technique de stéréolithographie. Les embouts sont modélisés sur ordinateur et gardés en mémoire 10 ans.

 Suivi de votre commande en temps réel
Vous pouvez télécharger les scans de numérisation et personnaliser en fonction de vos besoins spécifiques. Vous pouvez également suivre les commandes en temps réel, de la production à l'expédition.

Name: Menoveda
Description:
Every phase in women's life is special, and so is Menopause that's why we are building MENOVEDA.

Menopause, though inevitable, is the most feared stage of a woman’s life. For years, women have struggled with this transition, as it impacts our daily lives in many minute yet radical ways. A hot flash here and there, those few kilos of weight gain, the unexpected mood swings, and insomnia that slowly creeps up on us. Some of us ignore it, and many do nothing about it. At the root of the problem, our lack of knowledge about these symptoms and how to manage them has made us pay little heed to them when they show up over time.

It is said that 1.1 billion women will reach menopause by 2025.

*OUR MISSION*
To empower women to gain back control of their lives and passions and to help them embrace who they truly are across their physical, emotional, sexual, and mental selves.

*OUR VISION*
A world in which women are well informed and adequately educated about menopausal transitions and have access to ayurvedic, research-driven, plant-based, science-backed solutions to address their overall health in midlife and beyond.

*OUR GOAL*
At Menoveda, we have a simple goal to make safe, result oriented products that work on the root cause. Our products are designed and formulated by a team of experts, including doctors, gyneacologists, and Ayurvedacharyas to support women through the menopausal journey and beyond.

Menoveda Is India's Gift to the Women of the World !

Il gruppo Beurer fondato a Ulm 100 anni fa, è leader di prodotti per la salute e il benessere. Dal 1919 le innovazioni di Beurer combinano la tecnologia moderna con l'ingegneria tedesca.

La nostra pluriennale esperienza ci ha permesso di acquisire sempre maggiori conoscenze riguardo la salute e il benessere trasformandoci in esperti del settore.

Creiamo soluzioni che si adattano alle esigenze dei nostri clienti e contribuiscono a uno stile di vita sano all'insegna della cura della persona con un assortimento di prodotti nei campi della prevenzione, diagnosi, terapia e benessere. 

Sviluppiamo nuovi prodotti improntati all'innovazione, alla qualità e al design accattivante collaborando con istituti, università, consulenti e medici esperti in materia che ci forniscono input importanti in relazione agli argomenti legati alla salute. La tecnologia per la pressione sanguigna sviluppata nel 1996 ci vede ancora oggi come leader di mercato in questo segmento.

Adattandoci costantemente alle nuove tendenze e andando incontro alle esigenze dei nostri clienti, offriamo un vasto assortimento di prodotti per ogni categoria, partendo dai modelli base fino ad arrivare a quelli di altissima gamma. Da dispositivi medici, specializzati in prevenzione e diagnosi, a prodotti per la misurazione del peso e la diagnosi, agli apparecchi massaggianti e per terapie della categoria "Wellbeing", non mancano prodotti “Beauty” fino al settore "Active" con sensori di attività e cardio-frequenzimetri e “Babycare”.

L'ampia gamma dell'azienda di oltre 500 prodotti comprende monitor della pressione arteriosa, dispositivi TENS, termometri, bilance pesapersone e massaggiatori.

La filiale italiana di Beurer, Beurer Italia Srl, è stata fondata nel 2009 con partner dei rivenditori più importanti di alcune regioni, tra cui, Amazon, Media World, Unieuro. 

Per assistenza tecnica sul prodotto scrivi a info@beurer.it o chiamaci allo 023272793 durante l'orario lavorativo (Lun-Ven 9-17.30)

PharmaBest nació en Francia hace una década con una idea clara: devolver a los farmacéuticos el control sobre su negocio, su rentabilidad y su futuro. 
A 1 de abril de 2025 cuenta con más de 135 farmacias, una facturación anual de 1.400 millones de euros y un equipo de 3.600 colaboradores, incluidos 900 farmacéuticos colegiados, PharmaBest lidera la transformación de la farmacia tradicional hacia un verdadero polo de salud, belleza y bienestar.

PharmaBest está dirigida en Francia por el Dr. David Abenhaim como Presidente y Alain Styl como Director General.

En abril de 2025, PharmaBest llega a España, empezando con la emblemática farmacia Aluche 24h en Madrid: un moderno espacio de 500 m², digitalizado y operativo las 24 horas, fiel reflejo de nuestro innovador modelo. La sede española se encuentra en Madrid.

PharmaBest España conserva la esencia original: una red impulsada por farmacéuticos emprendedores. Creemos en socios, accionistas y farmacéuticos protagonistas del cambio, que desean escalar su negocio manteniendo intacta su independencia.

Nuestro modelo español impulsa la colaboración, el crecimiento sostenible, servicios de salud integrados y marcas propias innovadoras y eco-responsables (PharmaScience, PharmaBaby, Pureté).

En España, lideran el proyecto Francisco Martín como Presidente del Consejo, Óscar Martín como Presidente Ejecutivo y Ana Isabel Herrador como Directora General, todos ellos farmacéuticos comprometidos con esta visión transformadora.

Description:

OUR STORY

Beauty is an integral part of life in the GCC Region. Everywhere you turn, industry giants are present, targeting certain demographics with their traditionally elegant displays.
However, to business woman and trendsetter Abrar Mohammed, it was evident that a large percentage of the market was being overlooked. Miss Mohammed saw an opportunity to target a trendier, more ethically conscious demographic, well versed in online media. Thus, she created Union International Trading Company and began acquiring top socially engaging international beauty brands.

Union International Trading Co.’s brands now have a social media outreach of over one hundred million users and are high-quality, trendy, and attractive top performers within the region. This, along with Miss Mohammed’s public relations and networking accomplishments, have attracted regional A-list celebrities to the brands, creating a flow of steady, organic marketing. 

What sets Union International Trading Co. apart, aside from the innovative digital and celebrity marketing tactics, is the commitment to its customers and the ability to quickly adapt in the ever-evolving beauty industry. Maintaining a competitive and innovative edge combined with the highest level of service has been a key factor in the success of Union International Trading Company, which also went on to establish the HOME OF BEAUTY ecommerce platform. 

As the exclusive, regional distributor for all the brands found on our platform, we are committed to providing top quality, authentic products and excellent customer service while simplifying the beautification process, creating an easy, personal and pain-free platform to have all your beauty needs in the palm of your hand. HOME OF BEAUTY is now the pioneer online beauty player across the region.

Innovazione scientifica: formulazioni basate su ricerche avanzate.
Sostenibilità etica: imballaggi eco-friendly in vetro farmaceutico e carta riciclata.

Crediamo che il benessere sia una combinazione di salute personale e rispetto per il pianeta. Lavoriamo per creare prodotti naturali, efficaci ed etici, adatti a migliorare la qualità della vita.

Segui Lōkahi su LinkedIn per scoprire come stiamo rivoluzionando il mondo del benessere con prodotti unici che rispettano te e l’ambiente.

Name: Dabur
Description:
Dabur India Limited is one of the largest and oldest Indian consumer goods companies, with a rich history dating back to 1884. The company's products and services are built on the foundation of Ayurveda, a traditional system of medicine native to India, which emphasizes the use of natural and herbal ingredients to promote health and wellness.

Dabur India's product portfolio is vast and includes products in the healthcare, personal care, home care, and food and beverage segments. Some of its popular brands include Dabur Chyawanprash, Dabur Honey, Dabur Red Toothpaste, Dabur Lal Tail, Dabur Amla Hair Oil, and Real Fruit Juices, among others.

The company's healthcare segment includes a range of Ayurvedic medicines and supplements, such as Dabur Honitus Cough Syrup, Dabur Shilajit, and Dabur Rheumatil Gel, among others. These products are formulated to address a variety of health concerns, including cough and cold, digestive issues, joint pain, and more.

Dabur India's personal care segment includes a range of products designed to enhance personal grooming and hygiene. Some of the popular products in this category include Dabur Amla Hair Oil, Dabur Vatika Shampoo, Dabur Babool Toothpaste, and Dabur Gulabari Rose Water, among others.

In the home care segment, Dabur India offers products such as Odomos Mosquito Repellent, Odopic Dishwashing Liquid, and Sanifresh Toilet Cleaner, among others. These products are designed to provide effective and convenient solutions for household cleaning and pest control.

Dabur India's food and beverage segment includes a range of products such as Dabur Honey, Real Fruit Juices, Dabur Hommade Cooking Pastes, and Dabur Hommade Tomato Puree, among others. These products are designed to provide consumers with healthy and convenient food options that are free from preservatives and artificial flavors.

In addition to its core business, Dabur India is also committed to sustainable development and social responsibility.

Il entreprend d’en faire une pharmacie moderne et spécialisée. Elle connaît alors un essor rapide et important. 
Aujourd’hui, Monsieur Robert et Madame Chevrier, les pharmaciens titulaires, perpétuent cette histoire. Entourés d’une équipe de plus de 50 collaborateurs, ils vous accueillent dans leur officine sur trois niveaux, en proposant une offre diversifiée et des services innovants, toujours au meilleur prix.

Founded by a breast cancer thriver, Coils to Locs is a specialized distributor of premium coily and curly hair prostheses (wigs) for women with textured hair experiencing medical or non-medical hair loss.

We partner with hospitals, cancer centers, medical hair loss salons, nonprofits, and organizations supporting women through alopecia, chemotherapy, and other hair loss conditions. We also serve consumers directly, including women who simply love the versatility and beauty of premium synthetic wigs.

Our mission addresses a critical gap in the hair prosthesis industry: the lack of authentic textured wigs (3A-4C curl patterns) available through traditional medical and nonprofit channels where women can access insurance reimbursement and supportive resources.

Coils to Locs ensures that women with coily and curly hair textures have dignified, beautiful options—wherever they seek support.

Name: Health Royals
Description:
Health Royals – där design möter vetenskap.
Vi är ett svenskt varumärke inom nutricosmetics som utvecklar premium kosttillskott med mätbar effekt och ett formspråk du vill ha framme. Vår filosofi är enkel: All ingredients have a story — written in science, told in results.

Varför vi finns
Kvalitet i kosttillskott handlar inte bara om att en ingrediens finns, utan vilken, i vilken form och på vilken nivå. Därför bygger vi våra formulor med branded, kliniskt studerade aktiva ämnen med tydliga specifikationer och doser i linje med forskningen. Resultatet är biotillgänglighet, tillförlitlighet och evidens som generiska blandningar inte kan matcha.

Vår signatur: Design × Science
Rutiner blir av när produkten får stå framme. Vår signaturburk är skapad för att leva på din bänk — medan innehållet arbetar i det tysta, varje dag.

Vad våra formulor adresserar

Skönhet inifrån: återfuktning, elasticitet och barriärstöd för hudens kvalitet.

Vardagsprestanda: energiomsättning (NAD⁺-vägar), fokus, återhämtning samt stöd för hjärta, hjärna och skelett.

Hår: näring för styrka, volym och glans.

Utveckling & tillverkning
Formulerat i Norden och tillverkat i Europa i anläggningar som följer etablerade kvalitetsstandarder. Varje steg styrs av precision: från råvaruval och kombinationer (t.ex. K2+D3, folat+B12) till kapsel och doseringsrekommendation.

Prenumeration & fördelar
Vår kundkrets väljer ofta Royal Circle – smidig prenumeration som säkrar kontinuitet i resultaten. Starta med 10% välkomstrabatt; efter sex månader fördubblas din förmån till 20%.

Vårt löfte
Vi bygger formulor som ska kännas i vardagen och hålla över tid.
Pure. Proven. Powerful.

Besök healthroyals.com och följ vår resa. Because you deserve the best.
