Name: Essencial Farmácia de Manipulação
Description:
Nossa história começa em 2003, mais precisamente no dia 26 de maio, quando o sonho de 4 farmacêuticos se tornou realidade e deu vida à Essencial: inauguramos a 1ª loja, em Taguatinga.

Nessa época, ainda não sabíamos que em poucos anos nos tornaríamos uma referência em manipulação farmacêutica no Distrito Federal.

Em 2007, o sonho que já era real se tornou maior: expandimos para o Plano Piloto, com a abertura de uma loja filial na 406 Sul. 

Nosso coração, já cheio de felicidade por cuidar da saúde de tantos clientes, transbordou! Em 2009, lançamos a Essencial VET, nossa marca veterinária. Nosso compromisso se tornava maior, para com toda a família, assim como a satisfação em atender também os animais de estimação.

Com a Essencial VET, nos tornamos a primeira farmácia de manipulação humana do DF a ter aprovação do MAPA para manipular medicamentos, cosméticos, suplementos, fitoterápicos e florais para uso veterinário.

2 anos depois, estávamos de casa nova. Mudamos de endereço em Taguatinga para um espaço com mais de 1.000 metros quadrados, onde estamos até hoje.

O tempo foi passando e a inovação nunca saiu da nossa essência. Nos tornamos, em 2019, a 1ª farmácia de manipulação do DF a realizar entregas com bicicletas e a utilizar energia solar!

UN SOUTIEN AJUSTABLE ET RASSURANT AU PLANCHER PELVIEN
Grâce à sa technicité brevetée, Pelvinity exerce une compression au niveau de la zone pelvienne qui soulage immédiatement et durablement les pesanteurs. Elle est le résultat de douze mois de tests en collaboration avec des professionnels (urologues, sage-femmes et gynécologues obstétriciens) et avec la participation de femmes volontaires.

PELVINITY, C’EST POUR QUI ?
Pour les femmes ressentant une lourdeur au niveau du périnée ou de la vulve, de manière chronique ou occasionnelle. Ces symptômes peuvent survenir à l’apparition de varices vulvaires (10% des femmes enceintes), d’un œdème pelvi-périnéal, d’un syndrome de congestion pelvienne, d’une descente d’organes (30 à 50% des femmes selon la HAS). Ils peuvent survenir aussi à certains moments du cycle menstruel ou lors du post-partum, des tranchées ou de la ménopause.

NOTRE MISSION
 Apporter aux femmes le maintien et le confort nécessaires pour leur permettre de retrouver une vie sociale, familiale et professionnelle normale, ou simplement de profiter d’une grossesse sereine. 
 Combattre les tabous liés à la santé intime des femmes pour une meilleure prise en charge de la douleur, plus précoce et plus efficace.

好的產品就是需要一絲不苟。茶鄉由選貨．採購・配備・絕不假手於人，從色澤、氣味、皮肉觀察、手感上嚴選真材，手選手包才最放心。茶鄉茶包源自優質的原材加上比坊間普遍更足料，才能做到每一口更入味，謹記我們的出品「一包點止一杯咁簡單」，用心為你炮製一杯濃郁芬芳的好茶。

 

我們新自手工製作伴手禮、散水回禮及企業活動禮物，茶鄉團隊抱著認真用心製作態度，為你提供多元禮盒設計、彈性預算選擇和心意包裝服務，完成一份不一樣的養生禮物，傳遞和分享你們的喜悅。

茶鄉與你分享生活中的茶香。我們致力推介各種適合男女老幼的養生好物及分享養生之道，方便攜帶、隨時沖泡、輕巧易保存是您上班上學的好伴侶，各款送禮套裝也是與你摯愛分享的最佳選擇。

Sebagai perusahaan yang menghargai kreativitas dan pertumbuhan, kami menciptakan budaya kerja inklusif yang mendukung pengembangan diri karyawan.

Visi :
Menjadi pelopor inovasi di dunia kecantikan dan kesehatan pada tahun 2030, dengan produk yang menginspirasi perubahan positif.

Misi :

1. Membangun brand yang menginspirasi perubahan positif.
2. Mempromosikan gaya hidup sehat dan alami secara transparan.
3. Menyediakan produk inovatif yang adaptif terhadap tren gaya hidup sehat.
4. Berkolaborasi dengan mitra untuk memperluas jangkauan dan pengaruh brand.
5. Membangun pengalaman yang transparan dan edukatif untuk menanamkan gaya hidup sehat.

Core Value :
Customer Care: 
Pelayanan hangat dan responsif.

Adaptasi: 
Belajar dan beradaptasi dengan perubahan.

Nurturing: 
Mendukung pertumbuhan dan pengembangan karyawan.

Transparansi: 
Komunikasi yang terbuka dan terpercaya.

Inovasi: 
Kreativitas untuk menciptakan nilai tambah.

Sinergi tim untuk mencapai tujuan bersama.

Name: Clean Life
Description:
Clean Life Concept Store, pokrenut od strane Instant Bridge d.o.o., ekskluzivnog distributera renomiranih brendova Blueair, Aquaporin i Birdie. Naša strast je poboljšati kvalitetu života kroz zdrav i čist okoliš. Kao vaš pouzdani partner, nudimo inovativna rješenja za pročišćavanje zraka, vode i detekciju CO2.

Uživajte u svježem i čistom zraku uz naše vrhunske uređaje za pročišćavanje zraka, koji uklanjaju viruse, patogene mikroorganizme, spore bakterije i plijesni, prašinu, pelud I alergene, dim cigareta, ispušne plinove, isparenje kemikalija, razni mirisi poput mirisa kućnih ljubimaca, stvarajući prostor za udahnuti punim plućima. 
Upoznajte pročišćivač vode ispod sudopera kojeg pokreće Aquaporin jedinstvena tehnologija pročišćivanja. Njegove karakteristike pružaju čistu vodu bez PFAS kemikalija, prirodnog okusa. Njegova tehnologija koristi jedinstveni membranski sustav temeljen na tehnologiji prirodnih proteina nagrađenoj Nobelovom nagradom. A2O Pure s tehnologijom Aquaporin Inside savršen je pročišćivač vode koji štedi prostor i nudi najveće stope uklanjanja zagađivača vode:Bez PFAS kemikalija, pesticida, teških metala, mikroplastike, virusa, hormona, nitrata i drugih štetnih zagađivača vode.

Sigurnost vam je važna. Jeste li znali da 90% svog života provedete u zatvorenom prostoru?                   Vrlo često u lošoj kvaliteti zraka, što povećava rizik od astme, glavobolje, alergija i poremećaja sna. (Procjenjuje se da samo u EU 80 milijuna domova ima lošu unutarnju kvalitetu zraka.) Stoga vam nudimo  detektoror CO2, osiguravajući da budete upozoreni i očuvate sigurno okruženje za vas i vaše najdraže.

Uz Clean Life, ostvarite kvalitetan život kroz čisti zrak, čistu vodu i sigurnost. Sveobuhvatna briga o vašem zdravlju i okolišu je naša misija. Pridružite nam se i iskusite harmoniju između čovjeka i prirode.

Name: Cerebro Spine Systems
Description:
We have specialized in manufacturing surgical screws, PEEK cages, and spinal surgery equipment for over 15 years in Izmir, Turkey.
CEREBRO is a spinal system providing a comprehensive range of implants and hand tools necessary for spine stabilization and correction in the thoracic, lumbar, and sacral regions, offering an array of rich alternatives.
The CEREBRO spinal system features self-tapping polyaxial screws, monoaxial screws, reduction screws, and iliac screws. It includes axial and parallel connectors of various diameters for treating complex spinal pathologies, lateral offset connectors, angled and extendable transverse connections, straight rods, and pre-bent rods with a self-lordosis angle. Additionally, the system offers all auxiliary implants, including various types of hooks.
The CEREBRO Screw System is made from biocompatible Titanium alloy (Ti6Al4V-ELI). It is designed for the fixation of the inferior and superior facets and features an anti-rotation mechanism to prevent back-out.

My friends and I called it the red wine "Funkk" and wanted it "OFF!" but we quickly realized that coffee, tea and food also easily stained our pearly whites - basically everything we ate and drank during our day took us steps away from fresh, white teeth.  

Single-use toothbrushes are bulky, pungent and NOT eco-friendly at all!  I sought out to invent a discreet, multi-use, all-in-one oral care solution that keeps your teeth white and your smile refreshed everywhere your busy, social life takes you!  

6 U.S. Patents issued (2 more pending)
3 U.S. Trademarks 

We pride ourselves in creating eco-friendly, innovative, discreet and portable oral care products that easily fit into today's social media-frenzied world where you need to be "Red Carpet Ready" whenever you step outside of your home. 

Shhhh...it's your secret weapon in your purse, pocket, car and desk!  Discreetly place it everywhere you stash gum, mints and chapstick.  No one needs to know how you keep your teeth white and smile refreshed.  

You work hard to have a white smile, keep it that way.    

You refresh your breath with gum & mints...
You refresh your lips with lip balms...
What do you refresh your teeth with?  

ANSWER: FunkkOFF! TeethRefreshers

How did your smile ever make it through the day and evening without your TeethRefreshers ?

Name: Pure Living, LLC
Description:
I started selling these products after using them myself for months. They are all organic, all-natural products.  No harsh chemicals or preservatives. These products are selling themselves! 

My story is kind of cool. ;) I didn’t necessarily intend to open this company.  I was putting sunblock on my 1 ½-year-old granddaughter and happened to notice the ingredients.  We try as a family to eat healthily and it occurred to me at that exact second, all the chemicals we absorb through our skin.  I started with the body scrubs.  Easy peasy.  Body butter - took a few tries and got it.  But, that sunblock...oh, that took about 3 months to nail down! :D  I started letting friends and family try and they urged me to start an Etsy shop.  I did.  And could not believe the feedback!

I truly love making products and enjoy making new ones!  So, enjoy, shop, and be assured that you will not absorb any harsh chemicals or preservatives with my products.

Thanks for stopping by!

~Julie

Name: Plenapausa
Description:
A Plenapausa é uma empresa dedicada exclusivamente ao bem-estar e à qualidade de vida de mulheres a partir dos 40 anos. Compreendemos profundamente os desafios e as transformações que ocorrem nessa fase da vida, especialmente durante a menopausa. Nosso compromisso é oferecer produtos de alta qualidade que promovam saúde, conforto e autoconfiança, ajudando nossas clientes a viverem plenamente essa etapa.

A transição para a menopausa é uma fase natural na vida de todas as mulheres, mas que pode trazer desconfortos significativos. Sintomas como ondas de calor, insônia, mudanças de humor, secura vaginal e diminuição da densidade óssea são comuns e podem afetar a qualidade de vida. Na Plenapausa, nossa missão é aliviar esses sintomas e proporcionar uma vida mais saudável e equilibrada.

Estamos comprometidos em ser mais do que uma empresa de produtos; queremos ser uma parceira na jornada de cada mulher, ajudando-a a abraçar esta fase da vida com confiança e alegria. Na Plenapausa, acreditamos que os 40+ são apenas o começo de uma nova e empolgante etapa, cheia de possibilidades e realizações. Convidamos você a descobrir nossos produtos e a experimentar os benefícios que podemos oferecer. Viva plenamente, viva com Plenapausa.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Hapkap
Description:
Hapkap, 2022 yılında Ecz. Ozan Barın Özel tarafından eczaneler , hastaneler gibi çeşitli sağlık kurumlarında çağdaş, yenilikçi bir ambalajlama sistemi ile hizmet sunma fikri olarak ortaya çıkmıştır. Hapkap, Celal Bayar Üniversitesi Teknokent’te; PlastOmega Teknoloji Sanayi ve Ticaret A.Ş. ve Manisa PDA İç ve Dış Ticaret Ltd. Şti. iş birliği ile sağlık sektöründe ambalajlama ve bilişim alanında Ar-Ge çalışmalarına devam etmektedir. 


Ecz. Ozan Barın ÖZEL, motivasyonunu şu şekilde anlatmaktadır. 


‘Hapkap’ ın tasarlama  sebebim, dedemin hastalıklarıydı. Dedem, hem geriatri hem polifarmasi hasta grubunda olduğu için ilaçlarının kullanım zamanlarını ve ilaçların biçimlerini birbirine karıştırıyordu. Bu tarz karışıklıklarda dedemi, ilaçların yarattığı istenmeyen etkilerden ötürü acile götürmek durumunda kalıyorduk. Acilden çıktığımızda, başta babaannem olmak üzere; dedemin ilaçlarının takibini artık ailecek yapmaya başlamıştık. Bu takibi bütün aile yapmamıza rağmen bizim bile aklımızda birkaç sefer ‘Kalp ilacını verdik mi,bu içtiği diyabet içindi değil mi,bugün x ilacından 50 mg mı alıyordu?’ gibi sorular oluşmuştu. Yani dedeme hak vermeye başlamıştık. Gerçekten polifarmasi hastalarının işi çok zordu. Yaşlarının ilerlemesiyle daha özel bir grup olmaları da cabası… İşte benim hikayem de tam burada başladı. Dedem gibi milyonlarca polifarmasi hastasına ve ilaç alma zamanında veya dozunda sıkıntı yaşayan dünya üzerindeki her insana tedavileri konusunda  çözüm üretmek istedim. İlaçları ile oluşabilecek sıkıntılara bariyer olmak için HapKap’ı yarattım. İlaca karşı önyargıları kırmak istedim. Tedavi planının nasıl daha eğlenceli olabileceği üzerine kurgular kurdum. Tabi ki bunların hepsini eczacı kimliğimle oluşturdum.’’

In the quest of understanding Ayurveda, we at J-AMADA found that Ayurveda is the only “Science” which understands life. The unity of man and nature thus becomes a fundamental postulate of Ayurveda. This means without the knowledge about nature, the knowledge of human remains incomplete. Ayurveda is more a way of life, a way of learning how to cooperate with nature and live in harmony. Ayurveda balances and rejuvenates living organisms as it emphasizes prevention over cure. Preserving this harmony with nature makes Ayurvedic medicine an art to preserve life. With this art of “preserving life” as a core philosophy, J-AMADA was conceptualised and brought to light by its founder members. From three products to more than 600 products till date, it has been a wonderful journey for J-AMADA since its inception in 1999. 

MISSION:

Our mission is to bring about an understanding of Ayurvedic way of life to every household in the country and beyond. This two decades of our journey has brought about smiles to many across the globe through our products.

 
VISION:

Our vision has been to bring joy to everyone by preserving life through Ayurveda.

 
QUALITY:

We employ a variety of processes and procedures to ensure the quality and safety of our products. We randomly audit our ingredient suppliers to ensure they’re following good cultivation/collection practices and adhering to regulations. We test ingredients and finished products in our state-of-the-art, in-house laboratories, which entails approximately 500 tests on a monthly basis.
From the time an ingredient enters our facilities to the time the finished product is shipped out to customers, we exhaustively analyse and test to ensure you’re getting a product that you can trust to be safe and effective for its intended purpose.

Have you ever dreaded the moment of dropping yet another empty bottle of shampoo or face wash into the recycling bin and hoping it would get recycled? Well, we have. As it turns out, only 6% of all plastic waste is actually recycled with most of it ending up in landfills, or worse yet, the environment. All of this got us thinking: what could we do to reduce the environmental impact of products we use everyday? 

BRIXY creates beauty conscious personal care products that are mindfully made using clean ingredients. Our bars are planet friendly without any plastic packaging. We also educate about sustainable living while supporting the planet through our give to a non-profit we created. 

The team behind BRIXY has a proven track record of working together and delivering exceptional results for the world. We act as a family and are constantly holding ourselves accountable.

Name: Selph
Description:
Better health starts with better insight.
At Selph, we’re on a mission to help more people feel better now — while protecting their health for the years ahead.

We offer doctor-led, diagnostic-first healthcare that puts people in control. Through at-home blood and stool tests, personalised consultations, and long-term health planning, we help individuals understand what’s really going on in their bodies — and what to do about it.

Whether you're tackling a specific symptom, navigating a life stage like menopause, or simply want to future-proof your health, Selph gives you the clarity, support, and direction to move forward with confidence.

We practise what’s known as Medicine 3.0 — a smarter, more preventative and personalised approach to healthcare. One that’s rooted in science, guided by your needs, and focused on long-term vitality, not just short-term fixes.

Our five foundations shape everything we do:
 Prevention
 Personalisation
 Prediction
 Participation
 Psychology

At Selph, we don’t wait for symptoms to appear.
We help people spot the early signs of dysfunction and course-correct before problems take hold — using:

 Advanced health testing (blood, gut, hormones, cancer screening)
 Doctor-led consultations that prioritise prevention, not just diagnosis
 Tailored health plans that evolve with your goals
 Ongoing support — because health is a journey, not a one-off fix

We meet people where they are, with the right tools and insights to help them thrive — not just survive.

 The science of Selph is what we measure.
 The soul of Selph is how we support.

Because even with all the data in the world, the most powerful thing we offer is a sense of partnership.

Better health starts here. And it starts with you.

Name: Showee

Merecemos ducharnos a gusto!
Ducharse es uno de los pequeños placeres de la vida, y no debería ser diferente para nadie.
Desafortunadamente, hay muchas personas con movilidad reducida o con alguna disfuncionalidad cognitiva, para las que la ducha es un momento estresante y difícil, tanto para ellos como para sus familiares y cuidadores. 

Es por eso que en Showee hemos decidido cambiar esta realidad para siempre.

Hemos desarrollado una ducha eco-inteligente que cambia la experiencia de ducharse para las personas que lo viven como un momento estresante por miedo a caídas y falta de privacidad, por un momento relajante y más íntimo.

Nuestra ducha es única en el mercado porque se adapta tanto a las dificultades físicas y de movilidad como a las discapacidades intelectuales y sensoriales. 

Es muy fácil de usar, y cuenta con un detector de caídas y un asistente virtual que proporciona acompañamiento remoto cuando es necesario (lo que la hace de gran ayuda tanto para la familia como para hospitales y centros de salud).

Un opticien expert Un Dixième+, est avant tout un professionnel de santé visuelle doté de qualités humaines et relationnelles fortes, de grandes capacités d’écoute et d’analyse des besoins de ses clients, car la prise en charge des patients souffrant de malvoyance ou de basse vision, nécessite un accompagnement sur-mesure particulier, afin de pouvoir proposer des solutions totalement personnalisées.

Un opticien Un Dixième+, grâce à son expertise acquise lors des formations, est un acteur indispensable de l’équipe thérapeutique et ainsi être parfaitement intégré dans le parcours de soin du patient. Enfin, n’oublions pas que la meilleure aide visuelle est avant tout celle qui redonne à la personne malvoyante le plaisir de faire les choses elle-même, de retrouver de la mobilité et de l’autonomie dans sa vie quotidienne.

Skincare Edit was created to change that.

We represent and bring intelligent, results-driven brands to life across retail, spa, clinic, and hospitality — creating strategies that translate global success into regional relevance. Every partnership is built on deep market insight, scientific credibility, and a commitment to long-term growth.

We don’t just move stock — we build brands with longevity. From in-clinic education to retail activations and digital storytelling, we equip our partners with the tools, training, and strategy they need to thrive.

Because what sells well in Sephora New York doesn’t always translate here.
Different culture. Different consumer behaviour. Different expectations.

Our work bridges that gap — helping brands, spas, clinics, and retailers grow with confidence, context, and clarity.

If you’re a beauty or wellness brand seeking expert regional representation, or a spa, clinic, or retailer looking to elevate your offering with performance-led products, we’d love to connect.

Name: ENOWA SKINCARE
Description:
At Enowa Skincare, we believe in the transformative power of nature. Our mission is to inspire a return to natural skincare because what’s best for the earth is also best for us.

We’re redefining skincare by going back to where it all began—using pure, natural ingredients. Our Enowa products are carefully curated, all-natural skincare essentials designed to nourish the skin and enhance the well-being.

Enowa was born for the modern traveler those who seek meaningful experiences and want to care for their skin naturally while on the move. Our products are designed to be both effective and travel-friendly, helping you stay connected to nature wherever you go

Our Collection:
 Cleansing Balm
 Serum
 Cream
 Lip Balm

Brand Story:

Enowa was founded by two women united by a passion for natural skincare. With Mediterranean roots, they blend their cultural heritage with the finest olive oil renowned for its rich antioxidants and deeply hydrating properties to create pure, effective skincare. Our Mediterranean olive oil comes directly from North Cyprus and Puglia, Italy, and is used in all our formulations.

At Enowa, skincare is more than just a routine it’s a celebration of nature, tradition, and the belief that true beauty comes from the simplest, most authentic ingredients. That’s why every formula is handmade using only natural, high-quality ingredients, completely free from toxins, harsh chemicals, and synthetic additives. Enowa Skincare is committed to purity, ensuring that every product nourishes your skin with only the cleanest ingredients nature has to offer.

Our skincare range is anhydrous, meaning no water is added to our formulas. This eliminates the need for preservatives, allowing us to use only rich butters and oils. We believe natural skincare is the way forward for healthier skin and a healthier you.

Join us on this journey to embrace the beauty of nature.

For more information, reach out to at contact@enowaskincare.com.

Follow us for insights

Name: Leggun, les cosmétiques aux bienfaits des fruits et légumes déclassés
Description:
Leggun, qu'est-ce que c'est ? 

Leggun, c'est bien plus qu'une marque de cosmétique naturelle. C'est une mission, une passion, et un engagement fort contre le gaspillage alimentaire. Nous avons décidé de révolutionner le monde de la beauté en intégrant les bienfaits pour la peau des fruits et légumes difformes au cœur de notre processus de fabrication de savons.

 Comment nous est venue l'idée ? 

Tout a commencé lors de notre dernière année de master à Sup de Pub, où nous avions pour mission de créer une entreprise. En quête d'inspiration, une soirée devant "Qui Veut Etre Mon Associé ?" a tout changé. Fabien a eu une révélation .

Ainsi est née l'idée d'un projet avec du sens, d'un projet à impact, d'une mission concrète : lutter contre le gaspillage alimentaire des fruits et légumes, produits du dur labeur de nos agriculteurs français.

En France, pas moins de 10 millions de tonnes de denrées alimentaires sont gaspillées chaque année, l'équivalent de 10 stades de foot remplis à ras bord. Les premières victimes sont les fruits et légumes, rejetés pour des critères stricts de la grande distribution ou une surproduction.

La question s'est imposée : Comment pourrions-nous éviter le gaspillage des fruits et légumes déclassés alors qu'ils sont rejetés par la grande distribution pour leur fonction première : nourrir ?

Notre réponse a pris la forme de savons solides, une alternative à laquelle nous croyons profondément. Bien sûr, il existe de nombreuses solutions, et chacun de nous a un rôle à jouer pour trouver la sienne . 

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure qui donne une nouvelle vie aux légumes moches et qui, nous l'espérons, changera la donne dans la lutte contre le gaspillage alimentaire.

Name: OPHYCURE France
Description:
Marque détenue par les Laboratoires Phyco-Biotech.

Production et Recherche Française
Produits 100% Naturels, 100% Végans et 100% Français.

Ophycure, c'est la maîtrise de toute la chaîne de production : Recherche, développement des formules, culture des microalgues, enrichissement en oligo-éléments et contrôle qualité. 

NOUS SOMMES DES CHERCHEURS INVESTIS
Depuis plus de 12 ans, nos chercheurs en physiologie végétale collaborent avec des équipes de l’université des Sciences et de Médecine de Montpellier, en association avec l’Inserm. 

Notre savoir-faire ? Révolutionner la nutraceutique grâce à la science en développant une nouvelle génération d'oligo-éléments organiques et hautement bioassimilables, tirée des propriétés exceptionnelles d'une micro-algue : la Spiruline. 
En effet, grâce à notre procédé breveté, l’oligo-élément introduit dans le milieu de culture de la spiruline est métabolisé et prend sa forme organique. Il devient donc directement utilisable par notre organisme (on parle alors de Bioassimilation).

NOUS SOMMES DES CULTIVATEURS ECORESPONSABLES
En ayant fait le choix d’avoir nos propres cultures de spiruline, en France, dans l’Hérault, nous sommes sûrs de maîtriser la qualité et la traçabilité de nos produits. Pour assurer la pureté de notre spiruline, nous prélevons notre eau à 15 mètres de profondeur, la filtrons à 5 microns, la stérilisons par UV puis faisons faire des analyses de contrôle par un Laboratoire indépendant et agréé COFRAC.
Enfin, en tant qu'entreprise responsable, nous utilisons une source d'énergie renouvelable et locale pour notre consommation électrique.

She dug into ancient extraction techniques and came up with a medical cannabis oil that tackles cancer and eases its rough edges. It’s not just a product; it’s her fight made real.
She’s also a bit of a trailblazer when it comes to soft tissue repair. Robin’s crafted herbal solutions for things like spinal cord injuries and brain trauma, helping people manage chronic pain without leaning on pills. Her whole deal is about healing the body, mind, and spirit together; because that’s what it takes to feel truly balanced. That’s why she started Swan Apothecary: to share what she’s learned and make a difference, one person at a time.

With all her years as a business owner, product maker, and healer, Robin’s got a depth of knowledge that’s hard to match. Swan Apothecary is her way of putting it all out there - quality, care, and a real shot at a better life.

Our Brand Promise
Here at Swan Apothecary, we’re all about giving you the best cannabidiol products we can make; honest, high-quality stuff you can trust. We keep it small-batch, using local ingredients whenever we can, and skip all the junk like fillers or waxes. From the folks growing our hemp to the hands packing your order, we know everyone involved - and we’re proud of that. If you’ve got questions or just want to chat, we’re only an email away at info@swanapothecary.com. We’d love to hear from you.

Description:
We’ve been there and know the struggles with cancer, so we designed pajamas, gowns, clothing, and accessories that are fiercely stylish, insanely comfortable, and extremely functional for women going through their cancer treatment or hospitalization journey. There are snaps for easy access to ports, IVs, drips, and PICCS in all the right places and sturdy pockets to hold drains or other medical devices. Every element is thoughtfully designed. 

After going through our own cancer journeys, we focus on functionality and comfort while also allowing patients to feel and look their best. We like to say at KickIt Pajamas, we are Stylishly Dressing Women for Battle. 

Current products include Hospital Pajamas and Gowns, Recovery Pajamas, Capes, and Scarves for chilly treatment rooms - to name a few. We are working passionately and continuously to enhance and create new adaptive clothing products - always with the patient and medical workers in mind.  

We sell our products on Etsy, Amazon, and on our website (kickitpajamas.com). 

We have two ambitions at KickIt Pajamas. First, to end 'Hospital Butt" (you know...the embarrassing opening on the back of hospital gowns) in order to improve the overall dignity of women going through treatment. Ambition number two is to kick cancer off the planet! Every year we donate a portion of proceeds to cancer research and patient support organizations. We have a partnership with Susan G. Komen where we donate a portion of sales of our Rose Pink Recovery Pajamas to support their mission of ending breast cancer forever.

Let's kick cancer off the planet while providing style, comfort, and functionality to women who need it the most.

Name: Deep Holistics
Description:
Welcome to a new era of personalised healthcare backed by science, where your body's story is finally heard and understood. 

Deep Holistics is a health and wellness solution driven by advanced diagnostics and technology. Our mission? To enable people to look, feel and perform 10/10, every day -  so they can create greater impact in the world.

How Do We Do It? 
- Hyper-personalised insights from gene, gut, blood and wearable device data.
- Root-cause analysis to help you prevent, manage and control health issues.
- Science-backed approach that provides actionable recommendations for peak performance and a longer, healthier life.

How Are We Different?
We interconnect data from our blood biomarker test, gut microbiome test, genetic test and wearable devices. This is a synergy of biomarkers and lifestyle, not found in any other health assessment in India and helps us see the big picture. The devices include a smart ring, CGM, smart scale and BP monitor. We layer the data with our expertise, to outline pathways to improvement.

What Do You Get?
- Intelligence in the form of a book, called the Human Token - a blueprint of your current health and possible concern areas. 
- Recommendations on lifestyle, supplements and an Ask Your Doctor section - to improve on those concern areas.
- Continued access to the devices and a companion App for tracking, monitoring and insights. 
- 1-year, exclusive access to your personal panel of health experts.

We are here to guide people on a journey towards better health by addressing the root causes of all concerns and helping prevent, manage and control - with the ultimate aim of giving people more agency over themselves.

This was our North Star as we created XOMD Skin. Using an Oxytocin effect, “the love hormone,” a powerful anti-oxidant, anti-inflammatory and mood elevator as our foundation we added unique phyto-proteins, peptides and phospholipid to amplify skin quality and mood elevating benefits. The formula (OXFactor) took years to get right and when finally ready, we challenged it in the most rigorously designed double blinded placebo controlled trial. Such strict standard of testing is rarely done for topical cosmetics. But if we were going to put our names on it, we had to convince ourselves first.  When we received the study results, we were astonished. Those who applied the XOMD products as directed experienced robust and statistically significant improvement, as compared to placebo, in skin quality and mood. But to our surprise they also reported a profound satisfaction increase in intimacy. Romantic relations improved in 90% of categories tested. This was an unexpected benefit to our formula and elevates XOMD as first of its kind. A topical cosmetic formula that has proven benefits in skin quality, mood and intimacy. The world's first ever Moodceutical.
Results can be expected in as little four weeks and continue improvement experienced through 8 weeks. 
We invite you to test it for yourself and see what happens.
Let us know.
Sabrina and Steve

Name: naturbrush
Description:
Porqué Naturbrush

Una frase de Galeano, que en tiempos, no le di más valor, pero que ahora alcanzaba todo el sentido del mundo, transformándose en la respuesta a todas las preguntas, a esas ansias de hacer algo para cambiarlo todo: «Mucha gente pequeña en lugares pequeños, haciendo cosas pequeñas pueden cambiar el mundo».

A partir de ahí surge la idea de Naturbrush, la primera marca española de cepillos dentales hechos de bambú  biodegradable.

Un producto artesanal, ligero, natural. Un pequeño cambio en nuestra vida diaria que puede configurar grandes logros a largo plazo. Porque su fabricación en bambú no sólo ayuda a no invadir ni deforestar los espacios naturales libres, sino que además su cultivo contribuye a aumentar la masa forestal global gracias a un crecimiento rápido y vigoroso, ya que en seis semanas el bambú puede alcanzar los 30 metros de altura, para lo cual un pino mediterráneo necesitaría varias décadas.

El bambú es un antibacteriano natural, repele microbios y agentes externos que se acumulan en el tradicional cepillo de plástico.  En pocos días notaremos la notable diferencia del cambio al tener un Naturbrush en el cuarto de baño, ocupándose de nuestra higiene bucal.

 Cuando fruto del desgaste realices el cambio de tu Naturbrush por cualquier otro de nuestra gama, podrás enterrar el viejo en tu jardín, o en una maceta, y comprobar por ti mismo como en un corto período de tiempo ha desaparecido por completo, ahorrándole así al mundo un residuo contaminante a procesar. 

Sonrisa feliz, planeta feliz.

Los cepillos biodegradables de Naturbrush ya son una realidad. Listos, para acabar en manos de mucha gente pequeña, que en lugares pequeños puedan contribuir a cambiar el mundo.

Ahora depende de ti, si quieres ser parte del cambio y formar parte de nuestra comunidad Naturbrush accede a nuestra web natur-brush.com y empieza a cuidar tanto tu sonrisa como de la del planeta.

Description:
Welcome to Ocusleep — Where Better Sleep Begins.

Our mission is to improve your sleep with scientifically designed blue light-blocking glasses. Developed by eye doctors, our products help naturally regulate your sleep by blocking the wavelengths of light that disrupt the release of melatonin, the sleep-inducing hormone.

Our Products:

Ocusleep glasses come in 3 shapes, OS-1, OS-2, and OS-3 models, each crafted with premium ultra-light TR90 technology and ophthalmic CR-39 lenses for maximum comfort and efficacy. These glasses are designed to fit various face sizes and are perfect for use before bedtime, ensuring you can fall asleep naturally without the interference of blue light from screens.

14-Day Sleep Challenge Guarantee: We are confident in our technology and offer a 14-day trial. If you don't see an improvement in your sleep, you can return the glasses for a full refund, no questions asked.
Why Ocusleep?

Backed by Science: Our glasses block harmful blue and green light spectrums emitted by screens and LEDs, which are known to interfere with sleep. By wearing Ocusleep glasses in the evening, you're setting yourself up for a night of restful, uninterrupted sleep.

Health Benefits: Quality sleep is crucial not just for good mornings but for maintaining overall health. It aids in better mental and physical performance and reduces the risk of chronic conditions like diabetes and high blood pressure.

Join Us:

Follow our journey on LinkedIn as we continue to innovate and help people around the world achieve better sleep. Stay updated with the latest in sleep science, tips, product updates, and exclusive promotions at Ocusleep.com.

Description:

Fondée sur les principes de la médecine intégrative, Be Healthy allie pratiques médicales conventionnelles et alternatives pour promouvoir une approche préventive et globale de votre santé. 

Nous proposons une gamme de compléments alimentaires naturels, conçus et recommandés par des professionnels de santé, répondant à vos besoins spécifiques en nutrition, micronutrition, soin de la peau, santé naturelle, sport et bien-être au quotidien.

Une approche personnalisée pour chaque étape de vie :
Notre mission est d’aider vos patients à atteindre leur plein potentiel, à chaque étape de leur vie. Qu’il s’agisse de gérer la ménopause, de préparer ou récupérer après une intervention chirurgicale (pré et post-opératoire), ou encore d’améliorer l’état de la peau, nos protocoles ciblés et naturels accompagnent vos patients dans leur quête de bien-être optimal.

Des routines et protocoles spécifiques :
Nous développons des protocoles dédiés, tels que :
- Gestion de la ménopause : un soutien pour atténuer les symptômes et améliorer la qualité de vie.
- Préparation et récupération chirurgicale : des compléments pour optimiser les résultats postopératoires.

Name: Diabetescentrale.nl
Description:
Over de Diabetescentrale.nl
Diabetescentrale.nl, gestart in 2005, en is dé online specialist op het gebied van diabetes. Voor particulieren die hun testmateriaal en andere producten zelf moeten betalen, insulinegebruikers die hun testmateriaal onder de Basisverzekering vergoed krijgen van hun verzekeraar, huisdiereigenaren die een hond of kat met diabetes hebben en zakelijke klanten die actief zijn op het gebied van humane of veterinaire diabetes. Maar ook voor particulieren en professionals die bezig zijn met diabetes zoals ziekenhuizen, huisartsen, fysiotherapeuten en diëtisten. Diabetescentrale.nl by Wecare Medical is Part of the Optigroup.

Vitaal, krachtig en op groei gericht
Wij zijn een markt gedreven en op groei gericht medisch bedrijf, gevestigd aan de Strubbenweg te Almere. Zelfstandigheid vinden wij belangrijk. Wij maken graag onze eigen keuzes. Om snel op nieuwe ontwikkelingen in te kunnen spelen of liever nog ze mee richting te geven. Onafhankelijk van beslissingen in de politiek of door verzekeraars op het gebied van (vergoedingen in de) gezondheidszorg en belangen van fabrikanten en hun productportfolio’s.

Zorgzaam, aandachtig en betrokken
De naam diabetescentrale.nl zegt het al. We concentreren ons volledig op diabetes. Dat doen we met oog voor de mens en detail. Ook de (ogenschijnlijk) kleine dingen moeten kloppen, goed voelen. Van klantenservice tot website en van productkwaliteit tot verzending. Of u nu diabeet, huisdiereigenaar of zorgprofessional bent. Nu en in de toekomst. Daarom garanderen wij samen met onze partners (DHL, Acadia en Optigroup) 100% CO2-neutraal pakketvervoer en dataopslag, 100% chloorvrij en FSC verpakkingsmateriaal en gebruik van 100% duurzaam opgewekte energie (wind en water).

Betrouwbaar, duidelijk en veilig
Verbaast u zich over hulpmiddelenleveranciers die geen prijzen tonen op hun website? Wij ook. Wij geloven in duidelijkheid en transparantie.

Name: Ergonomiewebshop
Description:
Het goed inrichten van je werkplek moet niet moeilijk zijn, toch? Dat vinden wij nu ook. Sinds 2009 zijn we werkzaam als specialist in de ergonomie. Dagelijks geven we zowel in Nederland als in Duitsland bedrijven en werkplekken een ergonomische boost door gebruik te maken van ergonomische producten. We streven ernaar je werkplek comfortabel te maken, het werkplezier te verhogen en je pijnvrij weer naar huis te laten gaan na een productieve werkdag achter je beeldschermwerkplek. Op ergonomiewebshop.nl hebben we een ruim assortiment aan ergonomische producten om je werkplek comfortabeler te maken. Of dat nu op kantoor, je thuiswerkplek of onderweg is, onze ergonomische producten helpen je elke dag weer om comfortabeler te werken.

Minder klachten
Ergonomische producten zijn er niet voor niks. Het is geen marketing-blabla. Goede ergonomische producten zijn bewezen effectief in het verminderen van veelvoorkomende klachten die optreden bij beeldschermwerk, denk aan: RSI, KANS, pijn in de rug, de nek, de schouders, de arm of pols.

Meer werkplezier
Werk je comfortabel, haal je meer plezier uit je werk. Een eenvoudige rekensom. Je hoeft je immers niet meer druk te maken over een slecht zittende bureaustoel, de verkeerde bureauhoogte of slechte accessoires. Werkplezier begint bij goede comfortabele producten, passend bij jouw situatie en werkplek.

Productievere dagen
Een comfortabele beeldschermwerkplek is een win-win. Zowel voor jezelf als voor je omgeving. Je bent vrolijker, effectiever en productiever. De focus ligt namelijk op je werkzaamheden in plaats van op je werkplek, dat komt de productiviteit ten goede.

Name: Ancestral Nourishment
Description:
Ancestral Nourishment is a small, family-run business in Cape Town, South Africa. We are passionate about promoting the benefits of primitive living and bringing the lifestyle tenets of our ancestors to the fore of modern lives.

Ancestral Nourishment was established in 2020, after, founder, Reeco Stewart, finished his honours degree in Biokinetics at Stellenbosch University. Over the course of his studies, his interest in nutrition piqued; the fundamental role of diet in promoting optimal health becoming all too apparent.

Dr Weston A Price—a researcher who studied the diets of healthy primitive people—and local regenerative farmer Angus McIntosh were foundational figures in the establishment of Ancestral Nourishment and our company ethos.

Fully aware of both the power of an animal-centric diet and the direct impact food quality has on human and environmental health outcomes, sourcing the highest quality, local animal products with clear benefits rooted in ancestral wisdom was, and remains, our aim.

With our stated ethos, it would be remiss of us to not place significant emphasis on the most prized ancestral foods; organ meats. This drove us to develop a range of grass fed, regeneratively raised, hormone and antibiotic-free organ meat capsules to enable fellow South African’s to benefit from these sacred foods if they don’t have access to quality fresh organ meats or simply cannot stomach the taste.

Our understanding of the profound benefits of traditional diet and lifestyle practices drove our desire to see more tenets of ancestral living adopted by modern man. Ancestral Nourishment is our part in making this happen.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

The UK faces a widespread and systemic shortage of breastfeeding support; while 81% of babies born each year are initially breastfed, around 80% of mothers stop before they would like to, and only 1% exclusively breastfeed for the World Health Organisation’s recommended six months.

Breastfeeding can be challenging, but the right support can make a real difference. 

Mamilla empowers mothers to make informed, personalised choices, helping them find what works best for their own feeding journey. By combining the Mamilla app with a tactile training doll, Mamilla introduces a new approach to breastfeeding education, by giving mothers a hands-on practice run. 

During the later stages of pregnancy mothers can practice with Mamilla so that they go into breastfeeding feeling prepared, empowered and confident. Post-birth, Mamilla is on-hand to provide support when most of the difficulties arise.


Contact: info@mamillabreastfeeding.com

Incorporated in 2010, Yunnan Botanee Bio-Technology Group Co., Ltd. is a leading force in the big health industry. On March 25, 2021, Botanee was listed on the ChiNext Market of Shenzhen Stock Exchange (stock code: 300957), and became the No. 1 listed company of functional skin care products in China*.

Recognized as a national high-tech enterprise, Botanee encompasses an R&D Center that integrates industry, academia, research, and healthcare. By harnessing advanced technologies in dermatology, biology, and botany, it investigates active ingredients found in unique plants from the Yunnan plateau to fuel the development of a new generation of functional skin care products. Botanee's skincare brand "Winona" implements patented technologies along with dermatological-grade gentle formulas in its manufacturing process, adhering to the Good Manufacturing Practice of Cosmetics (GMPC) standards that apply to cosmetics destined for the US and EU markets. The efficacy and safety of Winona products have won widespread acclaim from both dermatologists and consumers.

Through the channel strategy that combines foundational offline drug distribution and comprehensive online coverage, Botanee has seen high rates of annual growth since its incorporation. Capitalizing on new technologies such as the Internet and artificial intelligence (AI), Botanee has spearheaded the creation of a comprehensive omnichannel retail system. Name: Mïron
Description:
mïron - Grec Ancien (Nom Commun) : "substance aromatique pour se parfumer".

 1 parfum sur 3 n'est jamais porté. 1 Français sur 2 possède un parfum qu'il ne porte pas. 

Mïron est la 1ère plateforme de parfums de seconde main, pour acheter & vendre des parfums authentiques, sans gaspillage ni surproduction. 

Chaque parfum est authentifié par un expert (nez) certifiant qu'il n'est ni périmé, ni contrefait.

L’idée naît officieusement fin 2019, lorsque son fondateur de 19 ans à l’époque travaille dans le corner parfumerie d’un grand magasin. Régulièrement, il assiste à la même scène : une personne vient, se parfume et repart. Elle finit par lui confier que faute de pouvoir l’acheter, elle s’offre parfois quelques gouttes de son parfum préféré. Désemparé, Jules cherche des solutions et découvre un marché où coexistent prix inabordables et flacons inutilisés. Jules a une intuition : et si le parfum des uns faisait le bonheur des autres ?  

Tentez l’expérience Mïron, et participer à mettre du Bon dans le Beau : https://miron.cc/

Name: Istituto Acustico Maico
Description:
MAICO (Medical Acoustics Instruments Company) nasce nel 1937 a Minneapolis, e approda in Italia nel 1957. Proprio in quell’anno, Serafino Menzietti varca per la prima volta la soglia della sede MAICO di Pescara, entrando in quella che sarebbe presto diventata la sua seconda casa. Nel 1964 inizia la sua avventura da imprenditore rilevando il brand; oggi continua ancora a scrivere la storia di una delle aziende più solide del centro-sud Italia, l’Istituto Acustico MAICO, con cui negli anni ha inaugurato nuove sedi in Abruzzo, Puglia, Molise, Basilicata, Lazio e Umbria. 

Nel 1998 il figlio Mauro entra stabilmente a far parte dell’organico aziendale, divenendone amministratore dopo qualche anno.
Mauro Menzietti è tra i principali protagonisti del settore audioprotesico: è Presidente dell’ANA, Associazione Nazionale Audioprotesisti, membro del Board della AEA, European Association of Hearing Aid Professionals, e direttore della rivista L’Audioprotesista, organo ufficiale di categoria. 

Con Udito Italia, onlus che ha iniziato la sua attività nel 2009, Menzietti è membro italiano nel direttivo del World Hearing Forum in seno all’OMS di Ginevra. Da sempre consapevole dell’importanza e del valore della prevenzione, ha inoltre fondato Nonno AscoltamI!, l’evento di sensibilizzazione sui disturbi uditivi che coinvolge tutti i professionisti del settore, patrocinato dalla Presidenza del Consiglio e dal Ministero della Salute, supportato dell’OMS e premiato con la Medaglia della Presidenza della Repubblica.

Dal 1999 Antonio Lauriola collabora alla gestione delle aziende in Puglia, delle quali attualmente è amministratore. Anche Lauriola ricopre importanti ruoli all’interno dell’ANAP, di cui è Consigliere Nazionale e Delegato Regionale per la Puglia, e dal 2025 è Segretario della Commissione d’Albo Nazionale dei Tecnici Audioprotesisti.

Découvrez le pouvoirs des probiotiques actifs comme source de bien-être pour votre peau.

La Bo&ssie : des soins cosmétiques innovants aux probiotiques actifs pour la santé et la jeunesse de votre peau.
Les cures la Bo&ssie reconstituent votre flore cutanée, véritable bouclier naturel de votre peau.
Les imperfections disparaissent, votre peau est confortable et votre peau est protégée des agressions extérieures et de leurs méfaits comme le vieillissement prématuré.  

La Bo&ssie propose 4 cures de 28 jours,  aux efficacités prouvées,  adaptées à votre type de peau:
Pour les peaux mixtes à grasses, la routine verte: adieu boutons, imperfections et points noirs, votre production de sébum est réduite et votre grain de peau est affiné.
Pour les peaux sensibles, la routine rose : votre peau est apaisée, nourrie, les rougeurs disparaisent et votre peau est protégée.
Pour les peaux sèches, la routine bleue : votre peau est hydratée, revitalisée et votre teint est lumineux.
Pour les peaux matures, la routine rouge: votre peau est lissée et raffermie et elle retrouve son élasticité et confort.

La cure 28j la Bo&ssie, c'est une routine simple en 3 étapes:
Démaquiller/nettoyer votre visage selon votre envie avec l'huile de soin démaquillante ou la solution micellaire
Hydrater/tonifier votre visage avec la brume botanique adaptée à votre peau.
Traiter/ protéger avec le soin sérum adapté à votre peau.

La Bo&ssie est labellisée slow-cosmétique et a reçu le prix d'innovation SPA et Esthétique.
Les soins présentent une efficacité prouvée
Les soins sont naturels, bio, Eco-conçus
Les soins sont Made In France

Name: Pharmacie Cantonale de Truchtersheim
Description:
"Ensemble, Aujourd'hui, pour la Santé de Demain"

La Pharmacie Cantonale de Truchtersheim est située au coeur du Kochersberg à 15 minutes au Nord Ouest de Strasbourg, au sein du Pôle Santé K-hub. Elle accueille chaque mois plus de 10 000 patients et clients dans le cadre de la dispensation de leur traitement médicamenteux ou en recherche de conseils de 1er recours et de solutions de santé.

Sur une surface de près de 1000 m2, elle offre un large choix de produits en Pharmacie et parapharmacie et de multiples services : vaccination, tests, entretiens pharmaceutiques, orthopédie, matériel médical, maintien à domicile, préparation de doses administrées, piluliers, ateliers santé, analyse de la composition corporelle, plan personnalisé de santé, ...

Ses deux pharmaciens titulaires, la Dr Julie BOEHER- WALCK et le Dr Xavier SCHNEIDER, aidés dune vingtaine de collaborateurs, dont 5 pharmaciens adjoints, 6 préparateurs en pharmacie, et 1 infirmière-conseil, permettent à chacune et chacun d'avoir une réponse experte à toute demande de conseil et d'orienter au mieux patient, client, usager et citoyen dans leur parcours de santé, de la prévention à la prise en charge des maladies chroniques, dans le cadre d'un exercice coordonné avec l'ensemble des professionnels de santé.
Les pharmaciens et préparateurs de la Pharmacie Cantonale sont aussi diplômés par les université de Strasbourg, Dijon, Grenoble et Paris-Diderot en Orthopédie, Qualité, Santé Connectée, Neurosciences, Physionutrition Cliniques, Phytothérapie et Aromathérapie Clinique, ainsi qu'en Sciences Vétérinaires.

La Pharmacie Cantonale est une pharmacie avant-gardiste et innovante qui apporte à chaque patient et client les meilleurs solutions possible pour leur santé et celles de leurs proches, en mettant au coeur de son service la relation humaine.

 #RelationHumaine #SolutionSante #DeclicSante #Pharmacie #ParaPharmacie #Aroma #Phyto #SanteConnectee #MaintienDomicile #SportSante #Prevention #Nutri #PharmacieDemain

Name: Pihè Saboaria & Cosméticos Naturais
Description:
Olá! Muito prazer! Somos o André Muniz e Tânia Muniz, um casal de empreendedores que desde JUN/2022 estamos a frente da Pihè Velas Aromáticas & Saboaria Artesanal.

Tânia é uma Gestora Financeira, apaixonada por trabalhos manuais, onde atualmente divide o seu tempo em desenvolver o seu trabalho em papelaria personalizada e cartonagem de luxo com a aplicação dos ornamentos e enfeites que acompanham os nossos produtos. Ah! E claro, também faz parte da confecção deles.

André é Analista de Sistemas de formação mas que sempre se empolgou com empreendedorismo, e que viu na fabricação de velas, sabonetes e afins uma oportunidade de aumentar o orçamento familiar, mas isso foi por pouco tempo ou melhor dizendo, até confeccionar a sua primeira vela aromática. Surgiu então uma paixão pela forma de preparo e confecção de cada um dos nossos produtos. O ritual, os cheiros e as texturas transformaram totalmente seu pensamento.

Todos os nossos produtos são confeccionados com todo amor e carinho e com o propósito de lhe proporcionar uma experiência única e agradável. Seja ao acender uma de nossas velas ou ao utilizar os nossos sabonetes ou linha SPA ou até mesmo no momento de perfumar o seu lar como nossos home spray ou difusores de ambiente.

A Pihè Velas Aromáticas & Saboaria Artesanal é uma empresa que se preocupa com o meio ambiente, e também com os animais, somos crueltyfree. Nossos produtos não são testados em animais e nem adquirimos matérias primas de quem também não tenha essa preocupação.

Não utilizamos parafina em nossas velas, todas elas são produzidas com cera vegetal de Coco, Palmiste e Palma com procedência de origem.

Por último e não menos importante, queremos agradecer a sua visita em nosso site e convidamos a navegar em nossas categorias e produtos. Nosso portifólio está em constante crescimento, por isso sugerimos que você assine a nossa newsletter e nos siga no Facebook e Instagram para ficar por dentro de todas as novidades.

Acenda-me e curta o seu momento!

Name: PHARMACIE HERBORISTERIE DU PÈRE BLAIZE
Description:
Incarnée par une équipe de passionnés, l’Herboristerie est reconnue pour son savoir-faire, ses recettes ancestrales et ses produits de qualité.

En 1815, Toussaint Blaize ouvre son herboristerie à Noailles, au cœur de la ville. Ce savant guérisseur venu des Alpes de Haute Provence fait alors connaître aux Marseillais les vertus de la phytothérapie, l’art de soigner avec les plantes.
La proximité immédiate avec le port de commerce lui permet d’enrichir son arsenal thérapeutique avec de plantes venues des 4 coins du monde.
Pendant près de 2 siècles, l’officine sera dirigée par les descendants de son fondateur.

Aujourd’hui, le fameux magasin est devenu une Pharmacie-Herboristerie et 6 générations se sont succédées pour offrir tous les bienfaits naturels des plantes et forger la réputation de ce lieu chargé d’histoire.

Fin 2013, Cyril Coulard, jeune Pharmacien reprend l’institution familiale. Il sort alors tout juste de ses études de Pharmacie mais connait déjà bien la maison, y venant depuis son plus jeune âge.
Depuis, il veille à faire perdurer le savoir-faire et la tradition.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: BALLS
Description:
BALLS isn’t just a brand, it’s a family name. BALLS was founded in 2019 after several awkward conversations around the Ball dinner table about using kitchen scissors to groom your manhood. (Yes, that’s the family surname... and yes, that’s what some families talk about at dinner). 

Several more awkward conversations later, we'd learned most people use conventional razors (which can get ugly), craft scissors, nail clippers, a pocket knife, or a random pizza cutter (!!) to tackle growth downstairs. We set upon a quest to design and develop a trimmer made for effectively grooming the most sensitive of areas.

“No snags on our bags” was the goal... and after experimenting with hundreds of different blades and designs, we released the Balls Trimmer. We believe our trimmer - with its ceramic anti-nick blades and SackSafe guard - and the Balls line of lotions and washes are the best solution to an unpleasant groin.

We also realized that men's grooming is still quite a taboo topic...but not for our customer support team and staff. We’ve dedicated ourselves to being the best partner for all things Balls-related. Have a question? Just ask. We’re specialists with 24/7 customer support from real human beings with real balls (literal or metaphorical). 

That's what BALLS is all about. We've been featured as a leading men's intimate trimmer by a variety of esteemed publications, such as GQ UK and Forbes.... and, as of May 2022, we're excited to enter the US market.

We hope you enjoy!
--Tyler (Ball), Co-Founder

Os produtos para cuidados com a pele são desenvolvidos para atender às necessidades de diversos tipos de pele, oferecendo hidratação, nutrição e proteção contra os danos ambientais.

Os produtos da Miss Lary estão disponíveis para compra online através de seu site oficial, bem como em lojas de cosméticos selecionadas em todo o Brasil. A empresa também participa regularmente de feiras e eventos de beleza, onde os consumidores podem experimentar e adquirir seus produtos pessoalmente. Com uma base de clientes fiéis em constante crescimento, a Miss Lary continua a expandir sua presença no mercado de cosméticos veganos no Brasil e além.

CWBTE stands for Corporate Wellbeing and Beauty Technologies Expo, and it is the ultimate event for anyone who wants to learn more about the cutting-edge technologies, products, and services that are transforming the wellness and beauty industry. Whether you are a manufacturer, a distributor, a wholesaler, a retailer, practitioner or a consumer, you will find something valuable and exciting at the CWBTE 2023.  At the CWBTE 2023, you will have the opportunity to:  •  Explore the exhibition hall, where you will find hundreds of exhibitors showcasing their wellness and beauty solutions, from smart devices and apps, to natural cosmetics and supplements, to personalized treatments and therapies.  •  Attend the conference sessions, where you will hear from experts and thought leaders who will share their insights and best practices on topics such as wellness and beauty innovation, digital transformation, sustainability, diversity, and inclusion.  •  Network with other attendees, who come from various backgrounds and sectors, such as health care, education, hospitality, media, entertainment, fashion, and more. You will also have the chance to participate in interactive workshops, roundtables, and panel discussions.  •  Support the corporate wellbeing initiative, which aims to promote the importance of employee wellbeing in the workplace. You will learn how to create or improve your organization's policies, practices, and culture to foster a healthy, happy, and productive workforce.  The CWBTE 2023 is more than just an expo. It is a place where wellness meets beauty. It is a community of wellness and beauty enthusiasts. It is a platform for learning, sharing, and growing. Don't miss it!

Nossas Soluções 

Farmácias app  
Uma nova forma de comprar e vender no setor farmacêutico! Oferecemos inovação, acessibilidade e confiabilidade para conectar consumidores e farmácias de forma prática e eficiente.

 Agilidade e transparência para que farmácias criem seu próprio canal de vendas online, aproximando-se dos clientes e fortalecendo sua marca. 

Farmácias TX4  
 Tecnologia acessível e inovação constante para otimizar estoques, evitar rupturas e trazer mais eficiência ao negócio. 

Farmácias delivery 
 Logística inteligente para garantir rapidez, segurança e satisfação dos clientes com entregas eficientes. 

Farmácias docas virtuais 
 Acesso direto ao GrupoSC para farmácias venderem mais de 16 mil produtos sem precisar de estoque físico, aumentando sua competitividade. 

Farmácias ads 
 Publicidade estratégica para farmácias e indústrias alcançarem milhões de consumidores, impulsionando vendas com segmentação inteligente. 

A inovação está no nosso DNA. Junte-se a nós e seja parte da revolução digital do varej

Our collaborations with leading research facilities have cultivated an environment of shared knowledge, fostering breakthroughs in skincare. As trailblazers in the early generation of stem cell products, NeoGenesis has become synonymous with the next generation of stem cell science for skin and hair care.

This natural approach to healing, which we proudly term 'systems therapeutics,' is embodied in our products, making a difference in the lives of tens of thousands globally.

Haluamme lisäksi varmistaa, että tehokkaat hoitovaihtoehdot ovat helposti saatavilla kaikille. Siksi otimme valikoimiimme apteekista ostettavan Oniris -kuorsaus- ja uniapneakiskon, jolla on vahva tutkimusnäyttö tehosta niin kuorsauksen kuin uniapneankin hoidossa.

We began our journey by launching the Gift pads, a standout in menstrual care. Steeped in meticulous research and development, our products blend technology with natural herbal remedies to deliver a unique menstrual solution that's as affordable as it is effective. Our aspiration is to make top-tier wellness accessible to all women, irrespective of their circumstances.

Over time, our range expanded, responding to the global plastic waste crisis with a line of organic, vegan cleansing and shampoo bars. Packaged in paper boxes, these are designed for all the family, enhancing personal care routines while lessening our environmental footprint.

But our mission goes beyond product creation; Gift Wellness is built on the pillars of compassion and generosity. We've pledged to support women in crisis by donating menstrual products for every pack we sell. To date, over six million pads have found their way to women who are homeless, in refugee camps, or simply cannot afford these essentials.

Despite the challenges of the pandemic and a shifting retail landscape, we've pivoted to an online model, directly serving our growing customer base and expanding our product range, now offering over 30 plastic-free, natural wellbeing products.

Gift Wellness – we're not just a brand; we're a movement. Join us as we continue to innovate for better health, champion sustainability, and support women in crisis across the globe.

Name: Herbs of the Earth
Description:
We Inspire People To Pursue Wellness - this is our mission! At Herbs of the Earth, we believe that wellness is the active pursuit of being healthy.

Herbs of the Earth is a family run business since 2015. For the past many years, we strive to utilize the most current scientific research studies and information available to find the most effective solutions for health, wellness and wellbeing. We believe in using high quality natural ingredients that has been scientifically proven to provide powerful nutritional benefits.

We care about our customers like our own family. We only produce supplements that we personally would and do take on a daily basis. Supplements that everyone in our office, homes, families and our own kids take as well.

Our products are:

• Formulated with the finest ingredients
• Sourced from the most reputable sources
• Manufactured in a cGMP and NSF Certified facility.
• Third party tested for purity.

INNOVATION: With partners who share our passion for an all natural lifestyle,  we have combined state-of-the-art manufacturing practices with botanical and formulation expertise to ensure cutting-edge, natural solutions.

TRANSPARENCY AND TESTING: We set the bar higher at Herbs of the Earth. We know transparency is important to you and it should be! Before that bottle arrives at your location, it goes through a robust system that includes testing the raw materials and finished product. This testing includes microbial testing and testing for heavy metal and chemicals; identity and authenticity testing so you can assure purity; and the exact concentration of ingredients to ensure absolute safety. Every batch is tested to validate integrity and quality at an NSF accredited laboratory. We believe that we should never compromise on quality. 

PROUDLY MADE IN THE USA: All products are manufactured in a US-FDA, GMP and NSF certified manufacturing facility in the USA.

Name: FM Hearing Systems
Description:
Here at FM Hearing Systems we are very passionate about radio aid systems, technology that adds an extra layer of quality to what hearing aids alone can provide. This technology is not as widely known about or supplied in the UK as we believe it should be. It’s our mission to spread the word about ‘The Best Kept Secret in Audiology’.

The main product we supply is a range by leading Swiss hearing aid manufacturer Phonak, and this range is called Phonak Roger.

We have a diverse range of people in our team at head office and based around the UK. Our team includes audiologists, hearing aid wearers, cochlear implant wearers and people with years of experience in workplace needs assessments.

Our experienced team of approved and accredited trainers based in strategic locations around the UK ready to deliver on site setup and training where required. They have a vast experience of how to make the equipment we supply interact with on site technology, such as telephony, computer systems and audio equipment.

If you contact the office you will often deal with Shaun or Emma below who are the leads at our head office and distribution centre in Silsden.

Please do browse around our website, check out some of our Case Histories to find out what our clients think about us. If you don’t quite understand what it’s all about have a read of our page Need Help Choosing.

If it all seems a little complicated and you want advice we have a handy Product Guidance Questionnaire to help you. Just fill in all the fields on the form with as much detail as you can and submit the answers. We’ll then get back to you very quickly with an appropriate mix of products and pricing suitable for your needs.

Name: Hirudo Medicinal Leech
Description: Hirudo Medicinal Leech, based in Kayseri, Turkey, specializes in organic personal care products and aquaculture. Since 2015, we have focused on providing high-quality, sustainable solutions for a healthier lifestyle. Our unique approach involves cultivating endemic plants and raising leeches on our farm to ensure premium organic ingredients. With a modern facility spanning 2,000 m2, we conduct extraction, distillation, production, and packaging operations, supported by an accredited laboratory and research center. Through our groundbreaking research, we have developed 113 distinct enzyme sequences from medicinal leeches, setting us apart globally. We adhere to strict quality standards and are registered with the National Medical Device Information System. As Turkey's first certified leech farm, we supply leeches to the Turkish market, including public hospitals and private clinics. Our collaboration with Fırat University focuses on leveraging leech enzymes and organic ingredients to develop cutting-edge personal care products. We prioritize environmental responsibility and aim to enhance individuals' quality of life through natural and holistic personal care. Explore our exceptional organic products, backed by our expertise and dedication to nature-inspired solutions.

Name: Macrobiotic World & Wellness Center
Description:
Welcome to Macrobiotic World & Wellness Center; Thailand’s premier destination for conscious living. We are a unified ecosystem combining Natural Efe, our 100% vegan organic marketplace, and Eudemonia, our state-of-the-art Ice Bath & Sauna center.

Founded in 2010 by Chef Kostas (Douridas Konstantinos), we have evolved from a humble vision on Ko Pha Ngan to a leading wellness hub in Chiang Mai. Our mission is to bridge the gap between internal nourishment and external recovery.

Our Pillars of Health:  Natural Efe (The Marketplace): We are Thailand’s strictly 100% vegan, cruelty-free marketplace. We curate organic superfoods, gluten-free essentials, and natural therapies. We refuse to stock parent companies that test on animals, ensuring every purchase supports an ethical supply chain.

Eudemonia (The Wellness Center): Located directly adjacent to our shop, our spa focuses on cold thermogenesis and heat therapy. We provide a sanctuary for physical recovery, mental resilience, and community connection through ice baths, steam baths, magnesium baths and sauna sessions.

Whether you are here to shop for bio-certified ingredients or to recharge your body, we invite you to experience a life of balance and longevity.

Name: Gavino Farmacêutica
Description:
A Gavino Farmacêutica é um grupo de 3 farmácias localizada na União das Freguesias do Poceirão e Marateca, somos um marco na nossa comunidade desde 1964. Acreditamos que a farmácia comunitária tem um papel essencial na promoção ativa da saúde e do bem-estar da população. Por isso, construímos um modelo centrado no aconselhamento farmacêutico de excelência, na personalização dos cuidados e na integração de serviços farmacêuticos especializados que vão ao encontro das reais necessidades da população.

Pertencemos à Rede Elo Farma o que reforça o nosso compromisso com um modelo de farmácia moderno, colaborativo e voltado para a comunidade.
 Com equipas técnicas altamente qualificadas e motivadas, apostamos numa abordagem multidisciplinar e próxima, que alia a ciência, a escuta ativa e o cuidado humano.
 Atuamos em áreas como:
•	Preparação Individualizada da Medicação (PIM)
•	Consulta Farmacêutica, Administração de vacinas e injetáveis
•	Veterinária, Dermofarmácia, Suplementos Alimentares e Medicamentos Manipulados
•	Podologia, Nutrição, Audiologia
•	Medição de parâmetros bioquímicos, Rastreios, e Workshops Temáticos orientados para a prevenção e educação em saúde.

VALORES
•	Serviço com Propósito — Cada atendimento é uma oportunidade de fazer a diferença na vida de alguém.
•	Proximidade e Humanização — Valorizamos o contacto direto, a escuta e a empatia em todos os momentos do cuidado.
•	Excelência Clínica e Técnica — Apostamos na formação contínua da nossa equipa e na atualização constante dos nossos serviços.
•	Inovação com Impacto — Integrámos tecnologia e novos modelos de serviço para chegar mais longe e melhor.
•	Responsabilidade Social — Atuamos com consciência, promovendo rastreios, workshops e serviços que apoiam a comunidade local.
 Entre em contacto connosco ou acompanhe-nos para saber como podemos ajudar.

Gavino Farmacêutica – Juntos pela Saúde!

Velkommen til Hørebil, det førende mobile hørecenter i Danmark, der dækker hele landet.

Hos Hørebil er vi overbeviste om, at en sund og velfungerende hørelse er afgørende for en god livskvalitet. Mange danskere står i dag over for udfordringer med deres hørelse og har behov for assistance, hvad enten det drejer sig om en ny høreprøve eller et nyt høreapparat. Desværre har mange ikke tid, motivation eller mulighed for at besøge en høreklinik for at få løst disse problemer. Det er her, vi træder ind – vi har gjort det vores mission at gøre det let og bekvemt for alle at få foretaget en professionel høreprøve og samtidig få adgang til markedets bedste høreapparater.

Description:
TePe 1965 yılından günümüze kadar ağız hijyeni ürünleri üreten bir İsveç firmasıdır. Bütün tasarım geliştirme ve üretim safhaları İsveç Malmö'deki üretim tesislerimizde yapılmaktadır.
Fikirden ürünün elde edilmesine kadar geçen bu kontrol, ürün kalitesine odaklanan bir üretim yapma şansı doğurmaktadır. Aynı zamanda tüm ürünlerimiz çevreye duyarlı olarak üretilmektedir.
Bütün bunların sonucunda ise tam bir ağız hijyeni elde etmek için gerekli olan ürünler ve bu ürünlerde profesyonel diş hekimliğinin beklentisi olan yüksek kalite ve fonksiyonu karşılayan ürünler, Diş Hekimleri ile birlikte çalışarak devamlı bir ürün geliştirme stratejisi koruyucu bakım ürünlerinde TePe'yi dental lider bir marka yapmaktadır.

In the coming years, we aim to expand our product line to include effective Ayurvedic medicines.

Name: Aronia Charlottenburg
Description: Plantatia ecologica de Aronia din Charlottenburg (singurul sat rotund din Romania) este situata intr-o zona pitoreasca si unica in tara. Aici, ajutati de specialisti in domeniu, crestem, ingriim si recoltam plantele de aronia, pentru a produce faimousul suc de aronia presat la rece, impreuna cu celelalte produse. Ferma noastra este un proiect relativ nou in Romania, dar suntem motivati de pasiunea pentru o viata sanatoasa si de dorinta de a promova consumul de produse naturale. Noi am preferat aceasta locatie deoarece solul si clima sunt ideale pentru planta de aronia. Dar am fost motivati si de frumusetea locului si de posibilitatea de a lucra in liniste, respirand aer curat de tara. Lipsa poluarii din aer sau din apa este benefica si pentru plante, care au posibilitatea sa se dezvolte in voie.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: NATURAMedicatrix
Description:
Boutique en ligne de compléments alimentaires et produits BIO !
NATURAMedicatrix vous propose un large éventail de compléments alimentaires de qualité. Notre sélection est sévère et l’efficience est garantie aux consommateurs. L’attention est portée sur la biodisponibilité de l’élément proposé. C’est pourquoi nous avons privilégié les formes fermentées pour nombre de substances qui sont devenues nos produits vedettes, comme la grenade fermentée, ou le germe de blé fermenté. Découvrez aussi nos compléments alimentaires certifiés bio comme le LactoGyn Crispatus bio, Laxibio spécial Psyllium, Lactiproimmunitum+ Bio, Chi-Cafe Bio… Tous nos produits (excepté le Xaventin) sont sans gluten, ni lactose, et sont, pour la plupart, 100% végétaliens !
Nous vous offrons des outils concrets pour votre bien-être au quotidien. Optez pour nos éléments de haute qualité, sous forme de produits actifs.
Toute notre équipe est également à votre écoute et met tout en oeuvre pour répondre à vos besoins.

Name: Clinicaudio
Description:
Somos Clínicaudio, tu punto de encuentro para todo lo relacionado con la salud auditiva. Con una creciente presencia en seis localidades de España, estamos aquí para cambiar la forma en que percibes el cuidado auditivo.

En Clínicaudio, nos especializamos en realizar revisiones auditivas exhaustivas y ofrecer asesoramiento experto, adaptado a cada uno de nuestros clientes. Sabemos que cada oído es único, por eso personalizamos cada solución de cuidado auditivo para que se ajuste perfectamente a tus necesidades.

Nuestra gama de servicios incluye la venta y adaptación de audífonos de última generación, así como una variedad de accesorios para hacer tu experiencia auditiva aún más cómoda y eficiente. Además, nos dedicamos a tratar la pérdida auditiva con un enfoque integral, combinando tecnología avanzada y un trato humano y cercano.

Estamos en constante crecimiento y evolución, siempre buscando las mejores formas de servirte y mejorar tu calidad de vida auditiva. Ven a conocernos y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a escuchar mejor y disfrutar más de la vida en Clínicaudio!

Name: Carbene Care Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Carbene Care Pvt. Ltd.

Carbene Care Pvt. Ltd. is a renowned skincare and wellness company based in India that has made significant strides in the beauty industry. With a strong focus on innovation and research, Carbene Care is committed to providing top-quality skincare products that cater specifically to the needs of Indian skin. The company's groundbreaking research on the impact of Korean beauty products on Indian skin has led to the creation of their best-selling product, Carbene Rice Wash.

Founding and Research

Carbene Care Pvt. Ltd. was founded in 2023 by three visionary individuals: Mohd Zia Wasi Khan, Mohammad Rameez Anwar. These entrepreneurs shared a common passion for skincare and aimed to bridge the gap between Korean beauty products and Indian skin types.

Their journey began with an in-depth study of Korean skincare practices and products. After meticulous research, they observed that while Korean skincare products were highly effective on Korean skin types, they were not optimally suitable for Indian skin. Indian skin is generally more sensitive and prone to combination skin issues, requiring a different approach to achieve the desired results.

The Breakthrough Product: Carbene Rice Wash

After years of dedication and hard work, the founders of Carbene Care succeeded in creating a revolutionary skincare product that addresses the unique needs of Indian skin. Their best-selling product, Carbene Rice Wash, is the culmination of extensive research and collaboration with the company's R&D team.

AI at it’s core.

We are building a skintech platform through which people can neglect derma’s regular visit, by using our skin Analyser app and machine combination to achieve a suitable skin routine and improve skin quality.

Name: Botanic.cz
Description:
Zdravíme všechny naše zákazníky, partnery, ale i ty, kteří k nám zabloudili poprvé. Proč nám vlastně záleží na chodu společnosti a co vnáší smysl do našeho každodenního fungování? 

Vize
Každý den je pro moderního člověka balíčkem stresu, negativních vlivů prostředí a v mnoha případech i nedostatku pohybu. Zkrátka věcí, které nám negativně ovlivňují život. Co s tím? Uvědomme si, co je pro nás nejdůležitější. Pokud si seřadíme priority dobře, vždy nám vyjde zdraví. Naše, našeho partnera, rodiny - stále je to zdraví! Bez něj nemůžeme sportovat, vzdělávat se, milovat. 
V okamžiku, kdy se se zdravím něco stane, obracíme se k lékům. To však není vždy nezbytné. Všichni bychom měli žít zdravě, ať už toužíme po užším pase, doplnění energie, nebo komplexní změně svého životního stylu. 

Mise
Zde se hodí otázka...Jak chceme docílit naší vize? Jedna věc je mít v hlavně onu vizi a druhá - vědět jak ji zrealizovat.

Všechny produkty které máme, si balíme a dovážíme sami. To nám dává jednu velkou výhodu - jsme schopni kontrolovat kvalitu a nechybí nám onen kontakt se surovinou, který je potřeba. Tím, že máme vše pod vlastní značnou přebíráme odpovědnost za naše dodavatele. Nechceme se schovávat za cizí značky. Stojíme si za tou naší! Navíc se zaměřujeme na suroviny, které dovážíme přímo z míst jejich přirozeného výskytu. 

Řešení
Vize a Mise nás navádí k našemu poslednímu bodu, kterým je právě Řešení. Dlouhá cesta, která nám připravila nejedno překvapení nás však vyprofilovala k tomu, co jsme dnes. A co jsme? Jsme jen eshop? Zdaleka ne…! Jsme ti, kteří poskytují informace, produkty a nabízí zdravou cestu v nezdravé době. Ano, prodáváme přírodní doplňky stravy, bylinky, čaje a další produkty pod vlastní značkou. Ale dodáváme také informace, naději a řešení spoustě lidí, dodáváme ho i Vám! V tom nám pomáhají specialisté ze svých oborů. Ať už se jedná o nutriční specialisty, lékaře, nebo jiné kapacity z univerzit a podobných institucí.

Name: Metro Health & Beauty Limited
Description:
Metro Health and Beauty Limited was founded by Mr. Sandhan in 2007, with a mission to deliver the best value and service in the healthcare and beauty industry. Raj Sandhan has completed his B.Pharma Bachelor’s Degree from Rajiv, Gandhi University. He moved to London shortly after and from that point knew he wanted to start his own business in the Pharmacy sector but he wasn’t sure what form that would take. The idea for Metro Health and Beauty Limited was born during his time as a Pharmacy Manager. A decade of success in that role, managing one of London’s most successful pharmacies, provided valuable insight into the industry and how supply distribution could be improved for retail businesses. What’s more, this experience also gave him the prospect to gain a better understanding of the UK market, and to see the opportunity available for someone wanting to bring exclusive, premium beauty brands to the UK market. After the initial launch of the business in 2007, he completed his Master’s Degree in Business Administration from Kingston University that gave him the skillset needed to take the company full time, and he has never looked back.

Today, MHBL is a leading distributor of some of the best, most innovative brands in the health and skincare industry today. Whether it is a luxury online e-retailer, single pharmacy or a multi-site chain, MHBL deliver not just the in-demand, quality products that enhance the business, but the easily managed, effective service that helps business owners operate effectively. 
With unmatched industry insight, MHBL spot new trends, identify demand and source the right products to benefit every customer’s business. Offering a broad range of premium products that include, Skincare, Haircare, Wellbeing and more; businesses can enjoy a complete, reliable distribution service that delivers products that customers are looking for.
