Name: En dag i taget
Description:
Psykisk ohälsa är ett av nutidens största samhällsproblem, och hos unga slår problematiken extra hårt. Allt fler och allt yngre drabbas, och förutom den drabbade själv så tar familjer, skolor och arbetsmarknader stor skada av antalet insjuknade. Denna verklighet är hemsk, och den är vårt "varför".

I en egen kamp mot psykisk ohälsa utvecklades en metod, som blev en stor del i det senare tillfrisknandet. Metoden blev grunden till något som liknar en dagbok, men som är mycket mer än så. Baserat på egna erfarenheter lockar journalboken En dag i taget till ett positivt tankesätt där livets psykiska friskfaktorer står i fokus. Med välbeprövade tips, övningar och uppmaningar fungerar journalboken som ett självhjälpsmedel för individens psykiska hälsa, och kan användas ur ett både lindrande eller förebyggande perspektiv. 

Den fysiska journalboken ger plats för reflektion utanför den digitala världen, som annars tar upp en stor del av tankekraften hos de flesta av oss idag. Att få En dag i taget i handen skapar en nära och personlig koppling mellan läsare och skrivare, som blir viktig när de både tillhör samma målgrupp och delar liknande livserfarenheter. 

En dag i taget används av både privatpersoner och större aktörer, till exempel som en utsträckt hand mellan förälder och barn eller som arbetsmedel i skolan för att stärka elevens psykiska hälsa och kunskap inom området. 

Genom att fler får verktygen för att få och bibehålla en god psykisk hälsa kan vi komma närmre det tredje globala målet "God hälsa och välbefinnande", och mot ett samhälle där fler får leva ett långt liv med en god psykisk hälsa. 

Tillsammans gör vi skillnad för varandra, det är dags att ta En dag i taget!
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

As I got older the problems seemed to worsen.  Even expensive, high-end “natural” products left me with severe reactions. I felt completely lost staring at hundreds of skincare products in a beauty department…  Does that sound familiar?

Finally, in 2008 I decided to look for the answers in an alternative direction using a holistic approach to my skin issues. 

I began an amazing journey of study, research and travel all over the world.  I was fascinated to learn about the healing power of plant oils!  Ancient civilizations have cataloged knowledge for thousands of years...  Why neglect their wisdom?  Vika’s Essentials Organic Skincare was born from a passion of essential oils, nature and a healthy lifestyle. 

We share this passion hoping you feel the energy of our love and prayer that we put in each and every one of our products – our most important ingredients!

If you care about your health and feel empowered to make safe choices for your family, this is the right place!

Name: Her Pride
Description:
Our Core Mission

The onset of puberty and menstruation can pose profound challenges for adolescent girls, particularly in refugee settings. Social stigma, discriminatory norms, and limited access to MHM resources create complex barriers to their well-being. Our mission is rooted in the firm conviction that knowledge is power, and education can transform lives.

Innovation in Education: The MHM Game Toolkit

At the heart of our approach lies innovation. We've developed an engaging board game that simplifies MHM education, breaking down complex topics and dispelling myths. This interactive tool fosters understanding among girls and boys, promoting empathy and support during menstruation. Versatile and adaptable, our game can be versatile and adaptable by students and teache. We believe that informed choices stem from knowledge, and we aim to provide that knowledge in an enjoyable, accessible manner.

The Organic Cream Relief: Promoting Health and Well-Being

In addition to education, we recognize the importance of addressing the physical aspects of menstruation. That's why we manufacture an organic cream that alleviates common menstrual discomforts. Formulated with natural ingredients like cinnamon and eucalyptus oil, this cream offers antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and pain-relieving properties. Importantly, we ensure affordability, making it accessible to all, regardless of their circumstances.

Our Impact and Your Participation

Our project strives to empower adolescent refugee girls and women to confidently manage their menstruation with safety, dignity, and privacy. By equipping them with knowledge and tangible solutions, we aim to break down barriers and foster an environment of support, safety, and empowerment.

We invite you to join us in this transformative journey. Whether you're a partner, stakeholder, or advocate for gender equality and human rights, your involvement can make a significant difference in the lives of those we serve. Let's work together!

Name: My Health Story
Description:
My Health Story mission
To help empower people living with ongoing health issues to achieve greater health outcomes.

My Health Story vision
Present the unique lived experience and help time-poor practitioners guide patients through health-first decision-making.

My Health Story Values
—Patient-centred care
—Excellence in health management healthcare
—Privacy of information

Background
My Health Story was originally founded as PainTrain – My Health Summary by Soula Mantalvanos after she developed chronic pain following an accident.

My Health Story is an engaging, safe and innovative way for patients to generate and store their personal health experience.

‘I want to empower people facing ongoing health issues. Understanding a personal experience is key to receiving the best quality of care. It is also very distressing to have to repeat a long history.’ she said.

It was soon apparent that Soula’s novel health summarising idea for pain management could be expanded to help people living with other chronic health conditions such as Stroke, Dementia and aged care.

So, in 2021 Soula decided to rebrand PainTrain My Health Summary to My Health Story.

Why My Health Story?
My Health Story is a fully functioning resource that communicates the unique lived experience. It empowers the patient so they can take a more holistic approach to their care. It also works as an asset to time-poor practitioners, presenting them with an effective way to tailor care to the individual’s experience.

Privacy
The information stored on My Health Story remains owned by the patient, and the patient remains in total control of the sharing options.

Motivated by personal experience, founder Soula Mantalvanos developed My Health Story to address a large area of unmet needs; communication between those affected by ongoing illness and their health practitioners with social, educational, and employment economic implications in Australia and throughout the world.

Name: Ceragem Baroqah Healthcare and Services
Description:
Ceragem Baroqah Healthcare and Services is a chain of wellness centers that offer holistic healthcare solutions through thermal massage therapy. These centers provide access to Ceragem's signature thermal massage beds, which combine infrared heat, massage, and acupressure to promote relaxation and alleviate muscle tension. 

Ceragem Baroqah Healthcare and Services typically offer personalized treatment plans and consultations to address individual health needs and goals, focusing on enhancing overall well-being and vitality. We offer holistic healthcare solutions through thermal massage therapy. We provide access to Ceragem's signature thermal massage beds, which combine infrared, heat, massage, and acupressure for relaxation and alleviate muscle tension.

The therapeutic approach offered by Ceragem Healthcare provides numerous benefits that contribute to improving physical and mental well-being:

Pain Relief: Thermal massage therapy is highly effective in relieving muscle and joint pain, including chronic conditions such as arthritis, fibromyalgia, and back pain.

Yet modern life — with its processed foods, chronic stress, and aging — depletes our natural enzyme reserves, leaving the body overworked and undernourished.

At Enzenti, we create targeted, enzyme-powered supplements that support gut health, metabolic function, and daily vitality. Our formulas are built around clinically relevant enzymes and supported by synergistic ingredients like probiotics, prebiotics, and functional botanicals — never trends, fillers, or gimmicks.

We don’t believe in masking symptoms. We believe in restoring function.
No pharma. No hype. Just wellness that works.

Our product line includes: • Digestenz Complete – A multi-enzyme + probiotic formula to break down complex meals, reduce bloating, and enhance nutrient absorption.
• Gutenz Balance – A daily gut health and metabolism support blend featuring apple cider vinegar powder, inulin, DigeZyme, and L. acidophilus.

Enzenti is more than a supplement brand — we’re building a movement around intelligent, root-cause wellness. Because health doesn’t start with more products — it starts with giving your body the tools to use what it already has.

Powered by biology. Rooted in nature.

Name: Michelotti Ortopedia
Description:
L’Officina Ortopedica Michelotti è stata fondata nel 1916 nel cuore della Toscana da Ferruccio Michelotti, professore d’arte che si era specializzato in produzione di strumenti ortopedici per aiutare i reduci della Prima Guerra Mondiale che avevano subìto amputazioni e menomazioni.

Ma la storia della famiglia Michelotti ha avuto inizio molto tempo prima del 1916, anno che simbolicamente rappresenta l’inizio ufficiale dell’attività ortopedica. In cima all’albero genealogico della famiglia c’è Baldassarre, vissuto agli inizi del 1700. Michelotti si era fatta conoscere come una prestigiosa falegnameria, anzi, per dirla nei termini con cui veniva descritto allora, un “Premiato Laboratorio Meccanico-Falegname”.

Durante la Prima Guerra Mondiale, Ferruccio Michelotti, in collaborazione con un chirurgo dell’ospedale cittadino della Croce Rossa, iniziò quindi a realizzare strumenti ortopedici per i reduci, diventando ben presto un punto di riferimento per l’ortopedia.

Ortopedia Michelotti, oggi alla sua 5° generazione produce e commercializza dispositivi medici su misura destinati a disabili e pazienti affetti da trauma, facendo affidamento da sempre sull’esperienza artigianale dei suoi collaboratori e delle più moderne tecnologie del settore.
L’headquarter a Lucca e i numerosi negozi e centri servizi attivi sul territorio, hanno reso Ortopedia Michelotti uno dei punti di riferimento dell’ortopedia.

Name: Clipp
Description:
Welcome to Clipp's page! 
Clipp is the gentle pacifier weaning solution designed to help children stop using pacifiers smoothly and at their own pace.

𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗮 𝗵𝗲𝗮𝗹𝘁𝗵𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹...As parents, we gave pacifiers to our children. But as orthodontic professionals, we knew the long-term consequences of prolonged pacifier use. The challenge was to stop it at the right time!
This inspired us to create Clipp, the pacifier weaning solution that helps children quit without frustration. Our first prototypes, tested in 2017 and 2020, proved to be a success! Now, we want to help as many children as possible.

𝗛𝗼𝘄 𝗱𝗼𝗲𝘀 𝗶𝘁 𝘄𝗼𝗿𝗸?The box contains one pacifier and 5 clip-on rings that gradually reduce the size of the suction tip over several weeks. This helps children detach from their pacifier gently and at their own pace. 
Since its launch, we’ve received amazing feedback from parents, and Clipp is recommended by healthcare professionals such as pediatric dentists and speech therapists.

𝗛𝗲𝗮𝗹𝘁𝗵𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗲 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗹𝘀: 𝗦𝗮𝘆 𝗴𝗼𝗼𝗱𝗯𝘆𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝗽𝗮𝗰𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗿𝘀 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘆𝗼𝘂𝗿 𝗽𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀!If you’re a healthcare professional, contact us to receive a free demo kit including posters, flyers, and a demonstration pacifier.
Don’t hesitate to reach out to us – we’re happy to answer your questions! 
 Website: https://www.clipp.fr/

Name: NuBest Nutrition

From meticulous ingredient selection to state-of-the-art laboratories, FDA-registered facility, and GMP-certified premium quality, we offer only natural health and wellness products that meet the highest quality possible.

As we prioritize quality over quantity, every ingredient is carefully studied and then expertly formulated with advanced ratios before being encapsulated and bottled on its direct route to your doorstep.

 COMMITMENT TO QUALITY
At NuBest, quality is at the heart of everything we do. We have strict quality control procedures that are constantly updated to meet the ever-increasing quality standards. All of our products are made in the USA in an FDA-registered facility certified by GMP.

 NUTRITION MADE EASY
We believe everyone deserves to lead a healthy, happy life. That’s why we have developed our own premium product lines addressing different customer needs. After years of continuous innovation, we are proud to be trusted and loved by a growing number of customers worldwide. It is your satisfaction and happiness that inspire us to strive for more.

CLEAN + CONVENIENT, NO COMPROMISE: our wipes are certified GD04-compliant flushable, which just means you can prioritize your hygiene worry-free because we know convenience is essential.

FREE OF CHEMICALS + PLASTIC: Many wipes can take up to 100+ years to break down and they contain harmful chemicals and plastic that lead to microplastic pollution. LOO’s are engineered with the highest quality plant-based fibers and our formula is free from toxins, dyes, and parabens.

100% RECYCLABLE PACKAGING: Our packaging blends form + function with an innovative appreciation of design. Intelligently created to disassemble when finished. Simply pop the lid off of the paper tube, and recycle the individual components.

LOO is a proud member of 1% for the Planet, pledging 1% of our annual sales to a global network of grassroots and environmental nonprofits. This is our way of walking the walk and pledging resources to environmental issues.

Name: Elegancia Company
Description:
Con una década completa de historia, Elegancia Company está especializada en productos que inspiran la belleza. Ubicada en Ciudad del Este - Paraguay, cuenta con varios pisos de tienda en un único lugar, unificado, para mayor comodidad de sus clientes. Preparadas para atender tanto al público minorista, cuanto al mayorista, la Elegancia Company se estableció como una tienda que inspira la belleza en la Región Trinacional.

Elegancia Company posee un diferenciado mix de productos en los sectores de perfumería, cosméticos y maquillaje. Con políticas de ventas firmemente vinculadas a los valores de la ética y de la responsabilidad junto a sus clientes y amigos, la empresa ofrece atención diferenciada, a través de un equipo preparado, precio justo y completa infraestructura.

Siempre atenta a las tendencias del mercado, Elegancia Company se ha convertido en referencia, en lo que se refiere a la calidad y la belleza. La empresa posee un amplio catálogo de productos, trabajando con marcas de renombre mundial y con garantía de procedencia.

En cuanto a su papel social, Elegancia Company todavía se preocupa por la comunidad, realizando acciones no sólo en Paraguay - donde está su estructura física, sino también en Brasil - país donde reside la mayoría de sus clientes. "Elegancia en Acción" es ejemplo de ello: lanzado en octubre de 2014, el proyecto se realiza junto a ONG e instituciones sociales de Foz do Iguaçu y Ciudad del Este, promoviendo un día de actividades sociales, culturales y deportivas para niños de la región.

Name: Lunnare Co
Description:
A Lunnare Co. é uma marca de autocuidado holístico criada em 2019 por Karla Lopes (@k.arlalopes), jornalista e criadora de conteúdo online atuando na área de comunicação já há 12 anos. Toda a produção da marca está localizada em Belo Horizonte, mas nós atuamos em todo o Brasil por meio dessa loja online.

Nascemos de uma reconexão ancestral de Karla com as ervas a partir dos ensinamentos de sua avó - que já faziam parte da sua vida desde a infância. Ela gosta de brincar que era a criança que levava chás para o jardim de infância em sua merendeira, adorava tomar banhos de ervas e ser benzida por ervas de proteção.

Passando por esse período complicado de autoconhecimento e cuidado mental em 2018, Karla começou a fazer bastões de ervas e sprays para uso pessoal utilizando ervas como guiné, espada de são jorge, comigo-ninguém-pode e arruda, todas colhidas diretamente do quintal de sua avó. Nisso ela viu uma possibilidade de trazer essa conexão ancestral de forma mais presente a para sua vida - e também de outras pessoas. Foi daí que nasceu a Lunnare Co., que na época se chamava Lunna Care, para trabalhar o autocuidado por meio da magia das ervas na rotina diária das pessoas. 

Atualmente, trabalhamos com produção própria e também terceirizada em nossocatálogo de produtos. Na Lunnare Co. você encontra um vasto portfólio de produtos feitos com ervas medicinais e aromaterapia: incensos defumadores naturais, sprays energéticos, óleos aromáticos, banhos de ervas, escalda pés, velas perfumadas, bálsamos energéticos e acessórios como colares difusores para aromaterapia.

O manifesto da Lunnare Co. é incentivar as pessoas a se reconectarem com a magia das ervas e a ancestralidade que elas carregam mesmo em uma rotina atribulada. Além disso, trazer produtos para o autocuidado de espírito e energético que é tão importante quanto outras práticas de autocuidado que já fazem parte do dia a dia.

22000:2018 zertifiziert ist, dem höchsten Standard

Das Sortiment umfasst innovative Mikronährstoffe,

im deutschsprachigen Raum eine Vorreiterrolle
einnimmt. Einzigartig ist die seit über 12 Jahren
bestehende Kooperation mit dem Europakloster
Gut Aich, aus der die SEEWALD Klosterspezialitäten
nach alter Tradition entstehen. Die zertifizierte,
regionale Biokosmetik rundet das Angebot ab
und bietet Pflege von außen als logischen Schritt
nach der Pflege von innen. Ergänzt wird dies
durch SEEWALD Diagnostics (Nutrigenetik).
SEEWALD verfolgt ein ganzheitliches Verständnis
von Gesundheit und möchte Menschen auf
ihrem Weg zu mehr Wohlbefinden und Lebensqualität
unterstützen. Qualität, Natürlichkeit und
das Bekenntnis zur Region Salzburg prägen das
Unternehmen.

Name: Perfumee
Description:
Combien d’entre nous ont dans leurs placards des parfums qu’on n’utilise pas ? 
Combien d’entre nous ont déjà reçu en cadeaux des parfums qui ne nous plaisaient pas ? 
Combien d’entre nous achètent des parfums neufs seulement pour une durée temporaire : une saison, un été, un hiver…? 
Et pendant ce temps, combien de personnes continuent à rêver de s’offrir ces mêmes parfums là ? 

C’est face à ces problèmes de gaspillage et de surconsommation que Tara Roumian, notre Fondatrice, a décidé de créer Perfumee : la plateforme qui transforme la façon dont nous consommons le Parfum.

Le but est simple : permettre aux particuliers de vendre et / ou d’acheter des parfums neufs ou déjà utilisés. 

En tant qu’utilisateur, cela nous permet de : 
 Vendre les parfums qu’on n’utilise plus 
 Acheter nos parfums favoris à prix réduit (jusqu’à +70% moins cher que le neuf) 
 S’éduquer à l’art de la Parfumerie 
 Contribuer à l’économie circulaire 

Perfumee offre donc une solution à la fois utile, éducative et à impact positif sur l’environnement et la société.

Name: Three Strands Recovery Wear Corporation
Description:
Three Strands Recovery Wear was founded by Leah Wyrick in 2018 as a freshman in college at Wake Forest University in Winston-Salem, NC. In 2016, her mother, Nancy, was diagnosed with breast cancer. Her cancer was treated with a mastectomy that resulted in three subsequent surgeries due to complications. During her mother’s recovery, Leah saw first-hand the complications her mother endured, specifically with drains and bra discomfort, and became inspired to help others that may have a similar experience due to the lack of advancements in today’s surgical bras. Leah teamed up with Dr. Samuel Roy, a plastic surgeon in Salisbury, North Carolina, to create the Resilience Bra, a patent-pending, post-operative bra for mastectomies, breast reconstruction, and other breast-related cosmetic surgeries.

At Three Strands, we put patients at the focal point of everything we do. We aim to provide you with a one-of-a kind recovery bra designed with the input of patients themselves, in addition to giving you all of the tools and resources needed to support your healing journey. From articles, podcasts, blogs, and more, visit our resources page to learn more about your breast surgery, helpful facts about your recovery, and what our small business is doing to support you!

Description:
At Diverse Skincare, we believe true self-care goes beyond just what you put on your skin, it’s about caring for your mind, body, and gut together. 

Our formulations are designed to be simple, effective, and neurodivergent-friendly, supporting your skin while working in harmony with your overall health. 

Here’s how:

1 Skin Health: Calming, Barrier-Strengthening Formulas

 Minimalist, effective ingredients to reduce irritation and overwhelm

 Barrier-supporting hydration to protect against environmental stressors

 Soothing botanicals to help counteract inflammation caused by stress & diet

 When your skin barrier is healthy, it’s more resilient to stress, breakouts, and sensitivities.

2 Brain Health: A Safe, Sensory-Friendly Self-Care Routine

 Simple, ADHD-friendly routines to reduce decision fatigue

 Lightweight, non-overwhelming textures & scents for sensory ease

Name: VASSA Organic
Description:
VASSA – Doğanın Gücünü Bilimin Işığıyla Buluşturan Marka
VASSA, yalnızca bir cilt bakım markası değil; yıllar süren bilimsel araştırmaların, doğaya duyulan saygının ve insan sağlığına adanmış bir vizyonun adıdır. Kurucumuzun liderliğinde, beş değerli profesörün yer aldığı uzman ekibimizle; cilt hastalıkları, diyabetik yaralar, sedef, mantar enfeksiyonları ve hatta cilt kanseri gibi zorlu sağlık sorunlarına bitkisel çözümler geliştirdik.
Formüllerimiz, tamamen organik ve doğal bitkisel içeriklerle hazırlanır. Geliştirdiğimiz ürünler, ciltteki sorunları kısa sürede iyileştirmeyi, cildin doğal dengesini yeniden kazandırmayı ve yaşam kalitesini artırmayı hedefler.
Marka ismimiz VASSA, Pali ve Sanskrit dillerinde “yağmur” anlamına gelir. Budist geleneğinde Vassa; doğanın yenilenmesini, arınmayı ve derin içsel dönüşümü simgeleyen üç aylık bir inziva dönemidir. Biz de bu anlamdan ilham alarak, cildin ve bedenin kendini yenileme sürecini temsil eden bir marka yarattık. Tıpkı yağmurun toprağa hayat vermesi gibi, VASSA da cilde şifa ve tazelik getirir.
Doğadan gelen saflığı, modern bilimin kesinliğiyle harmanlayan VASSA, cilt sağlığında yeni bir çağ başlatmayı hedefler. Bizim için her ürün, yalnızca bir bakım değil; sağlıklı, konforlu ve özgüven dolu bir yaşamın anahtarıdır.



VASSA – Şifanın Yağmuru
Her yağmur damlası toprağa değdiğinde, hayat yeniden başlar…
VASSA da böyle doğdu.
Yıllar önce çıktığımız yolda tek amacımız vardı: insanlara yeniden sağlık ve umut vermek. Beş değerli profesörün bilgeliği ve doğanın binlerce yıllık şifa sırlarıyla, cilt hastalıklarına karşı yepyeni çözümler geliştirdik. Sedeften mantara, diyabetik yaralardan cilt kanserine kadar pek çok zorluğun üstesinden gelmeyi başardık.
Adımızı Budist geleneğinde “yağmur” ve “yenilenme” anlamına gelen Vassa’dan aldık. Çünkü biz de tıpkı yağmur gibi, cilde hayat veriyor, onu tazeliyor, yeniden canlandırıyoruz.
VASSA, yalnızca bir marka değil; doğanın şifasını, bilimin gücüyle buluşturan bir iyileşme yolculu

Name: Oralucent
Description:
Oralucent: Revolutionizing Oral Care with Advanced Photodynamic Light Therapy and O2 Whitening Products

Oralucent is at the forefront of a new era in oral care, utilizing clinically proven red and blue light technology. Our third-generation product, the Oralucent Pro Edition toothbrush, represents the pinnacle of our innovation. Developed and continually refined by our expert team of dentists, hygienists, and product design engineers, the Pro Edition delivers 2.5 times more light and up to 40,000 strokes per minute.

The Pro Edition’s blue light specifically targets the harmful HR5 bacteria within the oral microbiome—bacteria that have been linked to systemic diseases such as inflammatory disease, metabolic disease, cardiovascular disease, and Alzheimer's disease.

When paired with a peroxide-based toothpaste or Oralucent’s O2 gel, the blue light enhances teeth whitening, delivering a brighter smile.

Additionally, the Pro Edition's red light offers anti-inflammatory and tissue-healing benefits, which may help slow or even reverse gum recession.

Our technology is backed by over 17 independent studies and publications, as well as our in-house pre-clinical data (N=15, P=0.01), which suggests that HR5 bacteria may be reduced by up to 90%.

At Oralucent, we are committed to making advanced oral care accessible and easy to use. Our mission is to empower people to achieve their healthiest, brightest smiles and enhance their overall well-being.

In plaats van te starten met welke ingrediënten wij wel in onze producten willen, hebben wij het omgedraaid. Wij zijn gestart met wat wij niet in onze producten willen, zodat er een prachtig, zuiver supplement ontstaat zonder onnodige vulstoffen of chemische zoetstoffen.

Wij hebben ontdekt dat er 42 potentieel schadelijke stoffen zijn die niet in een zuiver supplement thuishoren. Bij Nutribites zul je deze 42 potentieel schadelijke ingrediënten niet tegenkomen. Nu niet, morgen niet en ook niet over 10 jaar.

Wij willen dat je met een gerust hart kunt profiteren van alle voordelen van supplementen, wetende dat je de zuiverste capsules, pillen of poeders tot je neemt. Dat is onze belofte naar jou.

We have designed our packaging so that it is fully recyclable. All our materials are carefully sourced, and unlike many other leading brands our toothpaste tubes can be put into your household recycling bin.

Our commitment to the environment drives everything we do. From the toothpaste itself through to packaging and our operational procedures our aim is to be carbon neutral.

You can currently find our full range of products on Amazon and through our retail partners throughout the UK. Our aim is to bring BioDenta to more people by working with environmentally aware retailers who are keen to sell natural products to their customers. 

With environment and health awareness at an all time high we are excited for the future of the BioDenta brand.

Name: Etherea Essentia
Description:
At Etherea Essentia, we are on a mission larger than beauty - we are reviving India’s lost perfumery heritage and positioning it on the world stage.

For centuries, India has been the cradle of raw materials that power the global fragrance industry. Yet, luxury branding and profits have mostly stayed abroad. We are here to change that.

 What We Stand For
Heritage Revival: Rooted in India’s ancient perfumery traditions (Kannauj ittars, Mysore sandalwood, Kashmir saffron).

Accessible Luxury: Crafting world-class perfumes, skincare, and wellness products that compete with the best globally — while staying within reach.

Farmer Empowerment: Partnering with Indian farmers and artisanal cooperatives to keep value in India, creating sustainable livelihoods.

Export Ambition: Building India’s first global luxury fragrance house, aligned with Atmanirbhar Bharat and Vocal for Local.

 Our Vision
To make Etherea Essentia a global brand that represents luxury, legacy, and sustainability while ensuring India leads not only as the source of raw materials, but also as a powerhouse of finished luxury.

 Our Commitment
We are not just creating perfumes and skincare. We are creating a movement - one that revives India’s perfumery heritage, empowers farmers, strengthens exports, and builds a new chapter of accessible luxury, made in India, for the world.

Name: Stichting HoorProfs
Description:
Stichting HoorProfs is een samenwerking van meer dan 100 betrokken zelfstandige audicienbedrijven. Deze samenwerking waarborgt de kwaliteit, zonder uw zelfstandige identiteit uit het oog te verliezen.

HoorProfs is een organisatie die ontzorgt en u in staat stelt op uw vak en kwaliteit te focussen. Op deze manier leveren we samen een belangrijke bijdrage aan toekomstbestendige audicienbedrijven.

Door een grote groep audiciens te verenigen heeft HoorProfs een goede onderhandelingspositie. Wij onderhandelen voor en namens u met diverse partijen zoals zorgverzekeraars, leveranciers en softwareleveranciers.

Ook houden we u op de hoogte van ontwikkelingen in de markt en wet- en regelgeving.

Een HoorProfs audicien onderscheidt zich door het bieden van hoge kwaliteit en uitstekende service. Bij acceptatie als deelnemer van HoorProfs bent u automatisch in het bezit van het StAr certificaat en mag u het HoorProfs kwaliteitslabel gebruiken. Ook profiteert u van alle promotie rondom dit kwaliteitslabel.

Om de kwaliteit te waarborgen, staan bijscholingen en trainingen hoog in het vaandel bij HoorProfs. Wij faciliteren daarom in educatie/trainingen door derden. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat u altijd over de meest recente informatie beschikt en kunt werken met de modernste technieken.

Goede en duidelijke communicatie is een belangrijk onderdeel van onze samenwerking. HoorProfs zorgt voor persoonlijk contact tussen u en onze mensen op het kantoor, waardoor uw vragen snel worden beantwoord. Indien gewenst is het mogelijk om in contact te komen met andere deelnemers van HoorProfs, bijvoorbeeld in intervisie groepen en werkgroepen, om ervaringen uit te wisselen. 

HoorProfs deelnemers worden ook in de branche op bestuurlijk niveau vertegenwoordigd, bijvoorbeeld wanneer het gaat om de toekomst van hoorzorg en onderwijs, en zorgt ervoor dat de belangen van de zelfstandige audicien ook daar worden behartigd.

A InnSex é uma marca de sexual care, idealizada por
mãe e filha, que chega ao mercado com uma linha de
produtos para tornar o sexo muito mais prazeroso, seja
ele com um parceiro, parceira ou até mesmo sozinha.
O projeto de uma marca voltada para melhorar o sexo
ficou engavetado por anos.
Foi a filha Gabriella, que incentivou a mãe a tirar a ideia
do papel e criar algo que pudesse ajudar mulheres a
redescobrir o sexo de forma mais prazerosa.
No início de 2023 iniciaram-se as primeiras pesquisas
de produtos e teste cegos. Já na pesquisa com mulheres
entre 30 e 60 anos, mãe e filha descobriram que 60% das
entrevistadas não sabiam como chegar ao orgasmo. Era
realmente necessário mudar isso.
Assim, a InnSex lança produtos que visam saúde, bemestar e cuidados femininos, como o gel estimulante,
feito para aumentar a sensibilidade da pele e estimular
sensações, o gel lubrificante natural para ser utilizado
durante o sexo e, por último, o spray de limpeza íntima
que auxilia na redução de odores.
“Queremos com essa linha de produtos empoderar as
mulheres nesse assunto que muitas vezes é um tabu, que
é atingir o orgasmo. É um processo de autoconhecimento
do corpo importante e necessário. Uma questão realmente
de saúde”, comenta Iva.
Os produtos da InnSex são veganos, feitos 100% com
ingredientes naturais, livre de parabenos e corantes e
estão à venda pelo e-commerce da marca.
“Trabalhar junto com a minha mãe no desenvolvimento
da InnSex foi desafiador e uma troca inspiradora. Falar
sobre sexo, intimidade e até mesmo conscientizar o público
masculino de como dar prazer à sua parceira serão nossas
pautas dentro da marca”, declara Gabriella.

Unser basisches Wasser trägt zur Regulierung des Säure-Basen-Haushalts bei, während unser hexagonales Wasser aufgrund seiner besonderen Molekularstruktur als besonders bioverfügbar gilt.

Speziell für Sportler bieten wir „SportlerWasser“, das durch seine energetisierenden Eigenschaften die Leistungsfähigkeit steigern und die Regeneration unterstützt kann. 

Aquion Wassersysteme aktivieren Wasserstoff. Verwandeln Leitungswasser in “Lebensenergie zum Trinken”. Ist Lichtwasser mit Lichtenergie. Basisches und hexagonales Wasser = AktivWasser

Name: My Benefit Srl
Description:
My Benefit, l’azienda italiana della salute e del benessere

Mybenefit nasce nel 2010 a Modena con il lancio di Bionaif plantare attivo, che oggi è distribuito in più di sette mila farmacie in tutta Italia.

Come tutti i nostri prodotti, Bionaif è nato da un’esigenza concreta: risolvere alcuni dei problemi più comuni, a cui i normali prodotti presenti sul mercato non riuscivano a rispondere. Perché lo abbiamo fatto? Perché la nostra missione è quella di promuovere il benessere psicofisico della persona, attraverso prodotti di alta qualità e innovativi, che possono migliorare la qualità della vita.

Ricerca
Ognuno dei nostri prodotti nasce da attente ricerche scientifiche sui materiali, sulle materie prime e sulle tecnologie, ma anche dallo studio delle reali necessità delle persone. Per creare soluzioni innovative che possano rispondere ai loro bisogni.

Qualità
La qualità, il nostro marchio di fabbrica. Molti dei nostri prodotti più importanti sono certificati come dispositivi medici con marchio CE, riconosciuti dal Ministero della Salute. Ogni nostro prodotto viene sottoposto a test rigorosi per garantirne l’efficacia e la sicurezza. La migliore prova di qualità, per noi, restano però le moltissime testimonianze di clienti soddisfatti, a cui siamo riusciti a regalare un maggiore benessere quotidiano.

Sicurezza
La sicurezza e il rispetto delle normative è un altro dei capisaldi del nostro lavoro. Proprio per questo, quando con l’emergenza sanitaria COVID-19 abbiamo deciso di modificare la nostra produzione e di inserire nel nostro catalogo anche dispositivi di protezione individuale (mascherine chirurgiche e FFP2, camici, gel igienizzanti e molto altro), siamo stati la prima azienda italiana ad ottenere la certificazione INAIL per i nostri prodotti.

Description:
At Hagen Beauty, we develop skincare and haircare systems grounded in dermatological science and biocompatibility. Each formulation is designed to align with the skin and scalp’s natural structure, function, and pH, ensuring efficacy with minimal disruption to the skin barrier.

Our approach is rooted in the principles of skin biology, ingredient synergy, and functional minimalism. We focus on precision actives — validated, barrier-safe, and delivered at effective concentrations — tailored for Indian skin tones, textures, and climate. From hydration to exfoliation, repair to protection, our products work with the skin, not against it.

We are committed to phthalate-free formulations, acknowledging the well-documented association between phthalates and potential endocrine disruption. Every ingredient is selected based on its safety profile, biological compatibility, and targeted function—eliminating unnecessary fillers that may interfere with skin homeostasis.

Driven by formulation intelligence, we design bioavailable, non-comedogenic, and gender-inclusive products that support long-term dermal health. Our formulations prioritize barrier integrity, pH alignment, and a low irritancy index—ensuring suitability for sensitive and reactive skin types.

At Hagen Beauty, we believe modern skincare must go beyond surface-level results. Our mission is to offer scientifically sound, functionally effective, and emotionally resonant care that respects the complexity of real skin and hair, where every product is made to matter.

Because true skin health isn’t about trends—it’s about science, consistency, and care.

Cultivating change is what Dr. Christina Rahm is all about

environment initiatives. A myriad of entities and
individuals—politicians, lobbyists, social service
organizations, medical institutions and even not-for-profits

concept. A challenging concept. Though what REALLY
constitutes change? Change by definition is replacing

better, cleaner, healthier, more sustainable, and potentially
more suitable for everyone. DRC Ventures is Dr. Rahm’s
vehicle to cultivate such “change.” This new “venture” is
designed to become a global catalyst for conservation
efforts to make the world better environmentally; to leave it
healthier for generations to come.

WHAT WE DO:
Guided by our Founder & the Board Of Directors, we
are responsible for combining 12 different ventures,
each of which specialize in various sectors, assemble
into one platform. Each complimentary piece of the
puzzle conveniently corresponds to the other. Once
each project reaches its designated position their
symbiotic chemistry will create a flow of disruption that
will create positive change throughout the planet.

DRC welcomes you with open arms.
We envision a world where science-backed consumer goods are accessible to all, and where their use has a positive and measurable impact on the human race as well as the planet as a whole.

Name: ILPI's Expo+Fórum 2025
Description:
A Trevoo Assessoria Familiar LTDA convida para a 2ª edição do ILPIs Expo+Fórum (IEF 2024), nos dias 15, 16 e 17 de agosto de 2024, no Centro de Convenções Frei Caneca em São Paulo. O IEF é um evento exclusivo para as instituições de longa permanência de todo Brasil.

 

O evento tem como intuito reunir gestores e profissionais, órgãos de vigilância, entidades, indústrias e serviços atuantes nas Instituições de Longa Permanência para Idosos (ILPIs), privadas, públicas e filantrópicas, a fim de compartilhar experiências, discutir demandas, e refletir sobre novas perspectivas dos cuidados de longa duração no contexto brasileiro.
O ILPI's Expo+Fórum foi concebido a partir de múltiplas necessidades observa
O evento tem como intuito reunir gestores e profissionais, órgãos de vigilância, entidades, indústrias e serviços atuantes nas Instituições de Longa Permanência para Idosos (ILPIs), privadas, públicas e filantrópicas, a fim de compartilhar experiências, discutir demandas, e refletir sobre novas perspectivas dos cuidados de longa duração no contexto brasileiro.
O ILPIs Expo+Fórum foi concebido a partir de múltiplas necessidades observadas em grande parte das instituições parceiras da Plataforma Trevoo.

É visível o crescimento exponencial deste serviço em todo o território nacional e é, portanto, urgente que se discuta sobre os desafios do dia-a-dia, sobre as normas de funcionamento, que se propicie atualização sobre o cuidado, e que se reforce a importância deste equipamento. Nestes encontros almeja-se acolher e debater questões relacionadas à gestão institucional.

           

Os dois dias serão repletos de informações de qualidade e contarão com profissionais e acadêmicos de grande relevância.

           

O espaço de exposição contará com empresas de diversos segmentos, fornecedoras de produtos e serviços, dispostas a negociarem condições comerciais competitivas e especiais às ILPIs.


Você tem um encontro marcado com o segmento que mais cresce no Brasil!

Description:
Gli astucci FRÍO sono i primi astucci per la refrigerazione e la conservazione in sicurezza di insulina e farmaci termosensibili brevettati al mondo.

Sono stati studiati per offrire una soluzione efficace ed economica al problema di mantenere l’insulina e molti altri farmaci termosensibili ad una temperatura di sicurezza inferiore ai 30°C (mediamente tra i 18-26°C) per minimo 45 ore consecutive, anche a temperature esterne costantemente elevate, senza aver bisogno del frigorifero e/o dell’elettricità.

  Testati per 48 ore ad una temperatura di 37,8°C
 Mantengono l’insulina fresca fino a 28 giorni
 Leggeri e compatti
 Riutilizzabili e riattivabili
 Si attivano con acqua fredda

L’astuccio FRÍO è stato progettato per soddisfare tutti i tipi e marche di penne per insulina, pompe per insulina, fiale e cartucce di ricarica standard e la maggior parte dei modelli di microinfusore presenti sul mercato. FRÍO si impegna a fornire una soluzione a basso costo altamente efficace al problema della conservazione dell’insulina in uso a una temperatura di sicurezza per un massimo di 2 giorni, che è la durata consentita dell’insulina in uso.

I prodotti FRÍO sono il sistema più semplice e conveniente per conservare e trasportare freschi farmaci il collirio per glaucoma, ormoni della crescita, le terapie per lo shock anafilattico ed altri.

Name: Bovine Naturals
Description:
At Bovine Naturals, we believe skincare should be as pure and simple as possible. That’s why we’ve created a 3-ingredient tallow balm that delivers powerful, natural nourishment without unnecessary additives or synthetic chemicals.

Our balm is handcrafted with just three high-quality ingredients:
	•	Grass-Fed Beef Tallow: Rich in vitamins A, D, E, and K, this nutrient-dense ingredient closely mimics your skin’s natural oils, providing deep hydration and promoting healthy, glowing skin.
	•	Raw Wild Honey: Known for its soothing and antibacterial properties, honey helps calm irritation, retain moisture, and support overall skin health.
	•	Beeswax: A natural barrier that locks in hydration while protecting your skin from environmental stressors.

The result is a balm that is simple, effective, and gentle enough for even the most sensitive skin. Whether you’re dealing with dryness, irritation, or just looking for a cleaner way to care for your skin, our unscented tallow balm is designed to nourish, protect, and restore.

At Bovine Naturals, we are committed to providing products that are rooted in honesty and inspired by the purity of nature. We believe in transparency, sustainability, and creating skincare solutions that you can trust.

Experience the difference of simple, natural skincare with Bovine Naturals.

Audrey, Doula Holistique & Fertilité / PMA / Hormones, a pour objectif de soutenir LES PASSAGES DE VIE DES FEMMES qui sont marqués par de nombreuses transitions : puberté, maternité, ménopause et bien plus encore. Chaque étape apporte son lot de défis et de transformations, tant sur le plan physique qu’émotionnel. C’est ici que ses accompagnements commencent, soutenus notamment par l’utilisation des huiles essentielles et des micro-nutriments dōTERRA.

SOUTIEN À LA FERTILITÉ & PMA : je vous guide personnellement dans l’observation de votre cycle. Ensemble, nous explorons les fluctuations hormonales, apprenons à reconnaître leurs impacts sur votre corps et votre esprit, et découvrons les solutions naturelles pour favoriser la conception. Je vous aide aussi à soulager l’endométriose, le SOPK et autres déséquilibres hormonaux.

SOUTIEN HORMONAL & SANTÉ MENTALE : la vie moderne des femmes peut nous faire perdre nos racines. Les hormones ont un impact fort dans cet équilibre à tout âge. Je vous aide à déceler, comprendre, et renforcer votre ancrage.

Nous formons également régulièrement des personnes intéressées pour rejoindre notre équipe. Cette opportunité est peut-être pour vous !

Name: GentleStyle Brush by CLM Creations LLC
Description:
At CLM Creations, we love healthy hair as much as we love helping you achieve it with our GentleStyle Brush uniquely designed for Thin or Fragile Hair to Minimize Hair Loss. It works as a detangling brush, diffuser, and styling device for various hair types, lengths, textures, wigs, and extensions. 

Cherie L Monson, breast cancer survivor and founder of CLM Creations, transformed her experience into innovation. After radiation left her hair fragile and thinning, she struggled to find a gentle styling solution—so she created one. The GentleStyle Brush, a revolutionary 2-in-1 detangling hairbrush and styling tool, helped her prevent further hair loss, detangle with ease, and even add volume to her thinning hair. This detangling and volumizing hairbrush is specially designed to help you achieve professional-looking results with minimal hair damage.

Benefits:

Detangle and brush wet or dry hair using light pressure to reduce breakage and maintain natural waves and curls.

Volumize thin hair by using innovative triangle-shaped fingers to lift strands and brush from underneath.

Salon-worthy blowout with travel-friendly diffuser that directs airflow and enhances volume.

Stimulate scalp and evenly distribute product like mousse, hair serum, or dry shampoo.

BPA-free, heat-resistant, lightweight yet durable, dishwasher-safe, and designed to last a lifetime.

O que somos é essencial, previne, protege e promove o bem-estar.

Na Nohker Professional não apenas nos dedicamos a produtos com inovação e alta performance, mas também nos comprometemos com a excelência no local de trabalho e a sustentabilidade ambiental, além de contribuir ativamente para as comunidades em que operamos.

Desde a inauguração da Nohker Professional, em 2020, adotamos os princípios da proteção, prevenção e cuidado como essenciais. Reconhecemos que segurança e bem-estar são prioridades e é por isso que buscamos constantemente ir além desses alicerces. Com sede no Brasil, acumulamos mais de 30 anos de expertise no segmento institucional (B2B), tornando-nos especialistas em higiene profissional, limpeza de alta performance e bem-estar.

Nossa busca pela excelência é incessante, refletindo-se em cada produto que oferecemos, pois sua satisfação é nossa máxima prioridade.

Essa trajetória de sucesso é construída a partir do profundo conhecimento de dois renomados profissionais: Monteiro Neris e Gilberto Mesquita. Com mais de três décadas de experiência, atendendo grandes empresas multinacionais e uma ampla variedade de setores, desde vibrantes bares e restaurantes, até escritórios, hotéis e clínicas. Eles são a base sólida de nossa empresa. Com a expertise como nosso alicerce, estamos empenhados em superar expectativas e promover o bem-estar por meio de soluções de higiene profissional, limpeza e produtos inovadores de alta performance.

Estamos em constante crescimento e inovação, comprometidos em trazer produtos e serviços para mercados profissionais que redefinem a experiência de cuidado, higiene, limpeza e bem-estar. Permitimos que os clientes obtenham benefícios tangíveis, promovendo locais de trabalho e ambientes mais limpos, saudáveis e seguros.

Name: Femarelle India
Description:
Three Targeted Supplements for Women's Low Estrogen Levels:
(1) Femarelle Rejuvenate for early low-estrogen level symptoms (hair thinning, skin dullness, low energy, mood swings, frequent sleep disturbances, insomnia, slower metabolism)
(2) Femarelle Recharge for menopause symptoms (hot flashes, mood swings, anxiety, brain fog, sleep problems, joint/muscle aches, low energy, abdomen weight gain, dry eyes and skin, increased facial hair)
(3) Femarelle Unstoppable for long-term low-estrogen level symptoms (bone loss, joint stiffness, and muscle recovery).

Few Causes of Low Estrogen Levels:
- Age
- Chronic Stress (high cortisol suppresses estrogen production)
- Excessive Exercise / Overtraining
- Very Low Body Fat or Rapid Weight Loss
- Eating Disorders
- Poor Sleep (circadian rhythm disruption)
- Smoking (accelerates estrogen metabolism)
- Ovarian removal (oophorectomy) or ovarian damage
- Chemotherapy or radiation therapy
- Premature Ovarian Insufficiency (POI)
- Thyroid Disorders (especially hypothyroidism)
- Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) (can disrupt estrogen balance)

DT56a | The Science at the Core of Femarelle
* Patented, soy-based compound developed specifically for women’s health
* Non-hormonal and safe for long-term use; delivers benefits without hormonal effects
* Clinically studied with 20+ trials supporting its efficacy and safety
* Targets the root causes of low-estrogen–related symptoms
* Works selectively on estrogen receptor beta (ERβ)
* Supports key tissues including brain, skin, scalp, bones, and muscles

Diantaranya brand kami adalah Langfit , salah satu produk kami adalah LangFit Deto Pro, yang merupakan produk solusi detoksifikasi tubuh alami yang menggabungkan cuka apel, chia seed, madu, probiotik, stevia, dan kurma untuk membersihkan tubuh dari racun, meningkatkan kesehatan pencernaan, dan mencegah penyakit degeneratif. 
LangFit Deto Pro lahir dari semangat untuk membantu individu mencapai kesehatan tubuh yang optimal melalui detoksifikasi alami. Kami percaya bahwa membersihkan tubuh dari racun adalah langkah awal yang penting untuk kesehatan jangka panjang. Dengan formulasi bahan alami, LangFit Deto Pro membantu setiap individu Untuk Menjaga Kesehatan tubuh yang menyeluruh, menghindarkan dari berbagai macam penyakit degenartif dan penyakit berbahaya lain dan membantu mereka merasa lebih bugar dan energik.
Bertempat dan beroperasi di wilayah Kab. Sleman Yogyakarta, kami menciptakan lingkungan bekerja yang nyaman untuk generasi Muda Creative dan Produktif di mana semua karyawan memiliki peran penting untuk kemajuan perusahaan, memiliki ruang untuk tumbuh dan berkembang serta dapat secara bebas mengemukakan ide-idenya kepada management. Name: Amplifi Hearing, LLC
Description:
Amplifi was formed in 2021 by hearing industry veterans to help move the needle on how hearing care is delivered.  We're passionate about creating products and services that help both hearing care providers and the patients they serve.

Our first product is EarScript, a patented product that enables patients to experience the sound of various popular hearing aids based on their own hearing profile.  By offering a real world comparison of various hearing aids, EarScript saves time for both hearing care professionals and patients, and can reduce the need for demos and increase patient satisfaction that results in fewer returns.

The recording process for the hearing aids available through EarScript is rigorous and carefully controlled so that a true comparison of different devices can be offered in listening conditions including speech in noise, speech in quiet, and both jazz and orchestral samples for each hearing aid. Various hearing patterns are recorded for each hearing aid, which enables the patient to hear the various aids in a way that closely matches their hearing condition.

EarScript is a patented process, protected by both U.S. and Canadian patents and is both easy to use and affordable as part of a hearing care professional's set of tools for delivering optimal patient hearing care.  For more information, please visit the EarScript webpage at www.amplifihearing.com.

Gelous was proudly founded in beautiful New Zealand in late 2018. Unable to find a homegrown nail kit that was affordable, high-quality, non-toxic and cruelty-free, we took matters into our own hands and brought Gelous to life. 

Our vision was simple: create a haven for those with like-minded values who love creating salon-quality manicures from the cosy comforts of their own homes. No need to wait for your nails to dry or worry about smudging them, with a 60-second ‘cure’ under the Gelous UV/LED Lamp, they’ll emerge hard and perfectly dry. Stacked up against a regular mani, a Gelous manicure lasts longer, feels stronger, and shines like nobody’s business. Saving you thousands on salon visits, our range is also uncompromisingly vegan, cruelty-free and 10-free—kind to your nails, wallet and the planet. 

With Gelous, everything you need to create salon-quality manicures is right at your fingertips. Explore our expanding collection of over 300+ polishes, manicure tools, nail art accessories, and customisable starter kits both online and in our Auckland and Brisbane stores. Putting customer experience first, our products are not only easy to apply and remove, but with hundreds of tutorials, a thriving Facebook community, dedicated support, and all the how-to guides you could ever need, there’s no question you’ll nail at-home manicures.

Flawless gel nails, made easy.

Name: The Solid Cologne Project
Description:
What is Solid Cologne?
Solid Cologne is a modern, wax based, alcohol free alternative to traditional spray-on aftershaves or perfumes.

Rather than using water or high % alcohol, our solid colognes are made from a natural base of Bees wax, Shea butter, Almond oil and Cocoa butter - with a high quality fragrance blended through, creating a luxurious product.

Our Solid Cologne is:
* Highly Concentrated (a little goes a long way)
* Discreet (the little tins are perfect for your pocket, desk drawer, laptop bag, rucksack, hand carry luggage)
* Discerning (Made from a luxurious blend of Bees Wax, Shea Butter, Almond Oil & carefully chosen perfume.
* Divine (each fragrance is amazing and you will love them)
* Durable (no risk of breakages or spills - the tins are strong and the cologne will remain in a solid state)

How do you use solid cologne?

To use our products, slide open the tin, rub the wax with you index finger to activate and apply to your skin, usually at the pulse points such as the neck or wrist.  These are warm areas of you body and the cologne will blend with your skins natural musk throughout the day.  Just top up discreetly as required.

Why use solid cologne?

There are so many benefits compared to your old expensive glass spray bottle.

It's time to make room in your pocket/bag/rucksack for one of our amazing scents!

Benefits:

Portability – Our small and lightweight tins are ideal to carry with you when you're on the go. Gym bag, suit pocket, rucksack, hand luggage, desk drawer, car glove compartment allowing you to top up as and when you need to during the day/night.  Flight safe in your cabin baggage, a night out straight from work, keep one in your car.  Also, very easy to post as gifts.

Durability – Strong and sturdy, our products won't break or smash.  

Long Lasting - Highly concentrated, so a little goes a long way, and the price point means you don't have to be too precious with it compared to your expensive bottles.

Kinder to your skin

It's why we created the Alivio hemp-based skin care system.

Hemp seed oil is one of the most powerfully hydrating antioxidants on the planet. When combined with our specifically chosen anti-inflammatory and antioxidant ingredients, you get something pretty amazing.

Alivio Hemp Natural products work actively in sync with the skins own lipid production to calm free radicals, repair oxidisation and bring lasting relief from inflammation. 

Deeply nourishing, our products naturally strengthen the skins’ ability to regenerate, repair and retain moisture.

At Alivio we don’t believe in overloading the skin - less is more. We use minimal ingredients that work with even the most delicate skin in 4 simple steps to actively Clarify, Restore, Nourish and Protect.

Our purpose is to enable everyone to find comfort in their own skin.

Name: iWater Denmark
Description:
iWater – Historien om en dråbe, der blev til et håb

iWater er den danske pioner, der gjorde verdens mindste molekyle – hydrogen – til en kilde til energi, balance og håb.
Virksomheden blev grundlagt i 2014 af Mette-Marie Linding, der allerede i 2010 stødte på forskningen om hydrogens unikke egenskaber som selektiv antioxidant. Dengang fandtes næsten ingen viden på dansk, men hun besluttede at bygge bro mellem forskning og mennesker.

Hydrogen er særligt, fordi det kan neutralisere de mest skadelige frie radikaler uden at forstyrre kroppens egne signalstoffer. Forskningen voksede eksplosivt efter et japansk gennembrud i 2007, og iWater gjorde denne viden tilgængelig i hverdagen gennem brugervenlige flasker, stationære generatorer og inhalationsudstyr baseret på ren PEM-teknologi.

I starten mødte iWater skepsis, men erfaringer ændrede alt. Kunder fortalte om bedre søvn, mere energi, mindre smerte og hurtigere restitution. Atleter og sportsfysioterapeuter blev nogle af de første til at tage teknologien til sig. I cykelsporten og på klinikker oplevede man markante forbedringer i restitution og præstation, dokumenteret med bl.a. Body Battery-målinger.

iWater blev hurtigt mere end en virksomhed – det blev et fællesskab. Med foredrag, artikler og samarbejder satte de hydrogen på dagsordenen i sundhedsdebatten, ikke som modefænomen, men som et simpelt og biokompatibelt redskab.

Visionen er klar: hydrogen skal være lige så naturligt som et glas vand – tilgængeligt for alle, fra eliteatleten til den ældre, der længes efter mere livskraft.

iWater har vist, at selv det mindste molekyle kan skabe de største forandringer. En dråbe ad gangen.

Description:
We understand the struggles and challenges that cancer patients face with treatment related skin problems. With radiation therapy, radiation dermatitis is a common problem affecting up to 90% of patients. Besides, dry skin in elderly adults is very common. In elderly adults, skin conditions may become more numerous and more noticeable, there is more than half of older adults have dry skin problem. 

We are driven by a profound desire to make a positive impact on people's skin health. We create innovative solutions that prioritise efficacy and unlock the potential of the skin microbiome. We empower individuals with innovative, transformative solutions that go beyond ordinary skincare.

Our team of passionate scientists, dermatologists, formulation chemists and skincare experts work together to develop science-backed products that work in harmony with the skin's microbiome. Our skin microbiome is a fascinating and intricate world of microorganisms that live on the skin's surface, playing a crucial role in its health and appearance.

We pride ourselves on our deep understanding of skin microbiome science and our commitment to using efficacious ingredients in our products. We conduct extensive research and use cutting-edge technology to understand the delicate balance of the skin microbiome and how it interacts with different environments, lifestyles, and skincare products.

Our formulations are created to rebuild the skin microbiome, restore skin barrier function, and minimise the signs of dryness, redness, irritation, acne, aging and other common skin problems. We believe that every person deserves to experience the benefits of healthy, beautiful skin. That is why our products are designed with you in mind. We use only the highest quality ingredients and prioritise formulations that are effective, safe, and enjoyable to use.

HOE HET BEGON

ASSORTIMENT
Ons assortiment is breed en actueel, met veel aandacht voor natuurlijke en biologische producten, duurzaam verpakt met biologisch afbreekbare verpakkingschips.

ROL ZORGPROFESSIONALS
Hoewel vaak onderschat, is het belangrijk dat supplementen weloverwogen worden genomen en daarom levert De Roode Roos alleen aan consumenten die onder begeleiding staan van een zorgprofessional of zijn aangesloten bij een patiëntenvereniging die bij De Roode Roos staat geregistreerd.

BESTEL EN ERVAAR
Het bestelproces is eenvoudig, persoonlijk en snel: via de webshop, maar ook telefonisch, per e-mail of WhatsApp staat het hele team team klaar om vragen te beantwoorden en bestellingen nog dezelfde dag mee te geven aan de bezorgservice.
Wie bij De Roode Roos bestelt, weet zeker dat de producten voldoen aan alle geldende wetgevingen en verbaast zich over het enorme aanbod, de uitgebreide zoekfuncties en de aantrekkelijke voorwaarden.

Muitas vezes era difícil de achá-los no mercado, pois as fórmulas nunca vinham tão completas como ela gostaria, ou seja, que fosse bom para a beleza e também para a saúde.

Assim, Gabriela se aliou a profissionais especializados em produtos naturais e saudáveis que tivessem os mesmos valores, a mesma visão e o mesmo comprometimento com a saúde.

Gaab não é apenas uma marca de bem estar. São produtos capazes de transformar a vida das pessoas, principalmente das mulheres.

Name: Health Medica Ltd.
Description:
Health Medica is a privately owned marketing and distribution company with an in-depth, specialist knowledge of healthcare especially in the therapeutic area of reproductive health. 

Our extensive experience has allowed us to find products that have the robust scientific evidence to convince us that they will be effective and deliver the best results for patients.

The supplement market is dominated by products which do not have significant evidence as to how effective they can be, with most of the data provided based around one or two ingredients rather than the product as a whole. That is where we are different....

All of the products available via Health Medica have clinical trials with actual evidence of improved symptom management, fertility through pregnancy and live births. It is essential for us to have this information so that we know we are giving patients the best possible product and that they too can be confident in our products. 

This is why our products Inofolic Alpha and Impryl, are supported by fertility experts and are recommended to many of those struggling with infertility and PCOS.

Our founder and MD, Terry Sullivan, has been working in healthcare and pharmaceuticals for over 45 years, over 40 of which have been in the specialised area of reproductive health. Terry has built and founded companies leading them to successfully achieve market leadership working with top specialists Terry helped to build fertility treatment in the UK, raising awareness and encouraging NHS funding.

Terry founded Health Medica in 2021, creating a company based on his belief that providing evidence-based products will really make a difference to patients’ lives.  This ethos runs through our company and patients are at the heart of everything we do.

Name: Qubtiva
Description: Her şey Urla’da başladı. Zeytin ağaçlarının gölgesinde, kekik kokularının rüzgarla dans ettiği o bereketli coğrafyada… Anadolu’nun en kadim topraklarından biri olan Urla, yalnızca bir doğa harikası değil; aynı zamanda sağlığın, şifanın ve ilhamın kaynağıdır. İşte Qubtiva’nın ilk adımları, bu eşsiz doğanın sunduğu güçle atıldı. Çünkü biz biliyoruz ki; iyileşmenin yolu doğaya kulak vermekten geçer. Qubtiva, 30 yıla yakın sağlık deneyiminin, 10 yıllık bilimsel Ar-Ge birikimiyle buluştuğu bir markadır. Temelinde, yalnızca ürün değil; bir değer, bir yaşam felsefesi vardır. Bu değerler, İzmir’in kalbinde, İzmir Yüksek Teknoloji Enstitüsü Teknoparkı’nda kurulan Ar-Ge Merkezimizde vücut buldu. Qubtiva, burada yalnızca geliştirilen bir marka değil, yaşatılan bir bilimsel vizyonun ürünüdür. Fonksiyonel tıp ilkeleriyle şekillenen bu vizyon, insanı yalnızca hasta olduğunda değil, sağlıklı kalması için de düşünen bir yaklaşım sunar. Her formül, vücudu bütünüyle anlayan, ona zarar vermeden destekleyen bir felsefenin yansımasıdır. Her içerik; doğadan gelir, bilimle onaylanır, uzmanlarca test edilir. Qubtiva’nın bilimsel yolculuğu, multidisipliner bir bilim kurulu tarafından yönlendirilmektedir. Aralarında tıp, eczacılık, biyokimya, farmakoloji ve beslenme alanlarında deneyimli uzmanların yer aldığı bu yapı, ürünlerin etkinliği, güvenliği ve biyoyararlanımı konusunda titiz bir değerlendirme süreci yürütmektedir. Tüm ürünler, akredite laboratuvarlarda analiz edilmekte, bilimsel geçerliliği en üst düzeyde korunmaktadır. Çünkü biz sadece bir takviye markası değiliz. Biz, sağlığın geleceğini şekillendiren, güveni formüle eden, doğaya saygılı, bilime tutkulu bir vizyonun taşıyıcısıyız. Qubtiva; fonksiyonel tıbbın rehberliğinde, doğanın bilgeliğiyle ve bilimin titizliğiyle hazırlanmış ürünlerle size sağlığın en güvenli hâlini sunar. İzmir Urla’dan dünyaya yayılan bu yolculukta, biz her formülde bir hayata dokunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

It’s a space where digital culture meets culture and an opulently inclusive environment that places products, formulations and experiences first; plus, it has been needed for generations. The Steam Bar is a space where our crowns can rest and flourish, and it’s a thriving community that leaves negative stigmas, barriers and programming at the door.

The Steam Bar changes the narrative and breaks the cycle that has become customary in haircare for years. Our trichologist-approved approach is ‘The Art of Steaming and Skinification’. We pair hair steaming (which uses moist heat to purify and moisturise your hair and scalp) with hair skinification. Name: zDen
Description:
Transform your sleep experience.

It's our mission to make it easier to rest, sleep, and recover any time of day.

zDen is an easy-to-use, non-tech, drug free, cost-effective tool that promotes better sleep. zDen instantly blocks 99% of light to create a personal dark sleep space which can be used anywhere to facilitate sleep — at home for sleep or naps, night shift, travel, college dorm, new parents, insomniacs, etc. Preliminary data shows marked improvements in the quality of sleep, ability to fall asleep faster, and stay asleep longer. zDen is portable and blocks light from indoors and outdoors — sunlight, moonlight, streetlights, and the ambient lights within your sleep space (alarm clock, nightlight, etc.), so you can get higher quality sleep anytime, anywhere.

As many as 70 million Americans of all ages have sleep-related problems, and over 65 million suffer from conditions where light sensitivity is prevalent. Too much light in a sleeping environment prevents the body’s natural production of melatonin which helps you fall asleep. By blocking up to 99% of light, zDen aids in the production of melatonin which leads to better sleep.

Light sensitivity affects 80% of people who suffer from migraines or have other neurological conditions. Light sensitivity makes it more difficult to rest or sleep, thus prolonging recovery time. 

Complementary to any regimen of medication you may have, zDen is ideal because it is non-invasive, blocking out light to relieve you of pain and discomfort associated with light sensitivity. While not a standalone solution, zDen offers a dark space where you can recover from headaches, migraines or any reaction/condition that may be aggravated by light. This drug-free complement does not replace the advice of your physician but can be used in conjunction with other prescribed medications or therapies recommended by your healthcare provider.

Name: dōTERRA Taiwan
Description:
2008年春天，一群保健及企業經營領域的專業人士，因為都曾經親身體驗過精油的益處，因此他們凝聚在一起，思考著如何讓大眾感受到精油的獨特魅力，進而提升人們更高的生活品質。於是他們決定創立一家嶄新層次的世界級精油公司。無論是對精油一無所知的一般大眾，或是精油領域的專家，都會對dōTERRA美商多特瑞所研製的精油產品，深深著迷且支持愛用。
一、美商多特瑞成長大事紀 :
2008年
-於美國猶他州奧倫市成立，每個月以驚人的速度成長，目前已躍升為全球最大的精油公司之一。
2010年
-第一家海外分公司-台灣分公司正式成立
2012年
-日本、澳洲分公司開幕
-「台北精油生活館」、「高雄精油生活館」成立
2013年
-香港分公司開幕
-舉辦首屆「國際精油研討會暨年會」
2019年
-「台南提貨中心」成立
二、多特瑞公益活動 :
2010年9月，Healing Hands Foundation 療癒之手基金會成立，這是依據美國政府501(C)(3) 條款認證、零行政佔比的非營利組織，每一塊錢捐款都用於捐贈上，累計捐款已逾400 萬美元。
「療癒之手基金會」的使命
透過與世界頂尖的醫療團隊慈善機構合作，為世界上貧窮疾病的人帶來療癒和希望。持續投入資金從事精油療效研究，讓精油成為世上既安全又經濟的醫療替代方案將精油推廣到世界各地，幫助人們脫離貧困。透過「CPTG專業純正調理級認證」的精油，幫助貧困的人民自力更生。

經營理念
dōTERRA 秉持著『專業服務』的經營理念，追求企業永續經營及成長，並透過企業經營為社會帶來正面影響，造福我們接觸到的每一位民眾、客戶、顧問、員工、供應商及合作夥伴。我們的做法如下：
1. 經商秉持誠實正直的原則。
2. 善待並尊重接觸到的每一位人士。
3. 秉持服務與關懷精神與他人互動。
4. 認真工作並妥善運用公司資源。
5. 展現笑容與幽默，振奮團隊工作士氣。
6. 對成功心懷感激，並多加給予他人肯定。

Description:
About Nature's Gold :

A vertically integrated business, from plant to hive to jar, that delivers quality and authenticity.  Manuka Honey is our passion.   (You only have to talk to me for a few minutes to see and feel it.) 

My name is Jill Richards, and I am the Director of the Company.   With the help of my family, I manage and run the family business from my hometown of Taringa, Queensland. My son, Mark, made Singapore his home in 2008 and as Managing Director of Nature’s Gold Singapore/Asia, Mark has a vision to provide the highest quality Manuka Honey products to the region.

Honeybiz Australia Pty Ltd launched in 2005, after years of research into the many benefits of Manuka honey. Our first product, the Therapeutic Skin Cream, was launched and the Nature’s Gold brand was born.

Listed with the Therapeutic Goods Administration (TGA), the Nature’s Gold Therapeutic Skin Cream was snapped up by natural beauty enthusiasts and testimonials from our happy customers were soon rolling in. Inspired by so many positive reviews, we decided to expand our range to include everyday skin care.

We are members of the Australian Manuka Honey Association.  All of our products contain Australian Manuka Honey along with Australian Bush Botanicals - all high in anti-oxidants, anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. We are continuing to add to our range of products and we are now extremely excited to have a range of products with Native Bee Propolis along with Manuka Honey.

Our brand has been trademarked in Australia and many countries around the world and is currently in 300+ retail outlets in Australia.

We are proud of everything Nature’s Gold represents: Natural, Australian made, good value skin care that gets results. We hope you love it to.

"Please do not hesitate to contact me if you need more information on our products or if you have any suggestions, I would love to talk to you."
– Jill, Founder and Director

NUVILINE est une marque française de produits nutritionnels et de compléments alimentaires naturels, spécialisés en peptides et protéines pour régénérer les tissus, avec un objectif bien-être, santé, beauté, anti-âge, ou sport.

NOTRE CONCEPT > Vous adapter aux modes de vie modernes. Notre alimentation impacte notre bien-être dans un bon ou dans un mauvais sens.
NUVILINE est une gamme de nutrition avec « du bon sens » pour répondre à certaines carences liées à l’âge, l’activité, au besoin physiologique de chacun, ou pour agir en prévention.

NOTRE OFFRE > Nos produits - en poudre et sous forme de barre nutritionnelle - sont conçus dans le respect des ingrédients naturels que nous sélectionnons pour leur production locale et leur efficacité prouvée.

NOTRE EXPERTISE > Le collagène est la protéine la plus présente dans l’organisme où il assure notamment soutien, résistance et élasticité. Or sa production endogène diminue naturellement à partir de 25-30 ans. Une supplémentation de 5 à 10g/jour de collagène marin NUVILINE permet de relancer naturellement la synthèse du collagène dans l’organisme. 

NOS GAMMES
> Les Universels : Collagène marin pur ou avec vitamine C, pour une action globale
> Les Spécifiques : Collagène marin associés à des actifs spécifiques (acide hyaluronique, membrane d’œuf, DHA, ubiquinol, autres plantes et vitamines…), pour une action ciblée : articulations, peau et anti-âge, cheveux-ongles, énergie vitale, fonctions cognitives, fonctions digestives, etc.

NOS VALEURS > Des formules efficaces made in France, sans superflu avec juste l’essentiel, dans le respect des hommes et de l’environnement. Un accompagnement et des conseils experts.

> contact@nuviline.fr

The versatility of MultiFrax makes it highly effective for a wide range of applications. These include rejuvenation treatments targeting pores, fine lines, texture, and laxity, as well as the treatment of stretch marks, scars, acne scars, and burn scars. This comprehensive range of applications underscores the significant potential of MultiFrax in the field of dermatological treatments.

Multifrax est le système portable de resurfaçage fractionné non ablatif.

Laser fractionné non ablatif avec deux longueurs d'onde, 1927nm et 1550nm, qui fonctionnent simultanément.
Les longueurs d'onde sont émises simultanément par l'appareil.
Les avantages de cette action combinée et synchronisée sont la réduction des dommages thermiques aux tissus et une plus grande pénétration du faisceau laser, donc des traitements plus efficaces.
MultiFrax est un dispositif médical de classe IIb.

BeachGrass Topicals’ mission is to enhance the cannabis infused topicals experience by creating skin loving topicals made with only the highest quality, thoughtfully sourced 100% organic ingredients.

BeachGrass Topicals is located in Wareham, MA, the gateway to Cape Cod, which is where Jeanine was born and raised. She is thrilled to be able to manufacture a product she believes in passionately right in her home town. BeachGrass Topicals’ roots run deep in Wareham. Name: dévoiler
Description:
Markamız, cilt bakımında sadelik ile etkileyiciliği bir araya getirme vizyonuyla doğdu. Günümüzde cilt bakım dünyası, karmaşık rutinler ve sayısız ürün seçeneğiyle dolu. Ancak biz, daha azla daha fazlasını başarmanın mümkün olduğuna inanıyoruz. Bu inançla, minimalist bir yaklaşımla tasarlanan, birden fazla aktif bileşeni bir arada sunan ürünler geliştirdik.

Her bir formülümüz, cildinizin doğal dengesiyle uyumlu, derinlemesine etkili ve bir o kadar da nazik olacak şekilde tasarlanmıştır. Vegan, anti-allerjik ve zengin içeriklerimizle, her cilt tipine hitap ederken aynı zamanda doğaya karşı sorumluluğumuzu da yerine getiriyoruz. Çevre dostu üretim süreçleri ve etik değerlerimizle, yalnızca cildinize değil, gezegenimize de iyi bakmayı hedefliyoruz.

Bizim için cilt bakımı, yalnızca dış görünüşten ibaret değil; bir özgüven ve kendine özen gösterme yolculuğu. Amacımız, bu yolculuğu sadeleştirirken etkisini artırmak. Ürünlerimiz, karmaşık rutinlere olan ihtiyacı ortadan kaldırarak, cildinizin her gün en iyi haliyle ışıldamasını sağlar.

Her detayına özen gösterdiğimiz formüllerimiz; birden fazla aktif bileşeni tek bir üründe sunarak, cilt bakımını sizin için pratik ve etkili hale getirir. Zengin içeriklerimizle cildinizi besler, nemlendirir ve korurken, gereksiz katkı maddelerinden uzak dururuz.

Daha sağlıklı bir cilt ve daha sürdürülebilir bir dünya için çıktığımız bu yolculukta, sizin de bizimle olmanızdan mutluluk duyuyoruz. Sadelik, doğallık ve etkinlik... Bizim için bunlar sadece birer kelime değil, felsefemiz.

Who is Zen Nutrients?

They say pharmacists are one of the most trusted professionals in the world. Well then, if you take the trust and wisdom of a pharmacist, combine that with the knowledge and expertise of a physician, this equals Zen Nutrients.

Why we Got Started?

It is nearly impossible to sort out the truly beneficial ingredients for your specific health needs among all the claims and jargon. We believe in the power of natural medicine and have witnessed the health benefits of the holistic approach. We also believe in pharmaceuticals and the standardization of medicine. Name: zDen LLC
Description:
Transform your sleep experience.

It's our mission to make it easier to rest, sleep, and recover any time of day.

zDen is an easy-to-use, non-tech, drug free, cost-effective tool that promotes better sleep. zDen instantly blocks 99% of light to create a personal dark sleep space which can be used anywhere to facilitate sleep — at home for sleep or naps, night shift, travel, college dorm, new parents, insomniacs, etc. Preliminary data shows marked improvements in the quality of sleep, ability to fall asleep faster, and stay asleep longer. zDen is portable and blocks light from indoors and outdoors — sunlight, moonlight, streetlights, and the ambient lights within your sleep space (alarm clock, nightlight, etc.), so you can get higher quality sleep anytime, anywhere.

As many as 70 million Americans of all ages have sleep-related problems, and over 65 million suffer from conditions where light sensitivity is prevalent. Too much light in a sleeping environment prevents the body’s natural production of melatonin which helps you fall asleep. By blocking up to 99% of light, zDen aids in the production of melatonin which leads to better sleep.

Light sensitivity affects 80% of people who suffer from migraines or have other neurological conditions. Light sensitivity makes it more difficult to rest or sleep, thus prolonging recovery time. 

Complementary to any regimen of medication you may have, zDen is ideal because it is non-invasive, blocking out light to relieve you of pain and discomfort associated with light sensitivity. While not a standalone solution, zDen offers a dark space where you can recover from headaches, migraines or any reaction/condition that may be aggravated by light. This drug-free complement does not replace the advice of your physician but can be used in conjunction with other prescribed medications or therapies recommended by your healthcare provider.

Leading the ‘No Foam Movement’ — 100% Natural. 0% Chemicals. 100% You.

About Us
Beyond Foam is a clean personal care brand on a mission to eliminate harmful “forever chemicals” from daily life. Rooted in Ayurvedic wisdom and adapted for modern convenience, we create 100% natural, foam-free products — with no sulfates, preservatives, or synthetic foaming agents.

Our Mission: To deliver 100% natural, effective, and chemical-free care — rooted in Ayurveda and backed by research.
Our Vision: To inspire a global shift toward chemical-free living, starting with personal care and expanding to everyday essentials.

Why Beyond Foam
Unlike most “natural” brands, we are truly 100% natural — no hidden synthetics, no greenwashing. We blend traditional Ayurveda with modern innovation to offer clean, effective, and sustainable alternatives that respect both body and planet.

What’s Next
With a growing community, strong product pipeline, and presence across Shopify, Amazon, Flipkart, Nykaa, and offline wellness stores, we’re expanding into household care and Ayurvedic wellness — pioneering a future where clean living is the norm, not the exception.

Join the No Foam Movement. Live Clean. Think Beyond Foam.

Name: H2Ocean
Description:
H2Ocean is the original innovator of patented sea salt based natural skin and healthcare products. H2Ocean is the first company in the world that has been fully dedicated to providing all natural, scientifically formulated, and safe Red Sea salt based health and clean beauty skin care products. In 2001, H2Ocean founder and owner Eddie Kolos had an idea to harness the healing power of the ocean and formulate a first aid natural skin healing therapeutic product. Since then, H2Ocean has provided all natural Red Sea salt based products for oral, skin, nasal, wound care, tattoo care, piercing care, sunscreen, pain relief, first aid, diabetic care, and more.

H2Ocean products contain unrefined mineral enriched Red Sea Salt that is hand harvested from one of the world’s most diverse ecosystems, the Red Sea.  H2ocean has a presence in over 20,000 retail locations and is distributed worldwide including the United States, Canada, Mexico, Singapore, Australia, Brazil, UK, and Europe. H2Ocean maintains the highest standards of quality by using only USP grade key ingredients, USP water and advanced packaging technology. Our natural products meet the stringent requirements of regulatory bodies such as the FDA, cGMP, EU, and others. H2Ocean products do not contain any harsh preservatives, colors, alcohol, dyes, chemicals, or artificial flavors.

So it’s important for us to do all that we can to stay healthy for as long as possible. Sound sleep is a basic requirement for this." 

Ask any healthy person what they want and they will give you a wide range of answers. But ask a sick person the same question, and there will only be one answer: "I want to get well."

Sleep is the answer to many health problems. It is not for nothing that we say "Sleep is the best medicine". Nevertheless, we give very little thought as to how important sleep is. Why else do one in three people have trouble sleeping and feel anything but ready and raring to go in the morning? 

And that’s exactly what our company philosophy is based on. The key to success in life is based in large part on getting a good night’s sleep. Only people who sleep well feel able to cope with the day, have enough energy for their jobs and families and are less susceptible to illness. Semua produk produk Cellife berasal dari Jepang, sebuah negara yang terkenal akan teknologi dan gaya hidup sehat terbaiknya, sehingga Jepang di nobatkan sebagai negara dengan angka harapan hidup tertinggi di Dunia

 Cellife memiliki tagline "Lift Up Life" yang berarti kami memiliki misi untuk mengangkat kehidupan orang orang di Indonesia menjadi lebih baik melalui produk kesehatan yang kita tawarkan dan juga peluang bisnisnya. Kami memberikan kesempatan kepada orang-orang di Indonesia untuk berafilliasi dengan kami dalam membagikan/menyebarkan produk produk kesehatan kepada keluarga, kerabat & teman Anda yang bisa memberikan tambahan penghasilan bagi Anda & keluarga.
