Eczema (atopic dermatitis) is an incurable immune dysregulation skin disease and one of the most prevalent chronic inflammatory skin conditions globally.
It affects up to 2.8 million Australians and approximately 223 million people worldwide.

Curezma is Australia’s first patented , steroid-free & clinically proven eczema care range.

Curezma successfully went through one of the largest clinical trials for any Australian over-the -counter (OTC) eczema care brand to ensure safety & efficacy of our products

Our mission is to provide an effective steroid-free solution for eczema, by addressing its symptoms , flare-ups & causes.

Our vision is to create a world where eczema warriors can live their lives fully, free from the discomfort and limitations of eczema.

Name: Miyyah
Description:
Miyyah is a leading provider of innovative and hygienic bathroom solutions in the UK. The Miyyah Bidet, is a state-of-the-art bidet attachment that offers a superior alternative to traditional toilet paper, using water. as we redefine personal hygiene standards and promote a greener lifestyle.

Simplified, hygienic, and sustainable loo-ing

Imagine this scenario: a little bird decides to relieve itself and, unfortunately, its target is you. Now, what would you do? Grab some dry paper and give it a good wipe? Or would you wash it off with water? It's a no-brainer, right? Water is the ultimate cleanser for pretty much everything - our dishes, our beloved cars, our luscious locks, and yes, even our bodies. So why do we settle for anything less when it comes to cleaning our behinds after we've done our business?

Let's take a moment to reflect. If someone happened to defecate on your pristine floor, would you merely grab a roll of toilet paper and attempt to wipe away the mess? Absolutely not! You'd go into full-on hazmat mode, dousing the area in copious amounts of bleach and maybe even contemplating setting your entire house ablaze. And you'd be justified in doing so. After all, fecal matter, no matter how you phrase it - shit, crap, poop, or even the more whimsical booboo - is not something you want lingering around. It's unhygienic, it poses serious health risks, and frankly, it's just plain gross.

Picture this: a gentle stream of soothing water, cleansing your nether regions, leaving you feeling as fresh as a daisy. That's the magic of a BumHose. It's not just a one-size-fits-all solution either. With adjustable settings, it caters to your personal preferences, accommodating anyone and everyone - from the mighty males to the lovely ladies, the young, the wise, and even the most ardent supporters of your favorite house at Hogwarts.

Your bottom will thank you, and so will Mother Earth.

Name: Lashes of Change
Description:
Lashes of Change began as an idea in 2015 that took almost 4 years of research, prototyping, testing, and fine-tuning to re-engineer the humble mascara and take  it from a single use, planet destroying consumable; to turn it into the customisable, sustainable and eco-friendly design that is unique to Lashes of Change.

With customer satisfaction front of mind rather than profits and mass manufacturing, we have created a luxurious mascara that can now be designed by our customers, to specifically tailor to their lash length and eye shape and personal preferences.  Our award winning redesign means that over 90% of the mascara packaging can be reused with the order of just a refill cartridge.
Lashes of Change uses the highest quality vegan ingredients in our formulas that are clean and cruelty free.  No compromises have been made to bring consumers a beautiful product that is better for the customer and the planet.

This redesign allows the use of better materials in manufacturing.  The outer casing is made from polished aluminum, which can be recycled at the end of it's long life.  Aluminum is durable, robust and provides our customers with a luxe look and feel to their mascara, making it a special purchase. In a nod to the glamour era of the 50's and 60's, the outer casing is designed to last for many years.
Our design uses <60% less plastic than the average mascara design, and our plastics are made from 50% PCR recycled plastics.

About Founder & CEO Tania Jolley
Tania's the CEO and creator of Lashes of Change.  She's an experienced entrepreneur in commercialising new products onto the market and a woman on a mission.  Solving problems and incorporating social change is her motivation to strive for success.  Tania saw this as the perfect opportunity to start Lashes of Love foundation which is channeling 25% of profits into breast cancer research with the Centre for Cancer Biology in Adelaide SA being the recipient of these much needed funds.

Name: Biavatti Franchising
Description:
Os fundadores Dr. Alex e a Dra. Debora conheceram-se em 2014, o que sempre tiveram em comum foi a paixão pelo empreendedorismo. Em 2017 essa paixão por empreender avançou ao analisar o crescimento no mercado de estética facial no Brasil, com isso foram se especializar em harmonizar pessoas, para assim fundar a primeira Clínica em Curitiba, com o intuito de expandir o negócio para Santa Catarina, foi quando desenvolveram um atendimento personalizado no Paraná e Santa Catarina, sendo um dia dedicado a elevar a autoestima das pessoas.
No ano de 2019 veio a pandemia e quando imaginavam que estavam no do sucesso caminho, veio a insegurança se o negócio passaria por esse momento crítico.
Mas mesmo neste período a Biavatti expandiu para primeira filial em Balneário Camboriú, seguido de Joinville, Blumenau, Florianópolis, Mafra, Ponta Grossa e recentemente São Jose dos Pinhais-Pr, se tornando a maior Clínica Especializada em Harmonização Facial do Sul do Brasil, em unidades próprias. Foi levando autoestima para várias cidades do Paraná e Santa Catarina, durante este período crítico no cenário mundial que cresceu a motivação maior e nos fez ver o quanto era importante o mercado da estética e que a Biavatti estaria trilhando o caminho certo.
E agora com a Clínica Biavatti Franchising, queremos compartilhar o sucesso das clínicas com empreendedores de todo o Brasil.
Venha você também fazer parte da família Biavatti, com baixo investimento e alta rentabilidade, no mercado que mais cresceu nos últimos anos.
A Biavatti proporciona aos franqueados todo suporte desde a busca pelo ponto até a comercialização dos produtos e serviços, realizamos a contratação da equipe e todo o treinamento com base em protocolos exclusivos, assim como sempre nos preocupamos com os resultados de nossos pacientes, nossa preocupação não é “vender franquias”, mas sim transferir o conhecimento com suporte diário ao franqueado para garantia do sucesso.

Name: SENSUM MARE
Description:
SENSUM MARE is a distinguished Polish natural skincare brand renowned for crafting some of the most sought-after cosmetics in the market. Embracing the Clean Beauty movement, the brand formulates its products using the highest quality active ingredients with scientifically proven efficacy. A significant aspect of their formulations includes marine-derived components, such as various algae extracts and Norwegian glacier water, setting the brand apart in the industry.

The brand's excellence has been recognized with numerous prestigious awards. Notably, SENSUM MARE is the only Polish natural cosmetics brand to have received two VOGUE Beauty Awards. In 2022, it was honored with the "Doskonałość Roku" award by "Twój Styl" magazine. Additionally, the brand has been a four-time laureate of the Glammies awards and has secured four Love Cosmetics Awards, presented by the portal WirtualneKosmetyki.pl. In 2023, the brand's ALGOPRO line was recognized in the VOGUE Beauty Awards in the "Premiere of the Year" category. 

Demonstrating a strong commitment to social responsibility, SENSUM MARE launched the educational campaign "Your Skin Ready for Years" in July 2023. Name: The Blob Lab

Derrière l’originalité du nom The Blob Lab, nous nous sommes donné une mission très sérieuse : La transition d’une gestion thérapeutique de la santé à une gestion préventive et la transition d’une industrie plastifère et énergivore à une industrie qui prend soin de la planète. 

The Blob Lab, c’est un laboratoire nouvelle génération inspiré de la nature, par et pour la nature. Nous puisons notre inspiration dans l’empire des eucaryotes (Algues, Plantes et Fungi) pour sourcer et formuler des compléments alimentaires et produits cosmétiques qui donnent aux humains et aux animaux les outils dont il a besoin pour gérer le stress de nos vies modernes et faciliter les mécanismes d’auto-guérison.

Notre vision s’inscrit dans le concept OneHealth dont l’enjeu est la collaboration entre les organismes de recherche oeuvrant en santé humaine, en santé vétérinaire et pour l’environnement.
Fondé sur la volonté de proposer des solutions naturelles au service des vétérinaires, nous nous sommes vite rendus compte que les qualités holistiques et adaptogènes de nos formules étaient aussi bonnes pour l’animal que pour l’homme. 

A l’image du Blob, nous évoluons à la frontière de ce qui est connu et de ce qui reste à découvrir.

Nous apprenons à ne pas avoir peur de faire différemment et d’être un peu bizarres, à nous éloigner des codes et des conditions et à puiser notre inspiration dans les textures et schémas de la nature.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

We are passionate about traditional home-made products that have been passed on through generations and have been a staple of our heritage and culture. Our first product is an ancient recipe of Vinegar made by fermenting freshly pressed apple in a two-step process that takes 2-3 months to complete. 

In Ramzan of 2020, Ammi and I decided to start making our own home-made apple cider vinegar for the reason that branded vinegar was unavailable due to restrictions on import. We decided to start experimenting and after a year of early morning and late-night chemistry lessons along with chit-chat about life and love, we came up with CIRCA, a natural and home-made Apple Cider Vinegar, created with a lot of care and passion. 

CIRCA - Apple Cider Vinegar has various healthful properties, including antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Evidence suggests that it may offer health benefits, such as aiding weight loss, reducing cholesterol, lowering blood sugar levels, and improving the symptoms of diabetes. It is an amazing detox drink and an immunity booster so start your natural and holistic health journey today.

Ammi & Yasir

Name: A&A NO LIMITS
Description:
BIENVENUE ! à vous dans l'univers de la beauté et du bien-être. La société A&A NO LIMITS a été créée en mars 2025 en France et au Sénégal. Pour ceux qui veulent savoir c'est quoi la signification de A&A NO LIMITS, c'est une histoire de coeur, d'amour et de passions du bien-faire, du bien-être et de la qualité. 

Je m'appelle Aminata, je suis la fondatrice de la marque A&A NO LIMITS. Lorsque, j'ai débuté ma carrière dans la santé, je n'aurai jamais imaginé lancer une marque de beauté et de bien-être à l'international. Qui dit santé, dit un esprit sain dans un corps sain. Etant dans les soins, je remarque facilement le problème de nombreuses femmes qui à la longue devienne un complexe pour elles. Malgré l'écoute et l'attention que je leur apporte au jour le jour, je me suis rendu compte que peut-être qu'il est temps que je fasse plus pour elles, pour les aider à être véritablement bien. Et c'est comme ça que m'est venue l'idée de faire des recherches approfondies pour apporter une solution concrète et définitive aux problèmes que nous avons toutes en commun : Prendre soin de nous et être heureuse.  
Ainsi, Aminata s'est investie corps et âme pour créer une marque appréciée, soucieuse de l'état d'esprit des femmes, de l'intérieur vers l'extérieur. Elle pensait que cette différence, subtile en apparence, faisait toute la différence pour les femmes ambitieuses dont les ambitions pouvaient être stimulées par leur prestataire de soins de beauté. 

Nos produits simplifient votre routine, nourrissent votre peau et ajoutent la touche parfaite sans chichis, juste le plaisir et les résultats personnalisés que vous souhaitez. Aucune règle. Aucune limite. Juste ce qui vous convient. Que vous ayez 18 ou 70 ans, une peau sèche ou éclatante, corpulente ou mince nous sommes là pour vous aider à vous sentir bien dans votre peau et dans votre esprit.

Nous disons non aux toxines et aux produits chimiques agressifs dans le but que vous puissiez dire oui à des ingrédients biologiques.

	•	Grass-Fed Beef Tallow: Rich in vitamins A, D, E, and K, this nutrient-dense ingredient closely mimics your skin’s natural oils, providing deep hydration and promoting healthy, glowing skin.
	•	Raw Wild Honey: Known for its soothing and antibacterial properties, honey helps calm irritation, retain moisture, and support overall skin health.

The result is a balm that is simple, effective, and gentle enough for even the most sensitive skin. Whether you’re dealing with dryness, irritation, or just looking for a cleaner way to care for your skin, our unscented tallow balm is designed to nourish, protect, and restore.

1. Blue light blocking glasses (blauw licht filter brillen)
2. Aardingsmat (om ook geaard binnenshuis te zijn)
3. Infrarood en roodlichttherapie panelen (talloze gezondheidsvoordelen) 

Al deze producten zijn bedoeld om je lichaam terug in de juiste staat te brengen zoals de natuur het altijd al heeft voorzien en je te laten voelen wat voor bom aan energie we eigenlijk zijn.

Door de hedendaagse maatschappij waarin we leven is dit ons bijna onmogelijk gemaakt en door deze producten te gebruiken kan je hier komaf mee maken en je gezondheid terug op het juiste niveau krijgen of onderhouden!

'Je lichaam in balans' denk maar eens na wat dit kan betekenen voor jou op zowel persoonlijk als ondernemingsvlak!
Voor meer informatie over deze tools mag je me altijd vrijblijvend contacteren!

Description:

GET INTERNATIONAL SARL fait partir du groupe GET MEDICAL qui totalise aujourd’hui dix-neuf (19) années d’expérience dans le conseil, la distribution, l’installation, la maintenance et le service après-vente des équipements médicaux de toutes les spécialités.

 Depuis 19 ans, nous avons réussi a accompagner plus de 2000 formations sanitaires d'une quinzaine de pays dans l’amélioration qualitative et quantitative de leur plateau technique.

Name: Cardio Miracle
Description:
Cardio Miracle, the complete nitric oxide solution.

Cardio Miracle is a synergistic mix of vitamins and nutrients your body needs to create the short-lived gas Nitric Oxide. This gas has been shown to improve many different health issues, including lowering blood pressure, reducing neuropathy, helping with restless leg syndrome, and more. 

We believe millions of lives can be saved through the science of Nitric Oxide. Our product, Cardio Miracle, is the evolution of Nitric Oxide research.

WHAT IS NITRIC OXIDE?
Doctors Louis J. Ignarro, Ferid Murad, and Robert F. Furchgott won the Nobel Prize in Physiology or Medicine in 1998 for their discovery of the function of Nitric Oxide in the body. What they found is that Nitric Oxide signals the cells in your body to do their job.

Prior to this discovery, we didn’t even know that we had Nitric Oxide in our bodies.

WHAT CAN NITRIC OXIDE DO?
You'll be surprised at what this unknown "miracle" can do for you:

RELAX AND DILATE YOUR BLOOD VESSELS: Nitric Oxide relaxes your blood vessels, dilating them and making them more flexible. This lowers your blood pressure naturally without thinning your blood so you feel better and can enjoy life.

OPTIMIZED BLOOD FLOW: Nitric Oxide helps support a healthy cardiovascular system, getting oxygen rich blood to your cells. Recent studies have found that this can also help with Neuropathy (loss of feeling in your fingers and toes) as well as dizziness.

BETTER DENTAL HEALTH: Dentists have long known there was a connection between your gums and your heart. People who have suffered from Periodontal Disease have seen amazing improvements in gum depth in just a matter of weeks by taking a Nitric Oxide supplement.

PREVENT OR REVERSE HEART ATTACKS AND STROKES: This is the big one, the Holy Grail of Nitric Oxide research. Dr. Louis J. Ignarro and his fellow scientists were awarded the Nobel Prize for Medicine in 1998 for their discovery of the role Nitric Oxide plays in our bodies.

Name: Mastitia
Description:
Breastfeeding is vital for infant health and recommended by WHO as the sole source of nutrition for the first 6 months of life. Yet, millions of mothers face mastitis - a painful breast inflammation affecting 1 in 4 breastfeeding women worldwide. Up to 38% are forced to stop breastfeeding early, despite its critical role in infant nutrition.

Today, standard care relies mainly on antibiotics, potentially exposing over 30 million infants annually to antibiotic transfer through breast milk. Early weaning and antibiotic exposure can disrupt infant microbiomes, raising risks of allergies, immune disorders, and long-term health complications.

Mastitia is changing this. We are developing an effective, microbiome-friendly solution for mastitis care - helping mothers continue breastfeeding while reducing dependence on antibiotics.

Our innovation supports WHO’s sustainable development goals by improving maternal and infant health while combating antimicrobial resistance.

Together, let’s safeguard breastfeeding and improve global health for mothers and infants!

Name: Terra Wash+Mg
Description:
Terra Wash+Mg е натурален, хипоалергенен еко прах за пране от пречистен магнезий (с чистота 99,95%), произведен по иновативна японска технология.

Terra Wash+Mg е подходящ за всички, които се стремят към по-здравословен живот и са загрижени за бъдещето на планетата (zero waste, без детергенти в отпадните води). Тъй като е хипоалергенен продукт, със силно антибактериално действие, този еко прах от магнезий е изключително подходящ за деца и новородени, поради което е отличен подарък за семейства с бебенца. Препоръчва се и за хора с алергии и дерматологични проблеми, в т.ч. екзема.

При всяка покупка на Terra Wash+Mg се засажда дърво чрез програмата Eden Reforestation, и се подпомага живота на хора, които живеят в изключително затруднени условия. Чрез така осигуреното им препитание, те имат възможност да изхранват семействата си, и да изпратят децата си на училище.

Terra Wash+Mg не е в пластмасова опаковка, за разлика от конвенционалните течни перилни препарати (детергенти). 

За една година в едно домакинство се изхвърлят 1080 грама пластмаса от опаковки на перилни препарати.

Когато използвате Terra Wash+Mg за пране, Вие допринасяте за намаляване на количеството пластмасови отпадъци, които се изхвърлят и евентуално подлежат на рециклиране, ако се изхвърлени на предназначените за целта места.

С Terra Wash+Mg Вашето домакинство е със zerowaste – безотпадъчно ползване на еко прах – натурален и екологичен за намаляване на пластмасовите отпадъци.

Terra Wash+Mg съдържа само пречистен магнезий с чистота 99,95%. Водата, в която е използвано сашето за пране не съдържа детергенти и химикали, а само магнезий и може да се използва за поливане и наторяване на растенията.

След минимум 365 цикъла на пране, когато количеството магнезий в едно саше намалее, можете да срежете опаковката и да поръсите магнезиевите гранулки в почвената смес около растенията, като естествен тор.

С Terra Wash+Mg Вие се грижите за себе си, своите любими хора и Планетата!

De expertise van Michaël zorgt ervoor dat elke formule zorgvuldig wordt samengesteld met oog voor detail, met het bereiken van de perfecte balans van ingrediënten. Ondertussen behandelt Manu de praktische en zakelijke aspecten, zodat onze producten naadloos en efficiënt bij u terechtkomen.

Als brotherhood delen ze een onbreekbare band en een aangeboren begrip van elkaar, waardoor ze een formidabel team vormen. Hun partnerschap is de drijvende kracht achter de toewijding van Black Gunpowder om uitmuntendheid te leveren in de wereld van supplementen.

Ontdek vandaag nog het verschil van Black Gunpowder en ervaar de resultaten van producten ontworpen door experts die oprecht om uw welzijn geven.

Description: Imagine if a simple wristband could speak for you when you can't, providing crucial medical information in seconds. Welcome to Emit Life, where we fuse technology with peace of mind. Our sleek, silicone NFC wristbands store vital health data that first responders can access with just a tap. Whether it's for a child with allergies at school, an elderly parent with chronic conditions, or a loved one enjoying the outdoors, our bands are the silent guardians that ensure safety is always within arm's reach. Emit Life bands come in a variety of colors to suit every style and every age, so wearing crucial medical details doesn't just feel secure, it looks great too. Join us in making safety simple and accessible, one tap at a time.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: Ayuska
Description:
At RVS Wellbeing, we recognized the need for premium natural, herbal and ayurvedic, chemical-free health supplements at affordable prices, and that is how the brand Ayuska, meaning Life (pronounced aa-yu-shk : आयुष्क), was created.

The stress of modern-day living and hectic schedules has led to millions of people following an unhealthy lifestyle. Unhealthy eating habits, physical inactivity, inadequate intake of nutrients and the long-term health effects of pollution have weakened the immune system and caused multiple health problems.

With Ayuska, we aim to provide premium and high-quality natural dietary supplements and proprietary Ayurvedic medicines to lower your risk of health problems and maintain general health.
Primary Industry: Retail Health and Personal Care Products

Name: All Better Co.
Description: Every season brings a reason to be outside, especially when you’ve got kids! After endless summer days and crisp nights outdoors, the elements got the best of us. With bites, bumps, and sunburns, everyone’s skin winds up inflamed, irritated, and itchy. (Nothing worse than a middle of the night wake up call because of itchy skin, right?) We looked for clean products that worked for every body, but no luck. So we did what moms do best — we decided to make it better ourselves. All of our products are made with love and with the whole family in mind.
